6230.name: Stand mixer with 7 liter bowl + accessories
6230.description: A unique kneading mechanism where the bowl rotates and the accessory is fixed, simulating powerful manual kneading; an automatic speed sensor that regulates the engine power according to the load; Extremely quiet work and high stability on the work surface thanks to a low center of gravity; A wide variety of accessories are included: kneading hook, dough roller, scraper, spatula, double beaters and the whisk bowl; Possibility of connecting external accessories (optional) such as a meat grinder, food processor, pasta accessories and juicer; Overload protection to protect the motor

6740.name: Integrated portable DVD radio with a 7-inch screen
6740.description: An integrated multimedia device that allows you to watch DVD movies, listen to music from CDs or MP3 files, and use it as an FM radio. The device includes a built-in screen that allows independent viewing without the need for an external screen, making it an ideal solution for travel, camping or use in children's rooms. Support for external media via USB and memory cards allows flexibility in playing digital content.

48182.name: Slow juicer
48182.description: The juicer is intended for extracting juice from hard fruits, vegetables, green leaves and wheat grass. The slow squeezing method preserves vitamins, minerals and nutritional values ​​by reducing oxidation. The device enables the continuous ejection of peels and flotation for work without blockages, and ensures maximum utilization of the raw materials. All parts are easy to disassemble and wash for quick cleaning.

48735.name: 8 liter slow cooker
48735.description: Intended for the preparation of long-cooking pot dishes, chowder (cholenet), soups and juicy cuts of meat while maintaining the nutritional values. Thanks to its large volume (8 liters), the pot is suitable for preparing about 10-12 dishes, which makes it ideal for large families or hosting. The device is suitable for use on Shabbat (subject to halachic instructions and choosing the appropriate heat mode). The pot and lid are dishwasher safe.

9154071.name: Haircut machine (3-in-1 hair removal device)
9154071.description: A multifunctional 3-in-1 care kit for removing hair from delicate areas. The device includes three interchangeable heads: 1. Rotating head for safely removing hair from the nose and ears. 2. Precise cutting head for shaping contours (wigs and beard line). 3. A dedicated comb for thinning and shaping eyebrows of different lengths. The device is suitable for daily home use and travel.

9154101.name: Haircut machine (4-in-1 hair removal device)
9154101.description: A multipurpose care kit designed for hair removal and precise shaping of the face and body areas. The device allows easy definition of the shape of the beard and eyebrows, safe removal of unnecessary hair in the nostrils and ears, and spot shaving. The device is characterized by an ergonomic and luxurious design, lightweight and especially suitable for traveling and trips thanks to its battery operation and the attached case.

WKACMX-1002.name: Automatic espresso coffee machine with grinder
WKACMX-1002.description: Preparation of a variety of coffee drinks: espresso, double espresso and Americano at the push of a button; Internal coffee grinder with 15 degrees of grinding to customize; milk frothing function using a steam tube; Self-cleaning system and removal of coffee residues; Possibility of pouring into two glasses at the same time; smart alerts about lack of water, lack of beans or need for cleaning; bean container lid with sealing ring to preserve freshness; Optimal temperature control for maximum extraction of the coffee aroma

ATL-136.name: Heats 60 stainless steel cups with a flat lid
ATL-136.description: a safety protection mechanism that cuts off the heating element in the absence of water; Two operating modes: boiling and keeping warm (Sabbath mode); approved for use on Shabbat by the CMT institute (without thermostat); transparent water meter to control the amount of water; Exemption from baptism according to the approval of Rabbi Eliyahu HaCohen Rosenberg; A stable and extremely durable base; Heat insulated carrying handles

PU-52 PLATINUM.name: Compact ceramic double cooktop
PU-52 PLATINUM.description: Instant and uniform heating without the need for a long waiting time; Suitable for working with all types of cookware (metal, glass, pottery); an easy-to-clean and highly durable upper surface; A luxurious and slim design from the PLATINUM series; economical in energy and electricity consumption; An ideal and portable solution for use at home, in the office, in student dormitories, in B&Bs or in the yard

ATL-48.name: Heat 20 stainless steel cups
ATL-48.description: approved for use on Shabbat strictly by the Junction Institute (operates without a thermostat); KGC Kosher certification - exemption from immersion and ablution; An external and transparent water meter that allows tracking the amount of water; Heat insulated handles for maximum safety; Compact design in a narrow and tall structure suitable for home and community use; Easy to clean and maintain thanks to hidden heating elements that reduce scale build-up

PG6045.name: Grooming kit for men
PG6045.description: An all-in-one grooming kit that includes 5 accessory heads: a wide trimmer for sharp lines, a detail trimmer for extremely close trimming (0.2 mm), a mini foil shaver, a linear body trimmer, and a fine trimmer for the nose, ears and eyebrows; includes 8 lifting combs: 1 adjustable comb (2-16 mm), 5 combs of fixed lengths (1.5, 3, 6, 9, 12 mm) and 2 dedicated combs for body care; suitable for beard styling, haircuts and body care; comes with a dedicated charging and storage stand for all kit parts.

STAR 2.name: Ceiling fan 44' with LED lighting for a room of 9-13 square meters
STAR 2.description: Extremely quiet and energy-efficient DC motor; Full remote control that includes speed control, lighting dimming (dimmer), and changing the color of the light; Smart memory function that keeps the state of the fan and the last lighting (suitable for use with a Shabbat clock); winter mode that allows reversing the direction of the engine to disperse hot air from the ceiling; Modern ceiling-mounted design designed especially for bedrooms and children's rooms.

MGC-2.name: Safety gas stove 2 flames
MGC-2.description: safe and efficient cooking indoors; Advanced protection mechanism to prevent gas leaks; Full control of the flame intensity using built-in regulators; Easy and quick maintenance thanks to removable components; High durability for intensive use over time.

ATL-400.name: Shabbat plate 4 pots
ATL-400.description: A continuous heating system that maintains a uniform heat level in all parts of the plate; Approved for use on Shabbat and holidays by the CMT Institute; A pair of heat-insulated carrying handles for maximum safety; a control light to monitor the operation of the device; Rounded corners and protective covers for user safety

ATL-300.name: Shabbat plate 2 pots
ATL-300.description: Maintaining uniform heat throughout the entire area of ​​the plate; approved for use on Shabbat by the CMT Institute; heat-insulated handles for safety; rounded corners with protective cover; suitable for prolonged use on Shabbat and holidays; durable and easy-to-clean enamel coating

ND-7040.name: Washing machine 7 kg white
ND-7040.description: automatic weighing system for adjusting water and electricity consumption to the weight of the laundry; Quick program in 15 minutes; child safety locking mechanism; flood protection system; automatic balance control system to prevent vibrations; Various washing programs including cotton, wool, delicate wash and manual program; Option to delay activation; Wide door opening for maximum convenience in loading the laundry

P080WM.name: 8 kg white washing machine with a black door
P080WM.description: For more details about the white 8 kg washing machine with a black door and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

98C755.name: Screen 98' QLED MINILED (SG)

98P8L.name: 98' QLED MINILED screen (C data - official)
98P8L.description: For more details on the 98 QLED MINILED screen (C Data - official) and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

EOH7425X.name: Black digital built oven
EOH7425X.description: SurroundCook technology for uniform heat distribution throughout the oven space; VelvetClosing system for soft and silent door closing; Telescopic rails for safe retrieval of molds; Digital display including timer, clock and cooking time programming; 9 cooking and baking programs including active turbo, grill, defrosting and lower heating element; Cold door with 3 layers of glass for maximum safety; Inner glass and door can be easily disassembled for needs Cleaning; upper heating element disassembles downwards for easy cleaning of the oven ceiling

ESA47200SW.name: Wide normal white dishwasher
ESA47200SW.description: AirDry technology for natural and economical drying by automatically opening a door by 10 cm at the end of the cycle; silent, economical and durable inverter motor; AutoSense program that automatically adjusts the washing time, temperature and water consumption according to the level of dirt; ExtraHygiene function to disinfect the dishes and remove 99.99% of bacteria and viruses; 30-minute quick washing program for a light load; adjustable upper basket QuickLift for changing height even when it is full; Delay Start option of 1 to 24 hours; MachineCare program for dishwasher maintenance and cleaning; ExtraPower option for washing dishes with tough dirt

ESA47200SX.name: Silver standard wide dishwasher
ESA47200SX.description: AirDry technology for automatic opening of the door at the end of washing for optimal drying; ExtraHygiene function for disinfecting dishes at high temperature; the SENSORCONTROL sensor that detects the level of dirt and adjusts the consumption of water and electricity; Machine Care program for self-cleaning and dishwasher maintenance; delay timer for late activation (1-24 hours); 30 minute quick program at 60 degrees; WaterStop mechanism for protection against flooding; Crystal protection to prevent clouding in glassware (10 levels of direction); Height adjustable upper basket

EW6C5752CM.name: Washer dryer 7 kg condenser with sealed door
EW6C5752CM.description: SensiCare technology that adjusts the drying time to the weight of the laundry to prevent over-drying; Two-way drum movement (Reverse Action) to prevent wrinkles and shorten ironing time; A variety of drying programs: ECO cotton, synthetic, delicate, bedding, sportswear, jeans, mixed, easy ironing and refreshing; Action delay (Delay Start) up to 20 hours; Increased anti-wrinkle function up to 120 minutes; warning indicators for cleaning the filter, emptying the water tank and treating the condenser; possibility to change the door opening direction; Child lock

KGG6437K.name: Gas stove 60 cm black glass turbo head
KGG6437K.description: Speed ​​Burner technology for fast and efficient heating 20% ​​more than standard burners; A powerful wok burner with a triangular crown for frying and sautéing at a high temperature; Safety sensors (Flame Failure Device) for automatic disconnection of the gas supply in the event of the flame being extinguished; Rotating control buttons (Press & Turn) for quick ignition and smooth transition between flame intensities; Glass surface is easy to clean and heat resistant; Massive and particularly stable cast iron pot mounts; Slim profile design that fits in a uniform line with the work surface

PR370W.name: Showcase refrigerator 348 liters white-transparent
PR370W.description: Transparent double glass door for thermal insulation and optimal display; Accurate digital temperature control; Internal LED lighting and separate upper LED lighting designed for switching; Lock option for commercial use; Extremely quiet compressor for continuous operation; Hidden handles for a clean and professional look; Flexibility in arranging the shelves

MAX-RDNH520AIX.name: Refrigerator top freezer 470 liters brushed stainless steel
MAX-RDNH520AIX.description: A wide upper freezer refrigerator that includes No-Frost technology to prevent ice accumulation; External electronic control monitor for temperature control; Peripheral air flow system to keep the food fresh in all parts of the refrigerator; economical internal LED lighting; vegetable and fruit drawer with humidity control; height-adjustable glass shelves; possibility to reverse the door opening direction; Front steering legs for maximum stabilization.

MAX-RDNH630DAID.name: 520 liter top freezer refrigerator with kiosk and ice maker
MAX-RDNH630DAID.description: Fully automatic defrosting system to prevent ice accumulation; External digital display for temperature control; external water kiosk (cold water dispenser) in the refrigerator door; Manual ice maker (Twist Ice Maker) in the freezer compartment; possibility to reverse the door opening direction; integral opening handles; Extremely quiet operation; Keeping food fresh for a long time through humidity control

NI 6550.name: Induction cooker 60 cm three-phase
NI 6550.description: cooking with induction technology that guarantees high energy efficiency; Single-phase connection option (subject to power limitations); Boost function (Power Plus) for extremely fast boiling; built-in digital timer; A safety system that includes a child lock and automatic shutdown; residual heat indication to prevent burns; automatic pot detection; Smooth glass surface for easy and quick cleaning

43NU850B6LA.name: 43' NANO screen
43NU850B6LA.description: For more details on the 43' NANO screen and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

OLED65CS6VA.name: 65' OLED screen
OLED65CS6VA.description: Pixel technology independently illuminated for absolute black and infinite contrast; Advanced Alpha 11 processor based on artificial intelligence to improve image and sound; Full support for professional gaming with NVIDIA G-Sync, AMD FreeSync Premium and a response time of 0.1ms; webOS interface Re:New Program that guarantees system upgrades for 5 years; Magic Remote with voice control and Hebrew support; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support; Filmmaker Mode for watching movies as the director intended; Eye protection technology (Flicker Free, Low Blue Light).

75NU850B6LA.name: 75' NANO screen
75NU850B6LA.description: 75-inch screen with NanoCell technology that offers rich colors and precision in details; 9th generation α7 artificial intelligence processor for image and sound optimization in real time; Nano Detail Enhancer for refining textures and depth; Slim and luxurious Linear Flow design suitable for hanging on the wall; webOS 26 system with customizable AI Hub interface; Filmmaker Mode support for an authentic cinematic experience; Advanced gaming features including VRR and ALLM; WOW Orchestra technology for synchronizing the TV speakers with an LG sound projector; Quad Protection against high voltage, lightning and moisture; AI Chatbot for built-in technical assistance

85NU840B6LA.name: 85' NANO screen

65NU840B6LA.name: 65' NANO screen
65NU840B6LA.description: For more details on the 65' NANO screen and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

X60W Ultra Complete.name: White robotic vacuum cleaner
X60W Ultra Complete.description: VersaLift technology that allows the LDS sensor to sink in for cleaning under low furniture; unprecedented suction power of 35,000Pa; Washing scrubs in hot water at 100 degrees and drying in hot air at 90 degrees; OmniSight navigation system with dual AI cameras to detect over 280 types of obstacles; detection of hidden dirt using infrared light and blue lighting; Dynamic scrubbing arm and side brush arm for perfect reach into corners (MopExtend & SideReach); Double HyperStream brush to prevent hair tangling; Built-in voice control by connecting to the Dreamehome app.

75NU840B6LA.name: 75' NANO screen
75NU840B6LA.description: Nano Detail Enhancer technology to improve color accuracy and depth; webOS Smart TV operating system with AI Hub support and artificial intelligence services (Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot); Support for HDR10 Pro and HLG formats; FILMMAKER MODE for cinematic viewing faithful to the original; Magic Remote with voice control and intuitive navigation; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support; Game Optimizer mode for managing gaming settings; wireless sound synchronization (LG Sound Sync) and WOW Orchestra support; Quad protection (Quad Protection) against moisture and voltage surges

H16 PRO STEAM.name: Vacuum cleaner with steam
H16 PRO STEAM.description: A cordless vacuum cleaner that combines cleaning and disinfection with steam at a temperature of 200 degrees to destroy 99.9% of bacteria; AI-GapFree 2.0 system that includes a robotic arm for thorough cleaning of corners and panels from three directions; TangleCut brush with a mechanism for cutting hairs that prevents tangling; ability to work in full recline (180 degrees) for cleaning under low furniture; Blue LED lighting at the top of the brush to reveal transparent dirt and stains; A docking station that performs self-washing in boiling water and quick drying in hot air to prevent mold and odors; A smart sensor for detecting the level of dirt and automatically adjusting the power of pumping and water flow.

75P7K.name: 75' QLED screen
75P7K.description: Advanced QLED display with over a billion colors; AiPQ artificial intelligence engine to improve image quality in real time; Smart Google TV interface with Google Play app store; Hands-free voice control using the built-in Google Assistant; Support for Apple AirPlay 2 and built-in Chromecast for screen mirroring; Game Master mode for optimizing game settings and lowering input lag; Bezel-less modern design that blends into the home space; Support for video calls (using a compatible camera).

X60B Ultra Complete.name: Black robotic vacuum cleaner
X60B Ultra Complete.description: Extremely low VersaLift design (7.95 cm) that allows entry under low furniture; unprecedented suction power of 35,000Pa for deep cleaning; ProLeap technology for climbing over obstacles and stairs up to a height of 8.8 cm; Washing scrubs in boiling water (100°C) and drying in hot air to prevent odors and germs; AI OmniSight navigation system that identifies over 280 types of obstacles with millimeter precision; cleaning corners and edges using SideReach and MopExtend dynamic arms; Fully autonomous All-in-One docking station (emptying, filling and self-cleaning); LED lighting and infrared light to detect hidden dirt in dark conditions; Full voice control and a smart map management app

EOH3101K.name: Built-in black digital oven made in Italy
EOH3101K.description: Active Turbo 4D Even Cooking system for uniform heat distribution and cooking on several levels at the same time; The InfiSpace baking chamber is 20% larger than a normal chamber; 9 work programs (baking with humidity, conventional, bottom heating element, active turbo, grill, quick grill, grill with turbo, pizza, lighting); CoolDoor cold door with 2 layers of glass and reflector; VelvetClosing mechanism for soft closing of the door; Door and glass can be quickly disassembled for easy cleaning; Baking chamber coated with Clear'n Clean enamel for easy cleaning; a digital control panel that includes a clock and timer with touch technology; EasyEntry rails for convenient insertion and retrieval of molds; Frontal ventilation to protect the kitchen cabinets; halogen rear lighting; Includes 2 regular patterns, 1 deep pattern and 1 grid

PVBI60-BK.name: Black mechanical built oven
PVBI60-BK.description: 8 diverse cooking and baking functions to match any type of food; baking chamber coated with high-quality enamel for easy and quick cleaning; A peripheral ventilation system to protect the kitchen cabinets; Built-in timer with automatic shutdown mechanism for maximum safety; A luxurious design with a black glass finish suitable for modern kitchens; Double glass door for optimal thermal insulation

WM100P.name: Washing machine 10 kg flat black door

75QNED72B.name: 75' QNED MINI LED screen
75QNED72B.description: QNED MiniLED technology for pure colors and deep contrast thanks to tiny LEDs; a smart webOS operating system with a personal interface and access to streaming applications (Netflix, Disney+, YouTube, etc.); Support for artificial intelligence ThinQ AI and voice control; Advanced gaming capabilities including Game Optimizer, ALLM and HGiG; Filmmaker Mode for watching movies exactly as the director intended; content sharing via Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit; Upscaling content to 4K quality using AI

PR56VB.name: Showcase office refrigerator 50 liters black + transparent

SJ-FSRN87V-BK.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 611 liters black glass

PR370B.name: Showcase refrigerator 348 liters black-transparent

70826-IS.description: Cutting into uniform cubes (Dicing) using a dedicated accessory; 7 different operating modes: dice, thin slice, thick slice, thin grater, coarse grater, parmesan/horseradish grater and cut into chips; kneading doughs; foaming; chopping, grinding and mixing; Double security system that prevents operation without correct assembly; vacuum feet to prevent slipping; Easy disassembly and cleaning (dishwasher washable parts)

DOUBLE FORCE FP825E10.name: 1000 watt food processor with a 3 liter bowl
DOUBLE FORCE FP825E10.description: cutting meat and vegetables; Spreading and scraping (coarse and fine) using 3 bidirectional stainless steel discs; kneading doughs; whipping whipped cream and mixing sauces (emulsion accessory); squeezing citrus fruits with cones of different sizes; chopping herbs, nuts and onions using a dedicated mini chopper; making smoothies, purees and soups in a blender; two separate motor outputs (blue for power and low speed for the bowl, green for high speed for the blender); Smart storage of accessories inside the bowl using a dedicated basket

MCM3PM386.name: Compact food processor 900 watts 2.3 liter bowl
MCM3PM386.description: Over 50 work functions including cutting, scraping, grinding, mixing, kneading and whipping; Smart tool detection technology that automatically detects the connected accessory and adjusts the optimal speed to it; SmartStorage system that allows convenient storage of all accessories inside the bowl to save space; MultiLevel6 multifunctional chopper for fast grinding of coffee beans, spices, hard cheeses and herbs; A high-quality blender that is also suitable for crushing ice and making smoothies; Rubber suction feet for increased stability while working; Accessories are dishwasher safe; Safety locking mechanism for bowl and lid

JE95.name: Hard fruit and carrot juicer 900 watts
JE95.description: quick juicing of whole fruits and vegetables (such as apples and carrots) without the need for pre-cutting; Nutri Disc technology to produce maximum vitamins and minerals; two electronic work speeds adapted to soft and hard fruit types; A foam separator that guarantees receiving only clear juice when pouring; a safety locking mechanism that prevents operation without fully closing the lid; Easy and quick cleaning thanks to the parts that can be washed in the dishwasher (except for the motor base); Automatic waste discharge system for a large external tank that allows continuous work.

ATL-6111.name: Grilling and home shawarma device 2000 watts
ATL-6111.description: grilling shawarma, meats, poultry and vegetables at home; A rotary engine that guarantees heat distribution and uniform roasting from all directions; Built-in tray to drain excess fat for healthier roasting; Safety protection net around the heating element; A structure that allows easy disassembly and cleaning

SE-299.name: Grilling and home shawarma device 2000 watts
SE-299.description: A home vertical grilling device designed for preparing shawarma, grilled chicken and kebab skewers; Works with infrared technology that guarantees strong and juicy grilling without smoke and without drying the meat; includes a motor that rotates the skewer automatically for uniform roasting; Open design that allows easy access to meat and easy cutting; Fat drainage system for healthier meat

ATL-218.name: Citrus juicer 90 watts
ATL-218.description: A powerful electric juicer designed for squeezing all types of citrus fruits; Universal squeezing head adapted to different sizes of fruit; direct pouring spout with a STOP mechanism to prevent dripping; A quiet and extremely efficient engine for maximum extraction; Reinforced structure designed for longevity; quick disassembly and assembly that allow for easy and convenient cleaning; Storage compartment for the electric cable in the body of the device

ATL-414.name: Carrot and hard fruit juicer 400 watts
ATL-414.description: Powerful squeezing of carrots and hard fruits while maintaining the natural values; A particularly large compression opening that allows the insertion of fruits and vegetables without the need for pre-cutting; A separation system that includes two separate containers for juice and waste; A huge waste collection tank designed for long-term use without breaks; a safety handle that cuts off the operation of the device when it is opened; Large stainless steel mesh for maximum squeezing in minimum time; Easy and convenient to use, disassemble and clean

ATL-227.name: Citrus juicer 300 watts
ATL-227.description: Active squeezing using a squeeze handle for maximum juice; a powerful 300W motor for continuous and uniform squeezing; a safety mechanism that only activates the device by pressing; a built-in filter to filter seeds and fruit remains; a direct pouring spout that includes a STOP mechanism to prevent dripping; disassembled parts for quick and easy cleaning; innovative and compact design suitable for prolonged use

66336-IS.name: Citrus and pomegranate juicer 600 watts
66336-IS.description: squeezing all types of citrus fruits (oranges, grapefruits, lemons, limes); squeezing grenades thanks to the powerful engine; Agrometric operating handle (ergonomic) for easy and efficient pressing; Two interchangeable squeeze heads of different sizes; Separation of flotation to obtain clear juice; Quick and simple disassembly and assembly for easy cleaning in the dishwasher

MCP72GPB.name: VitaStyle Citro citrus juicer
MCP72GPB.description: 2-in-1 design that allows squeezing and serving directly in an elegant glass jug; DripStop technology to prevent dripping and keep the work surface clean; Automatic activation by pressing the squeeze cone; Plastic parts that come into contact with food are BPA-free; High-quality stainless steel strainer and squeezing cone; Parts can be disassembled and washed in the dishwasher; Includes a lid to close the jar for storage in the refrigerator and a dust protection cover; LED indicator light

SJ-GTR820G-WH.name: Refrigerator top freezer 604 liters white glass
SJ-GTR820G-WH.description: Plasmacluster Ion technology to neutralize bacteria, viruses and mold spores; Integrated Hybrid Cooling system to prevent dryness and uniform cold distribution; Nano Deodorizer filter to reduce unpleasant odors; Versatile Extra Cool drawer for quick cooling (0-3 degrees); Mega Freezer - a spacious freezer compartment with a smart internal arrangement; Strong internal LED lighting in the cooling compartment and the freezing compartment; External electronic control panel (on the door) to control the temperature; portable ice cube maker that includes a tray and storage box; soft closing mechanism for drawers; Internal handles are designed as part of the door

HEM-840.name: Hard fruit and carrot juicer 800 watts
HEM-840.description: For more details about the 800 watt hard fruit and carrot juicer and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

HEM-2127.name: A powerful 700W blender with a glass cup
HEM-2127.description: Crushing ice, making smoothies, soups and sauces, quick and uniform mixing of a variety of ingredients, comfortable handle for safe use, possibility to add ingredients during work through the lid

MF110W70/W-IL (64310).name: Washing machine 7 kg menu in Hebrew white
MF110W70/W-IL (64310).description: quiet and economical inverter motor; Steam washing program for disinfecting and removing tough stains; Turbo button to shorten the washing time by up to 50%; 15 and 45 minute quick programs; Option to delay activation up to 24 hours; menu and command panel in Hebrew; numeric digital display; child safety lock; A self-cleaning program for the drum

WQP12-W7703M (6477).name: Full integrated wide dishwasher
WQP12-W7703M (6477).description: Smart connectivity to the Midea app for remote control and operation; automatic door opening at the end of washing for faster and more economical drying; POWER WASH function for washing dishes with particularly hard dirt; ION REFRESH technology to eliminate 99.8% of bacteria and refresh the interior of the dishwasher; Option to remove half amount (choice between upper and lower basket); Indicator lights to warn of a lack of salt, rinse aid or a closed water tap

LCV70GB.name: Gas stove 70 cm turbo head in the middle of black glass
LCV70GB.description: A 70 cm wide gas stove that offers an extensive cooking area with 5 flames, including a central turbo wok flame designed for fast and powerful cooking. The device combines a luxurious black glass design with high durability thanks to cast iron grids and stainless steel switches. The stove is equipped with a full safety system that cuts off the gas supply automatically in the event of a leak or extinguishing a fire, and includes a convenient electronic ignition that is activated directly from the switches.

SJ-FSR920-WH.name: Refrigerator 5 doors 668 liters white glass
SJ-FSR920-WH.description: J-Tech Inverter motor for energy saving and quiet operation; Plasmacluster Ion Pro technology to neutralize bacteria and mold; ActiFresh Hybrid Cooling system for uniform cooling and preventing food from drying out; Flexible storage compartment (Flexible Zone) with 4 variable temperature modes (from 3 to 18 degrees); Automatic electric ice cube maker that produces 2 types of cubes; External Touch operating panel on the door with LCD display; Perimeter LED lighting that includes 48 bulbs; 5-door design with internal handles; A wide interior space without a partition for storing large items; vacation status; ECO mode; Voice alert for an open door; Activation lock (children)

HD-884RWENSL (6376).name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 680 liters bright stainless steel
HD-884RWENSL (6376).description: Inverter compressor for quiet operation and energy saving; Multi Air Flow system for uniform air distribution; Electronic control with internal LED display; Fresh Filter to prevent odors; double drawers for vegetables and fruits with humidity control; fast cooling mode (Fast Cooling); Powerful internal LED lighting; Durable tempered glass shelves.

HD-884RWEN (6377).name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 680 liters blackened stainless steel
HD-884RWEN (6377).description: Multi Air Flow system for uniform air distribution in all parts of the refrigerator; Platinum Fresh filter to neutralize odors and bacteria; External electronic control panel with LED display; Remote control using a dedicated app; motion sensor in the front to activate external lighting when approaching; Super Cool and Super Freeze modes for fast cooling and freezing; A folding shelf (Infinite Shelf) for storing tall items; Adjustable door bins (Infinite Door Bin); a dedicated fresh food drawer for meat and fish; Class T climatic classification adapted to the Israeli climate

HEM-189.name: 1.7 liter stainless steel electric kettle
HEM-189.description: Durable and designed stainless steel body; ergonomic and comfortable handle for safe pouring; transparent external water meter to check the amount of water; Top lid with easy opening and convenient for filling; Power indicator light

L75MB-APME (81306).name: 75' QLED screen
L75MB-APME (81306).description: Advanced QLED display with 1.07 billion colors and 94% DCI-P3 coverage; The Google TV system that coordinates content from all apps in one place; voice control using Google Assistant; Premium design without borders (Limitless Design) with a metallic finish; MEMC technology for smoothing motion; Support for built-in Chromecast, Miracast and Apple AirPlay for streaming content from the smartphone; A control center for a smart home (Smart Home Control Hub) that allows control of Xiaomi's IoT products.

MK-17D19A2 (6216).name: Electric kettle 1.7 liter white plastic
MK-17D19A2 (6216).description: Fast and efficient boiling; Easy lid opening with one click (One-Touch); ergonomic grip handle is comfortable to use; transparent water level gauge for easy control; a place to store the power cable at the base of the device; Filter to prevent the passage of scale

HEM-192.name: Heat 40 stainless steel cups
HEM-192.description: Two modes of operation: boiling mode and Shabbat mode (preserving heat); Halachic approval: approved for use on Shabbat by the "Shabbat Watch"; Protection mechanism: protection against use without water (drying); safety lock for the top cover; Automatic heat retention after boiling

HEM -193.name: Heat 60 stainless steel cups
HEM -193.description: Two modes of operation: boiling and keeping warm (Shabbat mode); Built-in protection mechanism against operation without water (drying); Upper stainless steel lid that includes a safety lock; external water meter to control the quantity; two control LEDs to monitor the operation status; Wide and extremely stable base

MC-ID3592-A1C (6758).name: Induction cooker Domino 2 cooking zones FLEX ZONE single phase 3500 watts black
MC-ID3592-A1C (6758).description: Flex Zone technology that allows cooking in two separate centers or combining them into one free cooking surface; Continuous Low Power system for continuous and consistent heating even at low intensities; Boost function to increase the heating power quickly; sensor for automatic identification of the size of the pot; safety mechanism for automatic shutdown; Child safety lock

ND-6018.name: Wide integral dishwasher with 3 baskets
ND-6018.description: Full integral dishwasher with 3 wash baskets; A third basket dedicated to cutlery; automatic door opening at the end of the program for optimal drying; UV disinfection technology to destroy bacteria and prevent odors; Dual Wash function for separate washing of pots and delicate dishes; half amount option (1/2 Load) to save water and electricity; Delay Timer up to 24 hours; drying system with hot air flow; middle basket adjustable for height; child lock and memory function for final settings

HEM-191.name: Heat 30 stainless steel cups
HEM-191.description: Boiling water quickly and keeping it warm for long hours; Halachic approval for use on Shabbat on behalf of the "Shabbat shift"; automatic protection that disconnects the device in a state of lack of water to prevent damage; High-quality and durable stainless steel design; Ease of maintenance and cleaning thanks to the hidden heating element

ND-6528B.name: Standard wide dishwasher, 2 shelves, adjustable upper basket, black
ND-6528B.description: Wide dishwasher (60 cm) with a black finish; 2 shelves of dishes with an upper basket adjustable in height to customize the washing space; a dedicated basket for cutlery; drying using residual heat (Residual Heat) to save energy; Hybrid program that combines hot water and steam for maximum cleaning and disinfection; reliable and quiet AC motor; delay timer for timing the start of work; child lock mechanism for safety; built-in internal water softener; Detergent lid with sliding opening

UDG50SR684ANT.name: 50 inch screen (700150)
UDG50SR684ANT.description: Smart TV based on Google TV that allows access to Netflix, YouTube and Disney Plus applications; Frameless modern frameless design; remote control that includes search and voice control; Support for wide dynamic range (HDR10) to improve contrast; A system for dynamic noise reduction and color enhancement in the image; Built-in Idan Plus tuner for receiving digital TV broadcasts; full operation menus in Hebrew; Built-in media player for playing music and video files through the USB input

ND-475W.name: Refrigerator top freezer 430 liters white
ND-475W.description: No Frost technology to prevent ice accumulation and automatic defrosting; Adjustable thermostat for temperature control; Internal LED lighting in the cooling compartment; 2 adjustable tempered glass shelves; large transparent fruit and vegetable drawer; 3 storage shelves in the refrigerator door; A mesh shelf in the freezer compartment and 2 door shelves in the freezer; Modern design with hidden handles; Extremely quiet operation

EOH6221V.name: White built-in digital oven 2 sets of telescopic rails
EOH6221V.description: SurroundCook technology for uniform and optimal heat distribution throughout the oven space; InfiSpace system that includes a large baking chamber and huge trays; 9 work programs including active turbo, pizza/AirFry, grill, defrosting and baking with moisture; 2 sets of telescopic rails for safe retrieval of molds; Digital control panel with touch control for clock, timer and stopwatch; automatic quick heating function; Door and glass can be quickly dismantled for easy cleaning; EasyEntry ladders for convenient insertion of templates; Clear'n Clean enamel coating for simple cleaning of the oven sides

BP4750.name: Powerful stick blender 1400 watts
BP4750.description: Powerful mixing and grinding of a wide variety of raw materials; crushing ice and particularly hard components thanks to the titanium blades; preparation of smoothies, soups, sauces and juices with a uniform and velvety texture; Full and precise control over the texture of the food through 20 working speeds; Keeping the kitchen clean thanks to a splash-proof design; Comfortable work and easy to operate for a long time thanks to the ergonomic structure

SR-885B NE.name: 71-liter built-in stove in black retro style
SR-885B NE.description: Mix Chamber Refrigeration system for peripheral ventilation and frontal cooling to protect the kitchen cabinets; Baking chamber with enamel coating of the Easy To Clean type for quick cleaning; Fast heating program to 180 degrees in 5 minutes; Uniform heat distribution using an active turbo (Airmove); An internal door with a straight surface without screws; Detachable side ladders for easy cleaning and prevention of abrasion; Possibility of continuous work without a timer

SJ-GPRN75D-SL.name: Refrigerator top freezer 587 liters gray glass
SJ-GPRN75D-SL.description: Plasmacluster Ion technology to neutralize bacteria and mold; Nano Deodorizer filter to reduce bad odors; Cooling drawer (Extra Cool) to maintain a temperature of 0-3 degrees; Express Freezing function for fast freezing; Express Cool function for quick cooling of drinks; semi-automatic ice cube maker (Twist Ice Maker); External control panel built into the handle; Powerful internal LED lighting; removable tempered glass shelves; 2 separate drawers for fruits and vegetables

25386-IS.name: Belgian grill+waffle press toaster removable plates 2200 watts
25386-IS.description: A multifunctional device that combines a press toaster, a barbecue grill and a device for making Belgian waffles in one device. The device includes removable plates that can be replaced for easy cleaning and convenient maintenance. The device can be opened to 180 degrees to create a double grilling surface in a healthy barbecue style. The height control mechanism in 5 stages allows a perfect adjustment to the thickness of the food (meat, fish, vegetables or toasts), and the built-in timer allows full control during cooking. The device is equipped with a fat drainage system for a dedicated tray to maintain cleanliness and low-fat cooking.

NC701.name: American ice cream machine CREAMI SPOON & SPIN
NC701.description: For more details about the American CREAMI SPOON & SPIN ice cream machine and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

R-709K.name: Microwave 25 liter digital integrated black grill
R-709K.description: Digital microwave integrated grill; 3 combined cooking programs (microwave + grill); automatic cooking programs for popcorn, potatoes, frozen vegetables, pizza and beverages; 3 automatic defrosting programs (by weight or time); OP function to eliminate odors using the fan; child protection lock; external LCD monitor; Opening a door at the push of a button

SJ-FFS89-BK.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 572 liters black glass
SJ-FFS89-BK.description: Plasmacluster Ion technology to neutralize bacteria and mold; A hybrid cooling system to prevent food from drying out; Extra Cool Plus drawer for gentle cooling at a temperature of -1.5 degrees; A huge vegetable and fruit drawer with humidity control and a movable partition; Inverter motor with smart double fan; possibility of deep freezing (up to -24 degrees); Voice alert for an open door; Central control computer for precise temperature control

SJ-FP910-BS.name: Refrigerator 5 doors 668 liters bright stainless steel
SJ-FP910-BS.description: Plasmacluster Ion technology to neutralize bacteria and mold; ActiFresh Hybrid Cooling system for maintaining food moisture and uniform cooling; Flexi-room with a variable temperature between 3 and 18 degrees; LCD type external Touch control panel; Perimeter LED lighting that includes 48 powerful bulbs; Electric ice cube maker with 2 types of cubes; Express Ice and Fast Freeze modes for extremely fast freezing; Vacation Mode and ECO mode functions for energy saving; wide tempered glass shelves; Voice alert for open door and child lock for safety

R-328FH(BS).name: Microwave 34 liters digital SPACE MAX flat without plate black
R-328FH(BS).description: SPACE MAX technology that allows the utilization of 100% of the microwave space and the use of square or extra large utensils; uniform cooking and heating that prevents cold areas in the food; Optimal humidity sensor for accurate cooking results; Smart compromise plan by weight or time; child safety lock; easy maintenance and quick cleaning of the flat glass surface; Premium design with a blackened stainless steel finish

SL-7008.name: Black milk frother
SL-7008.description: 4 operating modes to choose from: hot and thick frothing, warm and gentle frothing, cold frothing (for iced coffee), and milk heating only; Speed: heating and whipping from a cold state in about 60 seconds; Safety: automatic shutdown mechanism at the end of the operation; Comfort: extremely quiet operation, ergonomic handle, non-slip feet and LED control light indicating the work status.

KG79.name: Black 110 watt coffee grinder
KG79.description: A professional coffee grinder that uses two grinding disks (Burr) to prevent heating and preserve the aroma of the coffee beans; 16 adjustable grind levels that allow full control over the grind level depending on the type of drink; A cup selector that enables precise grinding of the required amount from 1 to 12 cups; Friendly control panel with soft touch buttons; removable upper grinding wheel that allows for easy and convenient cleaning; Bean container and ground coffee container are transparent and removable for monitoring the quantity and maximum convenience of use

ATL-2790.name: French crepe maker
ATL-2790.description: A device designed for making thin and professional French crepes quickly and easily. The wide surface allows uniform heat distribution throughout the length of the batter. The device is multi-purpose and is also suitable for preparing pancakes, blinches, tortillas, breadcrumbs and a variety of pastries based on liquid batter. The special coating allows work with minimal oil and quick and easy cleaning at the end of use.

SL-7007.name: Creamy milk frother
SL-7007.description: 4 smart operating modes at the push of a button: hot and thick whipping, hot and gentle whipping, cold whipping and milk heating only; Working speed: whipping and heating from a cold state in only about 60 seconds; Extremely quiet operation; automatic shutdown mechanism at the end of the operation; LED indicator light to monitor the work status; Ergonomic handle and non-slip feet for increased stability.

V15s Detect Submarine.name: Vacuum cleaner with accessories
V15s Detect Submarine.description: The V15s Detect Submarine is an integrated wireless vacuum cleaner that allows dry vacuuming and wet washing in one device. Capabilities include: Submarine wet roller head that cleans wet dirt and tough stains; Fluffy Optic brush with a green light beam that detects invisible dust; Digital Motorbar brush that adapts itself to types of floors and prevents hair tangling; Piezo sensor that measures and counts dust particles in real time to display proof of cleanliness on the LCD screen.

STAGE.name: Music station with clock and radio
STAGE.description: Wireless music streaming from any smartphone or tablet. Digital FM radio with automatic scanning and storage of up to 20 stations in memory. Dual alarm clock that allows you to set two separate alarms. Possibility to choose a wake-up sound between a radio and a buzzer. Sleep timer function for automatic shutdown and snooze function. Charging mobile devices directly from the device using the built-in USB socket.

V11 SV28.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with accessories
V11 SV28.description: Built-in LCD display that displays real-time performance, remaining work time and maintenance alerts; Motorbar brush that includes De-tangle technology to prevent hair from tangling around the brush automatically; A dynamic load sensor (DLS) that detects resistance and synchronizes the suction power between carpets and floors (in Auto mode); Emptying a hygienic container using the 'point and shoot' method; Quick switch to manual vacuum mode for cleaning narrow places or a car.

GEN5 DT ABSOLUTE SV23.name: Charged vacuum cleaner
GEN5 DT ABSOLUTE SV23.description: Hyperdymium motor that rotates at a speed of 135,000 rpm; Fluffy Optic technology that illuminates microscopic dust; Piezo sensor that measures and counts dust particles in real time and automatically adjusts the suction power; LCD screen that shows performance, working time and distribution of sampled particles; Digital Motorbar cleaning head with De-tangle technology to prevent hair entanglement; Quick conversion to manual vacuum cleaner with built-in corner accessory and rails in the vacuum cleaner body.

HRT-8.name: Suitcase turntable with built-in stereo speakers
HRT-8.description: A portable suitcase turntable with a retro design that allows playing records of all sizes; includes built-in stereo speakers for independent listening without the need for an amplifier; Bluetooth (In) connectivity for streaming music from smart devices directly to the turntable's speakers; Auto-Stop function for automatically stopping the rotation of the plate at the end of the record; Compact design with carrying handle and clip closure for maximum safety and portability.

V15 Detect Absolute New SV47.name: Rechargeable cordless vacuum cleaner
V15 Detect Absolute New SV47.description: lighting technology that detects invisible dust on hard floors; The Piezo sensor continuously measures and counts the dust particles and automatically increases the suction power when necessary; LCD display showing scientific proof of thorough cleaning and remaining working time; Digital Motorbar brush with De-tangle technology to prevent hair tangling; removable battery at the push of a button; Hygienic emptying of the tank using the 'shoot and forget' method.

P-21.name: Wireless amplifier
P-21.description: Wireless audio streaming from any Bluetooth-enabled device (smartphone, tablet); Professional sound amplification to improve the home audio experience; Possibility of simultaneous connection of up to 4 line audio sources; Extremely compact design that allows easy integration in small living spaces or on shelves.

RD-20.name: Radio Kiss FM-AM
RD-20.description: reception of high quality AM and FM radio broadcasts; Full mobility that allows use on trips, picnics or emergencies; Simple and user-friendly operation without the need for complex settings; option for private listening through headphones; Compact and durable structure adapted for convenient transportation.

RF2400D.name: FM-AM radio
RF2400D.description: A portable radio with a classic design that offers stable analog reception in FM and AM frequencies. The device includes a large and particularly clear frequency panel that allows for easy and precise tuning. A unique feature is a fluorescent dial that enables frequency detection even in dark conditions. The built-in speaker with a diameter of 10 cm provides loud and clear audio. The device includes an ergonomic carrying handle that allows easy portability, and the possibility of connecting headphones for personal listening.

AQUEOUS.name: Portable speaker
AQUEOUS.description: A powerful portable Bluetooth speaker intended for use in outdoor conditions and in a water environment. Supports TWS (True Wireless Stereo) technology that allows wireless connection of two speakers of the same model to create a surround stereo system. Includes a built-in microphone for hands-free calls (speakerphone), a hardened design for shock resistance, and a dedicated carrying strap. Provides crystal sound with deep and dynamic bass.

SC-NT10.name: Portable speaker
SC-NT10.description: A portable wireless speaker from the 'Tough' series designed for use in harsh outdoor conditions. Includes water resistance to the IPX4 standard (splash resistant), dust resistance, resistance to shocks and falls (tested in a fall from a height of 76 cm), and resistance to low temperatures (down to minus 10 degrees Celsius). The device includes a built-in microphone for conducting phone calls (hands-free) and 'Boost' technology to increase the volume in a noisy outdoor environment.

HARMONY.name: Music station with clock and radio for Apple products
HARMONY.description: Fast charging and music playback from Apple devices with a Lightning connection; the possibility of charging two devices at the same time (one in the dock and one through the USB connection); digital FM radio that includes automatic scanning and storage of up to 20 stations in memory; A dual alarm clock function (Dual Alarm) that allows you to wake up to beeping sounds (BUZZ), radio or music from the iPhone; sleep mode (Sleep Mode) for scheduled automatic shutdown; Full control of all functions via the included IR remote control; Sound with Hi-Fi technology adapted to small spaces such as bedrooms and offices.

DVBT-2 H.264 X-TUNER.name: A digital converter supports Idan+
DVBT-2 H.264 X-TUNER.description: Receiving TV and radio channels of the 'Idan Plus' array without subscription fees. Program recording (PVR) on an external portable memory. Time Shift function that allows stopping and playing of live broadcasts. Built-in media player that supports popular formats (MKV, AVI, MP3, JPEG). Electronic broadcast schedule (EPG) in full Hebrew. Multilingual user menu (OSD) including Hebrew. Automatic and manual channel scanning. Managing a list of favorite channels and parental lock.

BT-360.name: DVBT-2 home antenna
BT-360.description: Active internal antenna designed to receive Idan Plus broadcasts in the DVB-T2 standard. The device includes a built-in amplifier to improve signal quality even in challenging reception areas. Full support for Full HD and 4K broadcasts. Compact and thin design that allows visible or hidden placement near the TV. Simple installation using the Plug & Play method without the need for complex settings.

AV-1040.name: 5 channel amplifier
AV-1040.description: A receiver for home cinema that allows the creation of a surround sound system; Ability to work as an external sound card directly connected to a computer without the need for device drivers; Management of multiple audio sources using a front input selector with LED indicators; energy-efficient design that allows prolonged work at low temperature; Separate volume control for the MP3 input (on the back of the device).

AV-105-BT.name: Submersible music amplifier
AV-105-BT.description: A wall-mounted audio system that includes a built-in amplifier; Bluetooth connectivity for wireless music streaming from mobile devices; Media player supports MP3, WMA, WAV, MP4, AVI formats; USB and SD memory card inputs for direct playback; Friendly user interface that includes a digital display; Includes a remote control for full remote control; An external power adapter and terminal connection accessories are included in the case.

CL7400 OP.name: Wireless headphones for TV
CL7400 OP.description: Wireless headphones specially designed for the hard of hearing with extremely powerful amplification; includes a digital optical input for connecting to smart TVs; Option to adjust treble and bass (Treble/Bass) in a range of +/-10 decibels; Built-in balance control to control the volume between the right and left ear; Foldable and lightweight design that allows for easy storage and portability; automatic shutdown mechanism after 4 minutes without a signal to save battery; support for connecting several headphones at the same time to the same transmission base; Padded ear cushions for noise isolation and prolonged comfort

B50.name: Blu Tos streaming amplifier
B50.description: An integrated stereo amplifier that combines two-way Bluetooth streaming and transmission capabilities (Transmitter & Receiver), which allows streaming from the smartphone to passive speakers or transmission from any audio source (including turntable and TV) to two pairs of Bluetooth headphones at the same time (Dual Link). The device includes an HDMI ARC input for direct connection to the TV with control via the TV remote control (CEC), a built-in preamplifier for turntables (Phono Stage), and support for the GO CONTROL application for managing EQ settings and remote control. In addition, there is support for the ACPWorkbench software for professional and advanced sound tuning.

BKH500.name: Wireless headphones for TV
BKH500.description: The headphones enable private listening to television in high audio quality (Crystal Clear) without discernible latency. The system includes a docking station that serves as both a transmitter and a fast charging stand. Volume control is located directly on the earpiece for maximum comfort. The installation is a Plug & Play method without the need for complicated settings. Full compatibility with most types of televisions, including modern models with an optical port.

RD-37.name: Manual rechargeable radio with flashlight
RD-37.description: A versatile portable emergency radio designed for use in field conditions, power outages and emergency situations. The device allows reception of radio broadcasts in wide ranges, serves as a powerful flashlight, and includes a Power Bank function for charging cellular devices in emergencies. Includes a built-in siren (SOS Alarm) to call for help. The dynamo mechanism and the solar panel ensure activity even without an available power source.

RT-110B.name: FM radio with alarm clock and Bluetooth
RT-110B.description: Built-in MP3 player for playing music from external memory devices, built-in FM radio, Bluetooth connectivity for wireless audio streaming, digital clock functions including alarm clock and date display, wired connection option (AUX), high portability thanks to rechargeable battery and compact design.

CK-5545.name: Alarm clock radio with LED display and wall clock projector
CK-5545.description: A dual alarm clock that allows you to set two different wake-up times. Possibility to choose a wake-up sound between a radio and a buzzer. Snooze function to delay the alarm for a few minutes. The Sleep Timer function that allows you to fall asleep with the radio on will automatically turn off after a set time. The time projection can be set at a comfortable angle for viewing from the bed.

ATL-0011.name: CLASSIC ironing board
ATL-0011.description: The metal mesh structure allows the free passage of steam to prevent liquid accumulation and improve ironing results; Suitable for use with both steam irons and dry irons; A safety opening and closing mechanism that allows for convenient flat folding for compact storage at home; High stability that prevents vibrations while working.

Y100.name: Steam cleaning device
Y100.description: A multifunctional cleaning device that works with dry steam technology for disinfection and deep cleaning without chemicals; Killing 99.9% of germs and bacteria; suitable for a wide variety of surfaces including tiles, windows, mirrors, stoves, and upholstery; The device comes with a set of accessories that includes brushes of different sizes, a pressure concentration nozzle, and a window wiper; Lightweight ergonomic design that allows for prolonged work without effort.

FN101EUGY CRISPI.name: Hot air fryer with glass bowl (3.8+1.4 liters)
FN101EUGY CRISPI.description: A multifunctional 4-in-1 cooking system that includes: Air Fry, Roast, ReCrisp and Keep Warm. The device is equipped with TempWare glass bowls resistant to temperature changes (Thermal Shock Resistant) that allow full visual monitoring of the cooking process without opening the device. The system allows cooking without toxic substances (PFAS/PTFE-free) and is suitable for preparation, serving and storage in one vessel. Extremely easy cleaning - the glass bowls, storage lids and crisper plates are dishwasher safe. Saves energy by up to 50% compared to a normal oven.

RT47CG6006S9.name: Refrigerator top freezer 470 liters stainless steel
RT47CG6006S9.description: SpaceMax technology that allows for thinner walls for maximum utilization of the interior space without compromising energy efficiency. A smart Digital Inverter compressor that maintains a stable temperature, saves electricity and is extremely quiet. All-Around Cooling system that cools every corner of the refrigerator uniformly. Power Cool function for quick cooling of food and beverages. Optimal Fresh+ drawer for keeping meat and fish fresh for a long time. No Frost technology to prevent ice accumulation. Economical internal LED lighting.

AF183.name: Hot air fryer + food drying
AF183.description: The device includes 6 smart cooking programs: 1. Max Crisp - for quick preparation of frozen ingredients at 240 degrees. 2. Air Fry (hot air frying) - for healthy frying with up to 75% less fat compared to deep frying. 3. Roast - for browning and uniform roasting of meat and vegetables. 4. Bake - for making breads, cakes and pastries. 5. Reheat (reheating) - to return the crispness to cooked food. 6. Dehydrate (food drying) - for preparing dried fruits and meat snacks while maintaining the nutritional values. The removable parts of the device are safe to wash in the dishwasher.

CRR9143911.name: epilator
CRR9143911.description: 2 in 1 device for hair removal and shaving; Effective hair removal from the root for results that last for several weeks; two customizable speed levels (gentle/fast); Built-in LED lighting to illuminate the treatment area and identify extremely fine hairs; removable heads that allow easy cleaning under running water; Travel locking mechanism for maximum safety.

AVZ-4200.name: 4 zone amplifier
AVZ-4200.description: A multi-zone stereo amplifier that allows separate control of the volume in 4 different audio zones; Bluetooth connectivity for wireless music streaming from any supporting device; built-in FM radio with automatic scanning and memory for up to 40 stations; Built-in MP3 player for direct playback from USB or SD card; Sound control that includes tuning buttons for Bass, Treble and Master Volume; Two microphone inputs with Echo effect control and separate volume, suitable for announcement or karaoke uses; Includes a full remote control for convenient remote operation.

AVZ-6300.name: 6 zone amplifier
AVZ-6300.description: Public Address amplifier and professional background music designed for installations in businesses, restaurants, offices and public institutions. The device enables the management of a multi-zone audio system with full control over the volume level in each room or space separately. The amplifier combines a multi-purpose multimedia player that includes Bluetooth and radio, alongside advanced announcement capabilities with a microphone that allows control over the effects and volume.

ES-ED20.name: epilator
ES-ED20.description: Epilation device with Wet/Dry technology that allows use on dry or wet skin (including the use of foam/soap) to reduce pain. The device includes a flexible head (pivot head) that moves at an angle of up to 60 degrees for maximum adaptation to the contours of the body. The double disc system ensures effective hair removal already on the first pass, even for short and thin hairs. Includes a built-in LED light to illuminate the treatment area and an ergonomic design for a comfortable grip.

SE7-561.name: epilator
SE7-561.description: 100% water resistant (Wet & Dry) for safe use in the bath or shower to reduce the feeling of pain. A high frequency massage system that stimulates the skin for a more comfortable experience. The device includes 6 attachments: shaving head, trimmer cover (clippers), massage cover, cover for sensitive areas, face cover and cover for maximum efficiency. The device combines epilation and full electric shaving by changing heads, and provides smooth skin for up to 4 weeks.

PHS5263.name: hair straightener
PHS5263.description: Quattro-Ion technology: a revolutionary ionization system with 4 ion ports that produces an extremely strong ion current to reduce static electricity, giving 3D shine and making hair look flexible and healthy; An innovative red lighting strip that lights up when the ionization function is active; Uniform heat distribution on the plates to prevent heat damage and gentle styling of the hair; Versatile design option: suitable for both smooth gliding and creating curls and waves; The wide plates significantly shorten the working time on long, thick or unruly hair.

Pro Ceramic Extra S5525.name: hair straightener
Pro Ceramic Extra S5525.description: The straightener was specially designed for long, thick or curly hair thanks to the wide plates that allow the capture of larger groups of hair at a time and shorten the styling time. Includes a Temperature Boost function to quickly reach the maximum temperature and a temperature lock function to prevent accidental changes during use. The kit includes a heat-resistant carrying case for safe storage immediately after use.

CRR FIT-27.name: hair straightener
CRR FIT-27.description: For more information about the hair straightener and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

NOV3600.name: Hair dryer 2000 watts
NOV3600.description: fast and powerful hair drying; Possibility to customize the air and heat intensity (4 degrees of heat and 2 speeds); Cold air flow button to fix the hair design and prevent static electricity; A removable filter that allows simple cleaning and maintenance to extend the life of the device; Ergonomic design optimized for comfortable grip and prolonged use.

5555 Gamma Piu GOLD.name: Hair dryer 2500 watts gold
5555 Gamma Piu GOLD.description: A professional hair dryer that includes 6 heat and speed levels; Tormalionic technology (a combination of tourmaline and ions) that gives shine and reduces static electricity; Double heating element (Double wave) to maintain uniform heat; A heat insulated barrel (Cold Barrel) that allows a safe grip on the body of the dryer without fear of burns; Cold air release button; removable rear filter for cleaning; Comes with 2 air concentration nozzles (one extra narrow for sliding); Especially suitable for keratin treatments thanks to the high temperature.

5555 Gamma Piu BLACK.name: Hair dryer 2500 watts black
5555 Gamma Piu BLACK.description: Professional hair dryer designed for keratin treatments and styling thick and rebellious hair; Super Heat technology that produces particularly powerful heat; Double waved heating element to maintain a high and constant temperature throughout use; A heat insulated barrel (Cold Barrel) that allows a comfortable grip on the body of the dryer without the risk of burns; Extra narrow mouth for a targeted smoothing effect; A tourmaline-coated grill that ionizes the air to prevent static electricity and add shine to the hair; Includes 6 temperature and speed combinations.

5555 Gamma Piu TITANIUM.name: Hair dryer 2500 watts silver
5555 Gamma Piu TITANIUM.description: Tormalionic technology (a combination of tourmaline and ions) that gives hair vitality, shine and a healthier look while reducing static electricity; A heating element with a double wave that maintains a high and uniform temperature throughout the air flow; Especially suitable for quick drying after keratin treatments thanks to the high level of heat; 'Cold Barrel' feature - special thermal insulation that allows you to grip the body of the dryer itself without the risk of burns; Extremely narrow nozzle for a perfect smoothing effect even on the most stubborn hair; Ergonomic design that reduces strain on the wrist.

ESE-1018 TRAVEL PRO.name: Mini hair dryer for trips 220 watts
ESE-1018 TRAVEL PRO.description: Compact and lightweight hair dryer specially designed for trips and travels; A powerful motor (1000 watts) relative to its size that ensures fast drying; ability to work at different voltages (110/220 volts) using a manual selector that allows safe use all over the world; The option of folding the handle allows convenient storage in a suitcase or backpack without taking up significant volume; Includes design accessories (diffuser and air center) that provide versatility similar to a regular home hair dryer.

ESE-4800.name: Hair dryer 2400 watts black
ESE-4800.description: A powerful hair dryer designed for professional use in hair salons as well as for intensive home use. The device is characterized by extremely fast drying thanks to the powerful AC motor, ergonomics adapted to a comfortable grip over time, and flexibility in styling the hair (smooth face or drying curls) using the attached nozzles and diffuser.

ESE-7000.name: Hair dryer 2650 watts black
ESE-7000.description: The hair dryer Sassonic ESE-7000 is considered one of the most powerful models in the series, designed both for hairdressers and for intensive home use. The device provides high wind power for extremely fast drying, while protecting the hair fiber. The professional engine allows continuous work for a long time without overheating, and the aerodynamic design ensures quiet operation relative to its power.

FP-J30H-B.name: Air purifier in spaces up to 23 square meters
FP-J30H-B.description: Active neutralization of viruses, bacteria, mold spores and odors using positive and negative ions. HAZE mode that activates the device at maximum power in the first 60 minutes for quick cleaning of air pollution and particles. HEPA filtration system designed to capture allergens, fine dust and cigarette smoke. Extremely quiet operation suitable for use in bedrooms and children's rooms. Built-in shutdown timer (4 or 8 hours). Indicator light for the plasma-cluster mode.

EL-07A.name: Pressing toaster 2 sandwich slices
EL-07A.description: making 2 sandwiches at the same time using the pressing method; Suitable for toasting different types of bread, sandwiches and basic toasting; Includes a locking clip to create uniform pressure during roasting; Easy to clean plates by wiping; Compact design that allows for vertical storage to save space on the kitchen counter or in the closet.

HEM-108.name: Pressing toaster 2 sandwich slices
HEM-108.description: Press toaster (grill) designed for making 2 sandwiches at the same time; Suitable for toasting bread, making sandwiches and light grilling; The grill plates include professional-looking burn marks; The device was designed for economical vertical storage on the counter or in the cabinet; Very easy to clean thanks to the non-stick grilling surfaces.

ATL-556.name: Hanging mosquito killer black
ATL-556.description: An electronic mosquito killer designed for the effective elimination of mosquitoes and flying insects. The device works by attracting the insects to the UV light and killing them in contact with the internal electrical grid. Includes a removable lower drawer for simple collection and cleaning of the insects, a dense external protection net for user safety and a built-in on/off switch. Suitable for indoor use in homes, offices and outdoor balconies.

TCG3302.name: Pressing toaster 4 slices with removable plates black-stainless steel
TCG3302.description: A 3-in-1 device that allows three working modes: a pressing grill (closed) for making toasts, an open tabletop grill (180 degrees) for grilling meat and fish, and a 'baking' mode with an elevation of the top plate for heating pizzas and pastries; Removable, double-sided grilling plates that can be washed in the dishwasher; fat drainage channels for healthy and low-fat cooking; vertical storage option to save space; Adjustable upper hinge adapted to the thickness of the food.

TCG3323.name: Pressing toaster 4 slices with removable plates black
TCG3323.description: A 3-in-1 device that allows three working modes: pressing mode (for sandwiches and meat), open grill mode (180 degrees for grilling on a double surface) and 'oven' mode (elevated upper plate for creaming and heating); Adjustable floating hinge that allows uniform cooking even for particularly thick foods; A fat drainage system that includes drainage channels and two dedicated collection trays for healthy, low-fat cooking; double-sided grill plates (grooved side); vertical storage option to save space in the kitchen; Extremely fast heating and maintaining constant heat for a long time.

SP-GT2022.name: Pressing toaster 4 slices
SP-GT2022.description: Large preparation volume suitable for 4 slices at the same time; Dual functionality: a press toaster for making sandwiches and an open grill for grilling meat, fish and vegetables; Efficient fat drainage using a removable fluid collection tray; Heat-insulated ergonomic handle for user safety; Safety lock for convenient storage; Suitable for making thick toasts, focaccia and borax.

HEM-1361.name: Pressing toaster 6 slices silver
HEM-1361.description: A multi-purpose press grill toaster designed for making sandwiches, toasting bread and roasting meats and vegetables. The device includes a handle that is cold to the touch (Cool Touch) for the safety of the user, the possibility of a full opening of 180 degrees for use as an open tabletop grill, and a locking mechanism that allows storage while standing to save space. The grill plates have deep stripes for a professional grill look and efficient fat drainage.

MAF671B1.name: Pot for frying in hot air 7.2 liters black
MAF671B1.description: Air Frying technology for fast cooking up to 65% and energy savings of up to 70% compared to a normal oven; 8 built-in automatic programs: French fries, meat, chicken, fish, vegetables, small pastries, bread and a keep-warm function (up to 30 minutes at 80 degrees); A transparent viewing window and internal lighting that allow monitoring of the food without opening the drawer; Shake alert (sound and indicator light) to mix the food for uniform crispiness; Safety: automatic delay mechanism when pulling out the basket and protection against overheating; Cleaning: removable drawer and frying grid with non-stick coating, suitable for washing in the dishwasher.

ARTMIX CR.name: Stand mixer with bowl 7.3 liters cream
ARTMIX CR.description: A planetary mixing system that guarantees full coverage of the bowl and uniform mixing results. Ability to work with large amounts of dough (up to about 3 kg of dough). Electronic speed regulator that maintains constant power even under high load. The device is suitable for whipping, kneading and mixing a variety of pastries and desserts. Includes a protection mechanism against overheating and a non-slip base for maximum stability on the work surface.

ARTMIX BL.name: Stand mixer with bowl 7.3 liters black
ARTMIX BL.description: Processing capacity: capable of kneading up to 3 kg of dough at the same time. Built-in programs: including automatic programs for mixing, whipping and soft dough for optimal adaptation to the type of food. Work flexibility: possibility of full manual work or use of automatic programs. Safety: a protection mechanism that stops the device automatically when the mixer head is lifted, and rubber feet at the base to prevent displacement. Accessories: kneading hook, whisk balloon and accessory for soft dough made of stainless steel (durable in the dishwasher), as well as a Teflon-coated ladle accessory with silicone edges.

MUMS6ZS00.name: Stand mixer with 55 liter black-stainless steel bowl
MUMS6ZS00.description: SensorControl Plus technology: automatic programs that detect the perfect texture of whipped cream, egg whites and yeast dough and stop the device at the optimal time. Smart tool detection: a sensor that detects the connected accessory and limits the maximum speed to prevent mistakes and protect the device. EasyArm Lift: easy and convenient lifting of the central arm with one push of a button. Ability to knead large amounts of dough (up to 3.5 kg of cake dough or 1.5 kg of flour plus ingredients for yeast dough). A protection mechanism against overheating and increased safety that includes locking accessories.

63584-IS-BL.name: Stand mixer with 8 liter light blue bowl
63584-IS-BL.description: The mixer is designed for strenuous work and is capable of kneading large amounts of dough (up to about 2 kg of flour); suitable for whipping egg whites and whipped creams at high speed; mixing heavy mixtures for cakes and cookies; maximum stability on the surface thanks to the weight of the body and silicone feet; overload protection mechanism to protect the motor.

63585BI-IS.name: Stand mixer with bowl 8 liters cream
63585BI-IS.description: The mixer is designed for massive work and is suitable for preparing large amounts of dough (up to about 3 kg of dough) and mass; the ability to quickly whip egg whites and whipped creams; knead heavy yeast doughs, bread and pizza dough without effort; an internal overload protection system that protects the motor; a tilt-head mechanism that allows easy access to the bowl and quick replacement of accessories; vacuum feet at the bottom of the device to prevent movement on the work surface.

DSM5650.name: Stand mixer with bowl 6 liters black
DSM5650.description: A professional mixer from the PRO series designed for hard work. Able to knead up to 2 kg of flour (3 kg of dough) thanks to the DC motor that maintains constant power even under load. Extremely quiet operation compared to mixers with an AC motor. Includes a planetary mixing system for uniform whipping and mixing results. The device is suitable for making bread doughs, pizza, cakes and protein whipped creams and resistant whipped creams.

KREM DSM5755.name: Stand mixer with 7 liter bowl + cream meat grinder accessory
KREM DSM5755.description: The mixer is designed for intensive work and is capable of kneading up to 3 kg of dough (about 2 kg of flour); A planetary mixing method that ensures efficient collection of the ingredients from the sides of the bowl; Professional meat grinder accessory installed on the front of the device; Comes with three accessories: a kneading hook for dough, a guitar accessory for mixing and a balloon whisk; Suitable for whipping egg whites, making creams, mixing cake mixes and kneading heavy yeast doughs.

SC-NA10.name: Portable speaker with Nartic
SC-NA10.description: A portable wireless stereo speaker designed for outdoor and indoor use; Includes a fancy protective net that also serves as an adjustable stand for maximum stability; A built-in speakerphone that allows you to manage phone calls directly from the speaker; Support for high-quality codecs (aptX) for audio transmission without quality loss in Bluetooth; An external charging function that allows the speaker to be used as a backup battery for smartphones in emergency situations.

DSM5755.name: Stand mixer with 7 liter bowl + black meat grinder accessory
DSM5755.description: The mixer is capable of handling large amounts of dough (up to 2-3 kg of dough, depending on the liquid level) and is designed for intensive kneading of bread, challah and pizza doughs. The quiet motor allows work in a home environment without interruption. The included meat grinder accessory turns the device into a food processing center that allows grinding fresh meat, fish and vegetables. The timer display allows the user to set an accurate working time to obtain consistent results in baking.

PILLAR.name: Portable speaker
PILLAR.description: A portable bluetooth speaker in a pillar design that includes variable decorative LED lighting. The device supports TWS (True Wireless Stereo) technology that allows two speakers of the same model to be connected to one audio source for powerful stereophonic sound. Includes a built-in carrying handle for maximum comfort on the go, the option to use it as a karaoke kit using the microphone input, and an internal MP3 player for playing files directly from external storage devices.

NARA1.name: Small portable speaker
NARA1.description: IP65 water and dust resistance suitable for outdoor use. Colorful RGB LED lighting with variable effects. Built-in FM radio includes automatic station scanning and saving. Built-in MP3 player via USB and memory card (TF) inputs. AUX input (3.5 mm) for wired connection. Attached carrying strap for maximum portability.

NARA3.name: Portable speaker
NARA3.description: A portable and powerful Bluetooth speaker with a modern design; TWS (True Wireless Stereo) technology that allows the connection of two speakers of the same model to create a stereo experience; dynamic RGB lighting on top of the woofer; built-in carrying handle for maximum comfort; Support for phone calls (Hands-free) thanks to a built-in microphone; Rich sound with an emphasis on deep bass sounds.

BILTMORE.name: Retro style portable speaker
BILTMORE.description: A portable Bluetooth speaker with a classic retro design that combines a vintage look with modern technology. Allows playing MP3 files directly from external devices, including a built-in FM radio with automatic scanning. Equipped with a designed leather-like carrying handle for maximum comfort on the go. The sound is characterized by depth and clarity thanks to a wooden sound box and manual controls that allow for personal adjustment of the sound quality.

EDGEWATER.name: Retro style portable speaker
EDGEWATER.description: The EDGEWATER speaker combines a classic retro design with a wood-like finish with modern technology. It allows playing music from a variety of sources (wireless, wired or external media) and includes a built-in FM radio. The speaker is equipped with physical control buttons at the top for switching between songs, volume control and changing playback modes. Ideal for use at home, in the office or as a decorative item that provides high-quality and powerful sound.
