NARA2.name: Portable speaker with microphone and remote control
NARA2.description: A portable party speaker that includes dynamic LED 'Flame Lighting' on the entire front of the speaker; Support for TWS (True Wireless Stereo) technology for wireless connection of two speakers of the same model to one stereo system; Full karaoke function that includes an attached wireless microphone; recording on an external device; Separate control of volume, bass and treble; Built-in carrying handle for easy portability; A remote control is attached for full remote control.

AHY-60C.name: Heats 60 stainless steel cups with a flat lid
AHY-60C.description: automatic transfer mechanism to the 'keep warm' mode after boiling; Safety water faucet to prevent leaks and drips; transparent external water gauge for checking the liquid level; thermal protection that disconnects the device in case of dry boiling (without water); control lights for the 'boiling' and 'keep warm' modes; A design that allows comfortable use on Shabbat (subject to model-specific halachic approval).

ATL-1068.name: 30 cups of fancy water
ATL-1068.description: Shabbat mode: approved for use on Shabbat by the CMT Institute (continuous heat retention without thermostat operation); Safety: a protection mechanism that automatically disconnects the device in the absence of water, a reinforced dual-purpose faucet (measured or continuous pouring), and heat-insulated handles; Kosher: exemption from dipping with the approval of KGC KOSHER; Design: ROUGH COATING finish to maintain the appearance and durability over time, including a transparent external water gauge.

ATL-234.name: A fancy round "Chef Master" pan
ATL-234.description: The pan is designed for a wide variety of culinary operations including frying, cooking, roasting, steaming and baking a variety of foods (meat, fish, vegetables, pastas, etc.). Thanks to the detachable thermostat, the food can be served directly to the table inside the pan after disconnecting from the electricity. The device enables quick and energy-saving preparation compared to normal stoves, and easy and quick cleaning thanks to the non-stick coating.

SVC216FMLW.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with accessories
SVC216FMLW.description: A 2-in-1 vacuum cleaner that combines a cordless stick vacuum cleaner and a removable manual vacuum cleaner; Electric turbo brush with independent motor and front LED lighting to detect dust in dark corners; HEPA filtration system that filters up to 99.95% of dust particles; Freestyle Move technology that allows flexible movement of 180 degrees; Folding handle for compact and convenient storage; Hygienic emptying of the tank with one push of a button.

MUM5XW10.name: Mixer with bowl combined with weight 1000 watts white
MUM5XW10.description: Preparation of yeast dough (up to 1.9 kg of dough) and cake mixes (up to 2.7 kg); Accurate weighing of ingredients directly inside the device to save on measuring tools; EasyArmLift mechanism for easy lifting of the arm at the push of a button; LED display for weight and time; Includes a set of professional baking accessories (kneading hook, adjustable whisk and stirrer with a silicone tip); An open food processor includes 4 discs for cutting, spreading and scraping; A dedicated storage bag for accessories that fits inside the bowl to save space.

ATL-237.name: Deep "Chef Master" pan
ATL-237.description: The pan is designed for multipurpose uses in the kitchen such as frying, grilling, cooking, steaming and baking. Thanks to its depth, it is particularly suitable for preparing large dishes, pastas, fish and meats. The device allows direct serving to the table after disconnecting the power regulator, and keeps the food warm for a long time.

MUM59N26CB.name: Mixer with bowl 1000 watts black
MUM59N26CB.description: The MUM5 HomeProfessional series mixer includes a unique eight-shaped mixing technology for optimal whipping and kneading. Includes an EasyArmLift arm for easy lifting of the mixer head at the push of a button; automatic standby mode that places the kneading attachments at the back of the bowl for easy filling; LED display to indicate operation and faults; protection against overheating and overload; Includes a set of professional baking accessories (metal whisk, guitar hook with silicone tips, kneading hook), open food processor with 4 discs (spread, scraper, burner and pancake disc), and accessory bag for convenient storage.

(60SJ401(B.name: Gas stove 60 cm black enamel (6728)
(60SJ401(B.description: The product provides a classic and durable cooking solution with an emphasis on operational comfort and maximum safety. The black enamel surface gives an elegant look and ease of cleaning food residues and grease. The diverse structure of the burners allows adaptation to different types of cookware, from quick boiling to slow cooking on low heat. The side buttons move the control away from the front heat source and provide a comfortable working space.

B7303BW.name: Device for making Belgian waffles 1400 watts
B7303BW.description: Fast and efficient preparation of up to 4 Belgian waffle units at the same time; The high power that ensures fast heating of the surfaces; even distribution of heat that gives a crunchy (crispy) texture on the outside and soft on the inside; Simple maintenance thanks to a coating that prevents stuck food residues; Suitable for intensive home use for preparing desserts and hospitality dishes.

SL-30.name: Toaster oven 30 liters black
SL-30.description: The product includes 5 operating modes to choose from: upper grill, lower grill, combined, and turbo mode (Convection) for uniform heat distribution that enables professional baking and cooking. The device is equipped with internal lighting that allows monitoring the state of the food and a catalytic internal coating (Self-Clean) for easy self-cleaning. Additional accessories: two baking pans, a grill grid and a removable tray for collecting crumbs.

BGS7POW1.name: Trailed vacuum cleaner
BGS7POW1.description: Series 8 ProPower bagless trailed vacuum cleaner designed for extremely powerful performance; SelfClean system (RotationClean) for automatic self-cleaning of the filter without manual contact; QuattroPower system for excellent cleaning results with low energy consumption; turbo brush for deep cleaning of carpets; Electronic power control using a rotary selector; Telescopic rod with lock; Includes a set of accessories: upholstery nozzle, crevice nozzle and turbo brush.

SC4540.name: Trailed vacuum cleaner
SC4540.description: Samsung's unique Twin Chamber system separates the dust container into two spaces, which allows for improved air flow and maintaining high suction power over time by separating the larger dust particles from the air. The device includes an advanced HEPA filter designed for allergy sufferers, which ensures the emission of clean air into the room. The vacuum cleaner is designed in a compact and lightweight way that allows easy maneuvering between furniture, and includes rubber coated wheels to protect floors and parquets from scratches. Emptying the dust container is carried out in a hygienic and simple way with one push of a button.

XB2123/09.name: Trailed vacuum cleaner
XB2123/09.description: Philips 2000 series bagless trailed vacuum cleaner that offers high suction power and durable performance. The device is equipped with PowerCyclone 4 technology that accelerates the airflow in the cyclone chamber to separate the dust from the air and maintain power over time. The multi-purpose brush can be adjusted with a foot pedal for a comfortable transition between hard floors and carpets, and guarantees the collection of up to 99.9% of the fine dust. The dust container has been designed for hygienic emptying with one hand to minimize dust clouds. The device is compact, lightweight and includes a crevice tool built into the vacuum body for quick access.

BD530.name: Freezer 419 liters white
BD530.description: The freezer offers a particularly large storage volume with internal LED lighting for quick identification of the products. It is equipped with an external handle that includes a lock and key to secure the contents, a front drain hole for convenient emptying of water during defrosting and cleaning, and 4 wheels at the bottom that allow easy movement of the device despite its size. The device operates relatively quietly and includes thick insulation to keep the cold out.

PR50W.name: Office mini bar fridge with 50 liter sealed white
PR50W.description: A mini-bar refrigerator in a compact cube design, intended for offices, guest rooms and student residences. Includes a small internal freezer compartment for short-term storage of frozen products. Sealed door with the possibility of changing the opening direction (right/left). Equipped with an adjustable thermostat for cold degrees. Includes a removable internal mesh shelf for optimal storage space utilization, an extremely quiet compressor and adjustable legs for balance and stability.

PR50B.name: Office mini bar fridge with 50 liters sealed black
PR50B.description: A compact mini-bar refrigerator designed for offices and guest rooms; includes a small internal freezer compartment for making ice cubes; adjustable thermostat that allows control of the cooling intensity; Sealed door (Solid Door) for maximum temperature maintenance and energy saving; possibility to reverse the door opening direction; Removable internal mesh shelves; Adjustable legs for stability and vibration prevention.

BD280.name: White 212 liter horizontal freezer
BD280.description: Fast freezing function to maintain the freshness of the food and its nutritional values. Includes a removable internal storage basket for accessible organization of small products. Safety locking mechanism with key and ergonomic external handle for easy lifting. High mobility using 4 built-in wheels at the bottom of the device. A front drain hole that facilitates the process of cleaning and defrosting the device. Quiet and powerful operation suitable for home or business use.

PR93B.name: Retro designed office refrigerator 84 liters black color
PR93B.description: Rounded retro design with external opening handle in chrome finish; Includes a special internal cooling/cooling chamber; The interior of the refrigerator is white with 2 tempered glass shelves and a transparent drawer for fruits and vegetables; possibility to change the door opening direction; adjustable mechanical temperature control; A designed and compact storage solution suitable for offices, bedrooms or accommodation units.

PR96VB.name: Mini bar fridge with showcase 99 liters
PR96VB.description: Showcase refrigerator in a fancy black design that includes a transparent double glass door. Internal division including 4 shelves (including a dedicated shelf for wines) and a transparent fruit and vegetable drawer at the bottom. Equipped with internal LED lighting for maximum exposure of the contents. Hidden handles (integral) for a clean look. Especially adapted to the Israeli climate (Class T/ST) and suitable for use in offices, guest rooms and businesses.

PR93CR.name: Retro designed office refrigerator 84 liters cream color
PR93CR.description: Office refrigerator designed in a retro retro style with rounded corners. Includes an adjustable thermostat that allows precise temperature control. The interior of the refrigerator is equipped with 2 removable tempered glass shelves, a transparent vegetable and fruit drawer, and built-in storage shelves in the door suitable for large bottles and cans. Includes internal LED lighting and an external opening handle in a luxurious chrome design.

D700 Pro.name: washing machine
D700 Pro.description: 3 in 1 device: vacuums, washes and wipes in one operation; A smart dirt sensor that adjusts the suction power and the amount of water automatically; A complete self-cleaning system that includes brush washing and air drying to prevent odors and bacteria; Brush design that allows cleaning edges and corners (Edge Cleaning); voice notifications about the device's status (full tank/low battery); Complete separation between clean and dirty water for maximum hygienic efficiency.

M600.name: Vacuum cleaner for mattresses for deep cleaning and disinfection of bedding, mattresses and soft fabrics
M600.description: The UWANT M600 is an advanced mattress vacuum designed for deep cleaning and disinfection of bedding, sofas and soft fabrics. The device combines high-powered blows to release dirt from a depth of up to 45 cm with powerful suction to remove dust mites, allergens and bacteria. It is equipped with a smart sensor and an LED display that monitors the level of dirt in real time (MiteTrack), and uses heating technology to dry the mattress from moisture and double sterilization using ultraviolet light and sound waves that disrupt the mite culture. The structure of the tank The double prevents filter clogging and maintains continuous suction power.

D500.name: washing machine
D500.description: A 3-in-1 cordless vacuum cleaner that vacuums, washes and dries at the same time. The device is equipped with a unique design that allows it to 'lie flat' at 180 degrees for cleaning under furniture at a height of 13.5 cm. Includes a three-sided roller (Tri-Edge) that reaches the edges and panels with a gap of 0 mm. The device uses electrolytic water to disinfect the surface while working. At the end of the cleaning, the docking station performs a complete self-cleaning that includes scrubbing the roller and drying in hot air at a temperature of 65°C to prevent mold and bad odors. Includes a smart LED display and voice alerts for the user.

V600.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with accessories
V600.description: The vacuum cleaner includes a smart CleanSync docking station that performs charging, automatic dust emptying and filter cleaning within 15 seconds. The 'cleaning ring' technology (unique patent) automatically cleans the filter to prevent clogging. Dual Path Suction system to prevent entanglement of hair in the roller. Green laser lighting at an angle of 110 degrees to detect micro dust. AllEdge system for thorough cleaning of corners. Color LED screen with battery status indicator and power plus voice instructions. Accessories included: dust mite beater brush (6,000 beats per minute with infrared heating), 4-in-1 flat LED nozzle, and double suction floor brush.

35036-IS.name: Deep frying pot 4 liters silver
35036-IS.description: The pot is designed for deep and professional frying of a variety of foods. The device includes a removable oil tank that allows for easy and convenient cleaning (can be washed in the dishwasher in some models), a lid with a transparent viewing window to monitor the progress of the frying without opening the device, and a built-in charcoal filter to filter odors and smoke. Safety: the device is equipped with a protection mechanism against overheating and cold-to-the-touch handles that prevent burns.

V500.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with emptying station
V500.description: Automatic self-emptying position that empties the dust container in 10 seconds; Unique patent technology for cutting hairs with a brush to prevent knots; A smart infrared sensor that detects the level of dirt and automatically adjusts the suction power; Color LED display showing battery level, work modes and maintenance alerts; "Dual Cup" design that separates the air from the dust to maintain a stable suction power; Double charging option (at the pump and at the docking station).

SL-40.name: Toaster oven 40 liters black
SL-40.description: The toaster oven is equipped with a uniform heat distribution system (Turbo/Convection) that enables fast and efficient baking and roasting. Suitable for making pastries, grilling meats, heating food and browning. The device includes internal lighting that allows you to monitor the cooking process without opening the door. The accessory set includes an enamel baking tray, a stainless steel grill grid and an auxiliary handle for removing the trays safely.

OM-HUM-FACE.name: human weight
OM-HUM-FACE.description: Automatic operation with Step-on technology (immediate weighing upon standing on the device); automatic shutdown to save battery; high precision sensors; Overload indicator (Overload); low battery indicator; A thin and modern design that combines a graphic illustration (Face design).

Trooper IP34-TRO2000HT-CL.name: Halogen heating mushroom with a power of 2000 watts for hanging
Trooper IP34-TRO2000HT-CL.description: Instant and powerful heating with halogen technology that simulates the sun's rays; 360 degree peripheral heat dissipation; suitable for indoor and outdoor use (under a roof) such as balconies, pergolas and cafes; Simple operation using a pull wire (Pull Switch); Completely silent operation with no background noise; safe to use and includes a dense protective net to prevent direct contact with the heating element; Energy efficient compared to external gas stoves.

OM-KITCH-DISPLAY8.name: Kitchen scale
OM-KITCH-DISPLAY8.description: The scale is designed for accurate weighing of dry and wet food components in the home kitchen. Thanks to the Tare (reset) function, you can easily weigh several ingredients in the same tool one after the other. The product is characterized by a thin and compact design that allows convenient storage in a drawer or on the counter, and an easy-to-clean weighing surface that maintains maximum hygiene.

MX-L60-3.7V.name: Rechargeable emergency lighting
MX-L60-3.7V.description: immediate automatic switching on during a power outage; Power selector with 2 lighting levels (High/Low); control light (LED) to indicate charging status; Test button (TEST) to check the device's normality; Built-in protection against overcharging and overdischarging the battery; Includes a removable carrying handle and the possibility of permanent hanging on a wall.

EOP7422K.name: Black built-in pyrolytic air fryer
EOP7422K.description: AirFry technology that allows frying and baking in hot air without oil for a crispy texture. Food Sensor for measuring temperature inside the food and automatic shutdown when the desired degree of doneness is reached. The SurroundCook system that guarantees uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity. Fast heating function. Door with SoftClosing technology for soft and silent closing. 10 working modes including active turbo, grill, defrosting and baking with moisture. Cold door with 4 layers of glass for maximum safety.

ATL-189.name: Rechargeable emergency lighting
ATL-189.description: A two-headed emergency lighting system designed for immediate automatic activation during a power outage. The device includes two adjustable flashlights that allow the direction of the light beam to different angles to cover a maximum area. Equipped with an ergonomic carrying handle for easy portability, a TEST button to check the integrity of the system, and control LEDs to monitor the state of charging and connection to electricity. Includes built-in protection against overcharging and overdischarging the battery.

ATL-186.name: Rechargeable emergency lighting
ATL-186.description: Turns on automatically when the power goes out (permanently connected to the outlet). Includes a selector for choosing the lighting intensity (two levels of intensity). Equipped with a protection mechanism against over-discharge and over-charging to maintain the longevity of the battery. Includes a removable carrying handle for maximum comfort and the possibility of hanging on the wall (rear hanging slots). A control light to monitor the charging status. Removable power cable stored in the body of the device.

HEM-1163.name: Toaster oven 50 liter turbo black
HEM-1163.description: 6 diverse operating programs that include: upper heating, lower heating, combined heating (upper + lower), and a Turbo function for uniform heat distribution that integrates with the different heating modes; permanent operating mode (suitable for use as a Shabbat palette); A door with heat-resistant double glass for maximum safety and thermal insulation; Teflon-coated inner sides for quick and easy cleaning; Internal lighting for easy viewing of the cooking process; control light for active mode; Additional accessories: baking tray, roasting grid and a handle for removing the tray.

ATL-8812B.name: Black manual milk frother
ATL-8812B.description: The device offers two main functions: quickly whipping hot or cold milk to create thick foam for coffee drinks, and mixing eggs to make omelets, pancakes and nights. The foamer is equipped with a powerful motor that guarantees results in a few seconds. The ergonomic structure includes an activation button at the top of the device for maximum comfort, and the frothing heads are removable for easy cleaning and simple maintenance. The attached stand allows decorative and convenient storage on the kitchen counter without taking up much space.

ATL-8812C.name: Cream color manual milk frother
ATL-8812C.description: The device is intended for preparing a variety of coffee drinks and offers 3 operating modes: hot frothing for cappuccino and latte, cold frothing for iced coffee, and heating milk without frothing (for chocolate or reverse coffee). The frother works extremely quietly, includes a transparent lid to prevent splashes that allows monitoring of the frothing action, and its structure allows for quick and simple cleaning thanks to the high-quality inner coating.

HEM-264.name: White milk frother
HEM-264.description: The frother allows three main operations: hot frothing, cold frothing (to produce thick foam for cold coffee) and heating milk without frothing. The device is equipped with an automatic shutdown mechanism at the end of the operation to prevent the milk from burning and for maximum safety. Includes a transparent lid to prevent splashing and to allow monitoring of the whipping process, and a hidden heating element.

WKFW601.name: Shabbat 4-pot collapsible plate
WKFW601.description: A flexible heating plate that folds up for compact and extremely convenient storage; suitable for placing up to 4 pots at the same time; Approved for use on Shabbat according to Halacha (fixed heating without variable thermostat); surface easy to clean with a damp cloth; Thin and lightweight design that allows high mobility for trips and hospitality; Control light to show working status.

SMF600.name: Black milk frother
SMF600.description: Hot whipping: preparing thick and stable foam for a cappuccino or airy foam for a latte; Cold frothing: ideal for making cold coffee and summer drinks; Milk heating: heating liquids without frothing for chocolate or coffee drinks with hot milk; Making chocolate: you can add chocolate powder or pieces directly to the container to make hot chocolate with a velvety texture; Maintenance: The stainless steel container is removable and can be easily washed in the dishwasher.

Pure One Air Pet.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner
Pure One Air Pet.description: Smart iLoop™ sensor that detects dirt and automatically adjusts the suction power in real time; ZeroTangle technology that prevents entanglement of hair and fur around the brush; Lightweight ultra-light design that allows easy cleaning of high areas and corners; LED display showing dirt level and battery status; Emptying the dirt tank with one push of a button.

SE-376.name: Shabbat 4-pot collapsible plate
SE-376.description: The product is intended for heating and keeping food warm on Shabbat. The surface is flexible and foldable, which allows for extremely compact storage and maximum carrying comfort for trips, hospitality outside the home and travel. The surface is easy to clean and highly durable. The product is approved for use on Shabbat by the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute.

22706-IS.name: Matznam 2 slices of cream
22706-IS.description: A high-quality matznam that combines an elegant retro design in a cream shade with modern functionality. The device is able to handle a variety of types of bread, from regular sliced ​​bread to thick bagels, thanks to the wide toasting openings. The toaster is equipped with lighted buttons for a clear indication of the working status and an automatic jump mechanism that guarantees uniform and precise roasting according to the user's choice.

TAT3M121.name: Matznam 2 slices of white
TAT3M121.description: Matznam from the MyMoment series, which includes: an automatic centering mechanism for the bread slices for uniform toasting; Integrated (folding) heating grid for heating buns and pastries; The function of defrosting (defrost) and reheating with an illuminated indicator; High Lift mechanism that facilitates the removal of small slices; Stop button is lit; removable crumb tray for easy cleaning; Safety mechanism for automatic shutdown in case the bread gets stuck.

MAX PRO AG653.name: Large grill pot
MAX PRO AG653.description: 7-in-1 device that includes programs: grill, roasting, frying pan (Plancha), baking, air fry (Air Fry), food drying and reheating; Cyclonic Air technology for burning from all directions without the need to turn the food; Smart Cook system with digital thermometer for monitoring internal temperature and accuracy in done measurements (Rare-Well Done); Possibility of cooking with an open lid (for burning and frying) or closed; An advanced smoke control system that includes a detachable splash shield to reduce smoke in the kitchen.

35052-IS.name: Black hot air fryer
35052-IS.description: frying, baking, roasting and reheating using rapid circulation of hot air (minimum oil); 8 built-in cooking programs (fries, meat, chicken, fish, shrimp, baking and more); Possibility of manual setting of time and temperature; Frying basket and drawer are dishwasher safe; Cold touch grip handle for increased safety.

EG203.name: Small grill pot
EG203.description: 6-in-1 multi-cooker device that performs: grill, roast, bake, fry in hot air (Air Fry), brown and dry food; CYCLONIC GRILLING technology for uniform heat distribution in 360 degrees; VIRTUALLY SMOKE-FREE system to reduce smoke through a splash shield and temperature control; 4 defined grilling levels: LOW (sausages and pastries), MEDIUM (frozen meat), HIGH (steaks and chicken), and MAX (vegetables, fish and pizza); Advanced digital panel with Hebrew display.

GRILL MAX DG553.name: Medium grail pot
GRILL MAX DG553.description: A 6-in-1 device that combines the following operations: Grill, Air Crisp/Air Fry, Bake, Roast, Dehydrate and Reheat. The device includes the unique Virtualy Smoke-Free technology for smoke control that combines temperature control and a splash shield, which enables an "on fire" experience indoors without smoke and dirt. You can prepare up to 6 steaks at the same time with precise cooking levels (Rear-Med-Well) and automatic shutdown when the desired temperature is reached.

AF6060.name: Pot for frying in hot air 6 liters black
AF6060.description: Air Fryer technology that enables frying, baking and grilling by circulating hot air at high speed for a crispy result with up to 80% less oil. The device includes 8 fixed cooking programs (such as chips, meat, fish, chicken, baking and more). Additional features: Shake function (sound alert for mixing the food in the middle of the process), protection against overheating, smart memory that continues the operation automatically after returning the container, and uniform heat distribution in 360 degrees.

HEM-1165.name: Toaster oven 20 liters black
HEM-1165.description: The toaster oven is suitable for a variety of preparation operations in the kitchen including baking, roasting and reheating. The product is equipped with a durable glass door that allows viewing the cooking process. The package includes a set of accessories: an enameled baking pan, a stainless steel grill grid and an auxiliary handle for removing the pan/grid to prevent burns.

LUXE CAFE ES603.name: Grinder coffee machine with milk frother
LUXE CAFE ES603.description: All-in-one coffee machine that combines espresso, filter coffee (Drip Coffee) and cold brew coffee; Barista Assist technology that provides real-time instructions on the thickness of the grind and the amount of coffee; Automatic milk frothing system (Auto Froth) with the possibility of choosing the temperature and texture of the foam (4 different levels) to create a micro-foam adapted to Latte Art; Cold Brew function for a cold brew in a few minutes; Self-cleaning and easy maintenance with built-in programs.

WKCMX-02.name: Black capsule espresso coffee machine
WKCMX-02.description: Making high-quality Italian espresso coffee at high pressure; Two predefined pouring options: short espresso (about 40 ml) and long espresso (about 110 ml); A fast heating system that allows shortening the waiting time between cups; Compact and narrow design (Slim Design) suitable for saving space on the work surface in the kitchen; Simple and fast operation using upper control buttons.

SE-91B.name: The Smart Pingjan Black Pressed Turkish Coffee
SE-91B.description: Preparation of Turkish coffee (mud) with one push of a button in about 3 minutes. Includes a smart sensor to prevent the overflow of the coffee that stops the operation of the device just before boiling. Equipped with a double safety mechanism to prevent overheating and to prevent operation without water (protection against dry work). The device is made of safety materials for contact with food and includes a pitcher that can be easily washed.

Volcano Plus.name: Infrared heater 2500 watts
Volcano Plus.description: Long-term infrared heat radiation that heats objects and people directly without wasting energy on heating the air. Suitable for outdoor and indoor use (balconies, pergolas, open work spaces). Includes a remote control for full control, a built-in digital thermostat for the desired temperature, an automatic shut-off timer (up to 24 hours) and 5 variable heat intensity levels. Equipped with a protection mechanism against overheating.

OG850 Woodfire Pro XL.name: Electric grill + smoker
OG850 Woodfire Pro XL.description: 7-in-1 device including: outdoor grill, smoker, air fry, roasting, baking, reheating and food drying; Woodfire technology: burning wood flakes (Pellets) to create a real smoking flavor and aroma; Smart Cook system: includes a built-in digital thermometer (Probe) for monitoring the temperature of the food in real time and reaching a precise cooking degree; XL volume: allows grilling up to 10 hamburgers or 2 pieces of ribs at the same time; Work in electricity technology without coal or gas.

SE-91.name: The Smart Pincan Turkish Pressed Coffee White
SE-91.description: Making authentic Turkish coffee automatically at the push of a button; equipped with a smart sensor to prevent the coffee from overflowing while boiling (stops the operation just before overflowing); Safety mechanism to prevent overheating or operation without liquid; Voice warning and light indication at the end of the cooking process; Quick preparation time of about 3 minutes; A convenient pitcher for pouring that can be washed by hand.

TX10.name: Infrared heater for hanging 2000 watts
TX10.description: Instant heating in seconds with infrared technology that heats objects and people directly; suitable for indoor and outdoor use (bathrooms, balconies, pergolas and yards); includes a remote control for convenient control (in the updated model) and a physical activation switch on the sides of the device; horizontal and uniform heat distribution; Extremely quiet work without background noise; High energy efficiency that allows outdoor heating even in windy conditions.

Air Cooler-3.name: Portable air cooler and purifier
Air Cooler-3.description: An integrated device that performs three operations in one unit: air cooling, air purification through a dust filtration system, and a humidifier to prevent dryness in the room. The device is equipped with cooling technology using water evaporation, a charcoal filter to filter odors and particles, and high-quality wheels that allow full mobility between rooms. Suitable for home or office use as an energy-efficient alternative to an air conditioner.

EN510.name: Latissima capsule coffee machine with white milk frother
EN510.description: Preparation of a variety of drinks with one press of a button (One Touch) including espresso, longo, cappuccino and latte macchiato; An innovative optical milk sensor that detects the amount of milk in the container and uses the entire amount to prevent waste; Simple and fast cleaning system - the milk container can be washed in a dishwasher; control panel with soft touch buttons; Collapsible drip tray that allows the use of small espresso cups or tall latte cups; Maintenance alert to remove scale and clean the system.

HEM-952.name: Ceramic heater 2100W
HEM-952.description: wide heat dispersion using a horizontal oscillation (oscillation) function; Digital thermostat for directing and maintaining the room temperature; Safety mechanisms that include a fall protection sensor (automatic shutdown) and protection against overheating; Extremely quiet operation suitable for bedrooms; Built-in carrying handle for easy portability.

TX20.name: A water-protected hanging coal heater (heat radiator).
TX20.description: A powerful charcoal heat projector intended for installation by hanging on the wall; suitable for heating outdoor and large areas such as gardens, yards and balconies thanks to high water resistance; Includes a pull mechanism (wire) that is convenient to turn on and off; provides immediate and energy-saving heating; Constructed of durable materials to prevent corrosion in the open

ND-6000.name: Toaster oven 60 liters black
ND-6000.description: Turbo function (Convection) that allows uniform heat distribution for optimal baking results; Internal lighting that allows you to monitor the state of the food without opening the door; Option to choose between 6 working modes (top heating, bottom heating, combined, turbo and rotating grill); Includes a rotating grill device (rotisserie skewer) for roasting poultry; Comes with accessories: a rectangular baking pan, a grill grid, and handles for removing the pan and the skewer.

MATEO-W.name: White capsule coffee machine
MATEO-W.description: A compact coffee machine designed for Nespresso Compatible capsules; includes two automatic pouring buttons that can be programmed personally (short espresso and longo); Thermo-block technology for quick heating; automatic shutdown mechanism after 9 minutes of inactivity to save energy; A removable drip tray that allows the use of glasses of different sizes.

ATL-138CW.name: Heat diffuser for the bathroom 2800 watts white
ATL-138CW.description: Extremely fast and powerful heating adapted to the bathroom environment. The device includes a built-in blower (turbo) for effective, uniform and silent air distribution throughout the room. Unique feature: internal LED lighting that can be activated even without the heating elements to create an atmosphere. Includes two control lights to monitor the operating status and an adjustable mechanism to determine the heat dissipation angle.

ATL-138CB.name: Heat diffuser for the bathroom 2800 watts black
ATL-138CB.description: powerful and fast heating of bathrooms and wet spaces; includes economical LED lighting to create an atmosphere and use as night lighting (can be operated without the heating elements); An adjustable side mechanism that allows you to determine the angle of heat dispersion according to need; suitable and safe for use also in children's rooms; Compact and modern design with a luxurious black finish.

MATEO-B.name: Black capsule coffee machine
MATEO-B.description: Capsule coffee machine compatible with the Nespresso Original system; includes two operating programs (short espresso and long/longo espresso) with the possibility of personal setting of the amount of water for each program; fast heating system; A mechanism for ejecting used capsules into an internal collection tank; removable drip tray for easy cleaning; Compact and luxurious design in black finish.

TB303 DETECT.name: Powerful blender and shaker 2.1 liters with digital display
TB303 DETECT.description: BlendSense technology: an intelligent system that automatically detects the type and texture of the ingredients and adjusts the working time and speed. Detection functions: Torque Detect, Ice Detect, Liquid Detect and Portion Detect. Working programs: Ice crushing (Crush/Max Crush), thick mode (Thick Mode) for spreads and nut butters, and chopping programs (Mince, Small/Large Chop) for a variety of sizes. Texture control: Variable Speed ​​Control that allows a transition between liquid textures and thick textures that can be eaten with a spoon.

BXCG150E.name: 150 watt coffee grinder
BXCG150E.description: A multifunctional grinder designed for grinding coffee beans, dry spices, nuts and legumes. The device includes a transparent lid that allows visual control of the degree of grinding, a safety mechanism that prevents activation when the lid is not locked, rubber feet for maximum stability and a storage compartment for the power cable built into the base of the device.

TL330D11.name: Matznam 4 slices of silver
TL330D11.description: Toasting up to 4 slices of bread at the same time thanks to long openings; High-Lift mechanism that allows safe and easy removal of the tsinims even if they are small; removable crumb tray for quick cleaning and easy maintenance; Stop/Eject button that allows the roasting operation to be stopped at any moment; Electronic selector for degrees of browning for an accurate result; Compact and narrow design designed to save space on the kitchen counter; Automatic centering of the slices to ensure uniform toasting on both sides.

TSM6A011W.name: Coffee grinder 180 watt white
TSM6A011W.description: Freshly ground coffee beans for maximum aroma; control of the degree of grinding (fine to coarse) using the duration of the operation time using the pulse method; Suitable for making filter coffee, espresso and black coffee; Compact and ergonomic design for convenient storage; Quiet operation relative to engine performance.

TSM6A013B.name: Black 180 watt coffee grinder
TSM6A013B.description: Accurate and thorough grinding of coffee beans to maintain maximum aroma; suitable for making filter coffee or espresso (depending on the pressing time); ability to grind spices, nuts and seeds (according to manufacturer's instructions); Simple operation by pressing the lid; Compact and ergonomic design suitable for convenient storage in any kitchen.

SL-7204.name: Matznam 2 light blue slices
SL-7204.description: Operation: automatic and/or manual; Functions: Defrost, Reheat; Heat control: electronic timer with 7 levels; Bounce mechanism: automatic; Safety: internal temperature sensor and manual activation neutralization mechanism; Maintenance: removable tray for collecting and removing crumbs.

SL-7205.name: Matznam 2 slices of green mint
SL-7205.description: A luxurious matznam with a powerful heating element. Includes the functions of defrosting (defrost), reheating (reheat) and canceling manual operation. Equipped with cold sides for maximum safety, an automatic bounce mechanism at the end of the operation, and an internal temperature sensor. The device includes a removable tray for collecting crumbs and easy removal, as well as a designated place for storing the cable at the bottom of the device. Allows automatic and/or manual operation.

HEM-1371.name: Matznam 2 black slices
HEM-1371.description: Automatic system for centering the bread for uniform toasting; Cool-to-the-touch exterior sides for enhanced safety; Defrost button for toasting frozen bread; Reheat button; Cancel button to stop the operation at any stage; Compact design and convenient for daily use.

WKTT8028K.name: Matznam 2 black slices
WKTT8028K.description: For more details about Matznam 2 slices black and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

CPT160PIE.name: Matznam 2 stainless steel slices - dew pink
CPT160PIE.description: Operation modes: Toast, Reheat, Defrost, and Bagel; Extra deep and wide toasting slots that enable uniform toasting of thick slices, buns and bagels; High-lift mechanism that allows safe and easy removal of small slices; removable crumb tray for quick and easy cleaning; LED control lights; Cancel button (Cancel) to stop the operation immediately; automatic shutdown mechanism for maximum safety; Retro design from the Cuisinart Style Collection series.

CPT160GE.name: Matznam 2 stainless steel slices - dew green
CPT160GE.description: Includes 4 main work functions: Toast, Bagel for extending the toasting time, Defrost designed for defrosting and toasting frozen bread in one cycle, and Reheat for heating a slice without additional browning; Cancel button to stop the operation; High Lift mechanism that allows small slices to be removed safely; extra wide slots adapted to a variety of pastries and thick breads; LED-illuminated power buttons; A device for storing the power cord at the base of the device; All materials that come into contact with food are BPA free.

HEM-1370.name: Matznam 2 slices of white
HEM-1370.description: An automatic system for centering the bread for uniform toasting on both sides, a temperature control selector (degrees of browning) for customization, extra wide toasting openings suitable for different types of bread, three operating functions: the defrost button for frozen bread, a fast reheat button, and a cancel button to stop the operation at any time. Includes a removable crumb drawer for easy cleaning and anti-slip feet for maximum stability.

TT9000.name: Matznam 2 long transparent slices
TT9000.description: A transparent glass lid allows visual monitoring of the degree of browning in real time; double-sided glass display window, removable for easy cleaning; Automatic lifting and lowering mechanism of the shutters; 7 browning levels to choose from; 5 operating functions: ON/OFF, DEFROST, BAGEL, START/CANCEL; Illuminated buttons.

SL-25.name: Toaster oven 25 liters silver
SL-25.description: The product is designed for baking, grilling and heating food efficiently and quickly thanks to the turbo system. It allows flexibility in cooking with a work mode selector for using upper, lower or combined heating elements. The kit includes accessories: 3 baking pans, 1 roasting grid and a tray for collecting crumbs that makes cleaning easier. Luxurious silver/stainless steel finish.

Frozix-700.name: A luxury ice machine with a volume of 2.2 liters
Frozix-700.description: Fast production of ice cubes in two sizes to choose from (S/L), LED operating panel with touch buttons and smart indicator, safety sensors for automatic stop when the basket is full or when there is no water, top lid with a transparent viewing window, quiet cooling system with a powerful compressor, luxurious design with a stainless steel finish, including a scoop and a removable basket.

FROZIX-1000.name: A luxury ice machine with a volume of 3.2 liters
FROZIX-1000.description: Fast and high-quality ice production without aftertastes; LCD display screen with touch buttons for full control; automatic self-cleaning function to maintain hygiene; A smart water recycling system that uses water from the melting ice for regeneration; transparent top cover to monitor production progress; Smart alerts on water shortage or full ice tank; Possibility of external connection of a water bottle above the device; A powerful cooling system with an efficient and quiet compressor.

TO2228.name: Toaster oven 28 liters black
TO2228.description: The toaster oven is suitable for a wide range of home cooking and baking operations: baking cakes and cookies, roasting meat and chicken, toasting bread (TOAST) and reheating foods. The device allows full control of the temperature and cooking time for accurate results. The kit includes accessories: a rectangular baking tray, a grill grid and an auxiliary handle to remove the grid and the grid in a safe manner.

I2A.name: Mopping robotic vacuum cleaner, black
I2A.description: A combined device for sweeping, vacuuming and washing in one operation; Full remote control using the MSmartHome app; support for voice commands through Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant; automatic return to the charging position at the end of work or when the battery is weak; Planning a smart cleaning route (Zig-zag) for optimal area coverage; equipped with sensors to prevent falling from stairs and sensors to prevent collisions with furniture; Extremely thin structure that allows entry under low furniture.

BT-T03.name: Matznam 2 slices of white
BT-T03.description: Auto-pop up mechanism at the end of browning; Stop button (Cancel/Stop) to stop the operation manually; A mechanism for automatically centering the slices for uniform browning; heat insulated sides for maximum safety; A designated place for storing the power cable at the base of the device.

CH-240B.name: Matznam 2 black slices
CH-240B.description: automatic jumping of the slices at the end of the operation; Reheat function (Reheat); Defrost function; Cancel function (Cancel); High level mechanism for easy removal of small slices; Cool touch sides for safety in use; Uniform heat distribution to prevent the edges of the bread from burning.

HD9216-B.name: Black hot air fryer
HD9216-B.description: For more details about the black hot air fryer and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

EF-1186.name: Ice machine with direct connection to the pipeline
EF-1186.description: A powerful ice machine designed for home or office use, which allows continuous work without the need for manual filling thanks to the direct connection to the plumbing. The device includes ultra insulation to maintain the temperature for a long time, a powerful compressor for fast production, and a transparent window that allows tracking the amount of ice in the tank. The digital control panel allows easy and convenient control over the features of the machine and the size of the cubes.

86152-IS.name: Silver ice maker
86152-IS.description: A professional and portable ice machine designed for home or office use; allows a choice between two sizes of ice cubes (small and large); The device does not require a permanent connection to a water source or drainage system (manual filling); includes control lights to alert when the water tank is empty or when the ice tank is full; Equipped with a transparent top cover that allows monitoring of the ice production process without opening the device; Suitable for entertaining, parties and daily use.

EF-790.name: White hot air fryer
EF-790.description: Rapid Air technology for fast hot air circulation that allows frying, baking and grilling with minimal oil (up to 80% less fat); Removable drawer and frying basket with non-stick coating to prevent sticking and easy cleaning; Cool Touch handle for maximum safety; built-in protection against overheating; Compact design adapted to the home kitchen.

SE-6858.name: White ice maker
SE-6858.description: A portable home device for making ice cubes that does not require a permanent connection to a water point. The device allows a choice between two sizes of ice cubes and includes smart sensors that alert when there is no water in the tank or when the ice basket is full. The device is equipped with a transparent lid that allows monitoring of the preparation process and comes with a dedicated spoon for pouring the ice.

HD9216-W.name: White hot air fryer
HD9216-W.description: An Airfryer device from the Daily Collection series that uses the unique Rapid Air technology for frying, baking, grilling and grilling foods with very little oil or no oil at all. The device includes a manual time and temperature selector for full control, an automatic shut-off mechanism with an audible warning, and the removable parts of the device (drawer and basket) can be washed in a dishwasher for quick and easy cleaning.

MG7735-15.name: Haircut machine series 7000
MG7735-15.description: 12 in 1 care set designed for the face, hair of the head and body; Includes 12 accessories: wide metal trimmer, metal trimmer for precise design, mini shaving head, nose and ear hair trimmer; 8 durable combs: adjustable beard comb (3-7mm), 2 bristle combs (1, 2mm), 3 hair combs (9, 12, 16mm) and 2 body combs (3, 5mm); Precise and clean cutting ability even in thick hair.

D7 Slim line Pro.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
D7 Slim line Pro.description: A professional haircut and finishing machine designed for outlining, beard styling and cleaning the neck and ears. The structure of the machine is extremely thin (Slim) and ergonomic, allowing a comfortable grip and maximum control for an extended period of time without tiring the palm. Suitable for professional use in hair salons or for high-quality home use.

HC5632-15.name: Haircut machine series 5000
HC5632-15.description: DualCut technology: double-sided blade for 2x faster cutting. Trim-n-Flow Pro technology: comb design that prevents the hair from getting stuck and enables a continuous haircut. Turbo Mode (Turbo Mode): increasing the speed of the motor to deal with particularly thick and dense hair. Flexible use: can be used with a connected power cable or wirelessly. Accessory set includes: beard comb (2mm), 2 adjustable hair combs (3-15mm and 16-28mm), scissors, styling comb, soft storage case and cleaning brush.

BT1230/18.name: beard trimmer
BT1230/18.description: DuraPower technology that ensures 4 times longer battery life by reducing friction; skin-friendly blades with rounded edges to prevent scratches and irritations; SkinProtect comb for additional skin protection while shaving; Detachable head for easy washing under a tap; Travel lock to prevent accidental activation; charging indicator (indicator light) on top of the handle; Ergonomic design for comfortable grip and maximum control.

MT-102PLUS.name: Haircut machine (rechargeable grooming kit for men)
MT-102PLUS.description: A 10-in-1 grooming and styling kit that includes: a main haircut head with durable blades, a wide T blade head, a U blade head for arranging beard lines, a foil shaver head for a smooth look, a wig and eyebrow trimmer, and a nose and ear hair trimmer (round trimmer). The device is waterproof and allows washing under the tap for easy hygienic cleaning. Includes a compact and lightweight ergonomic structure for a comfortable grip and maximum control.

EW-DS11.name: Electric toothbrush with battery
EW-DS11.description: Deep and effective cleaning of the teeth using high-frequency sonic vibrations to remove plaque; A fashionable and discreet 'Pocket Doltz' design reminiscent of mascara or a fountain pen, specially adapted for carrying in a handbag, make-up bag or for office use; Dual-edged brush head for easy access to back areas and between the teeth; Hard protective cover with ventilation openings that ensures hygiene and drying of the brush even inside a bag; Ideal for trips and trips without the need to carry luggage or a charging base.

190S-1.name: Mesh head shaver
190S-1.description: SmartFoil technology: a network with a unique hole structure to capture hairs growing in different directions for a smoother shave. Trimmer: Removable long hair trimmer (Pop-up) for precise styling of wigs and mustaches. Dual use: the possibility of working with a direct connection to electricity or working wirelessly using the battery. Ergonomic design: comfortable and safe grip for daily use.

QP2724/10 OneBlade.name: Shaver
QP2724/10 OneBlade.description: A double protection system that includes a smooth coating and rounded edges to protect the skin; Fast cutting unit (12,000 operations per minute); Ability to cut, shape and shave any length of hair; Bidirectional blade that allows shaving in any direction and maximum control; tracing the contours of the face; suitable for wet use with foam/gel or dry; Long-lasting blade (recommended replacement once every 4 months).

E702YTE.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
E702YTE.description: A multifunctional haircut and beard styling machine that includes 22 different lengths for customization. The device is equipped with a smart adjusting system (Smart Adjusting System) that maintains a constant and uniform cutting height regardless of the angle of holding the machine on the head. The 3D sharpening technology of the blades ensures a clean cut in one pass, and the turbo function allows increased power to deal with particularly thick hair.

SPI-13.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
SPI-13.description: A professional haircut and finishing machine designed for precise cutting, creating sharp finishing lines and cleaning the nape of the neck and wigs. The device includes a powerful and quiet motor that allows smooth cutting without pulling hair. The metal body provides high durability and a stable grip. The kit usually includes lifting combs (in sizes such as 2/3/4 mm), a cleaning brush and oil to lubricate the blades.

SP-9518.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
SP-9518.description: A professional and rechargeable haircut machine intended for haircuts and beard styling; Ergonomic design for a comfortable grip that prevents slipping; The machine allows flexible wireless use; The kit includes 4 straightening combs in different sizes (3, 6, 9, 12 mm) that allow precision and variety in haircut styles; suitable for intensive home use.

S1151-00.name: 1000 series shaver
S1151-00.description: Wet or dry shaving (Wet & Dry) that allows use in the shower or with foam/gel; One-touch opening for easy and quick cleaning of the hair collection compartment; Ergonomic handle with rubber coating to prevent slipping; charging indicator with a single LED; Protective cover to protect the shaving heads when storing or traveling.

S5587/10.name: 5000 series shaver
S5587/10.description: SkinIQ technology that includes a Power Adapt sensor that adjusts the cutting power to the hair density 125 times per second; wet and dry use (Wet & Dry) that allows dry shaving, with foam/gel or under water; A built-in trimmer opens for precise arrangement of wigs and mustaches; Easy opening with one click for quick cleaning under the water tap; Ergonomic handle with anti-slip rubber.

Wet Dry S7886-35.name: 7000 series shaver
Wet Dry S7886-35.description: SkinIQ technology: includes a Motion Control sensor that follows the shaving movements and a guide to improve the technique through an app; Protective SkinGlide coating: a protective coating that reduces friction on the skin to prevent irritation; Wet & Dry use: full water resistance that allows dry, wet shaving with gel/foam or under the shower; Power Adapt sensor: adjusts the cutting power to the density of the hair in real time; Bluetooth connectivity: connection to the GroomTribe app to customize the shaving program.

S9502/83.name: Shaver 9400 series
S9502/83.description: SenseIQ technology: personalization of the shave to the skin and hair; Pressure Guard sensor: skin protection through real-time pressure indication; Power Adapt sensor: reading the hair density 500 times per second and adjusting the cutting power automatically; ComfortGlide rings: special coating to reduce friction and prevent irritation; Motion Control sensor: tracking the shaving technique and training to improve the movement through the app; Pop-up trimmer: built into the handle of the device for arranging mustaches and wigs.

X3003/00.name: 3000 series shaver
X3003/00.description: The shaver provides a clean and comfortable shave thanks to the PowerCut blades designed for maximum precision and prevention of irritation. The 4D Flex heads adjust themselves to the curves of the face and neck for continuous contact with the skin. The machine includes a built-in removable trimmer that allows precise shaping of mustaches and cheek wigs. The handle design is ergonomic with a non-slip rubber coating, which ensures a secure grip even in wet conditions in the shower. The device works in wireless mode only for maximum safety in a wet environment.

ESE-559.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
ESE-559.description: A multi-purpose professional haircut machine suitable for haircuts and beard styling; allows work with a direct connection to electricity or wirelessly; includes two removable batteries that allow continuous work (charging one battery while using the other); equipped with quiet technology and a powerful motor intended for prolonged use; A sharp and durable titanium blade that ensures precise and comfortable cutting.

ESE155.name: Haircut machine for the body
ESE155.description: Ultimate haircut and trimming machine (Body Groomer) designed for body hair for both men and women. The machine was specially designed for safe work in delicate and intimate areas thanks to the ceramic blades that reduce irritation and cuts. The ability to work in a wet state (Wet & Dry) allows for easy cleaning and hygienic maintenance. Suitable for cutting hair on the chest, back, armpits and groin at variable length levels.

TurboCut Diamond ESE9000.name: A professional haircut machine with a diamond blade
TurboCut Diamond ESE9000.description: A professional machine designed for high workloads in barbershops (Heavy Duty). The Diamond Blade technology enables sharp and precise cutting without pulling hair, while reducing friction and the heating of the blades. The fast motor ensures uniform performance even in thick and dense hair. The device is characterized by an ergonomic design and a balanced weight to reduce fatigue in the book's hand. Allows work with a direct connection to electricity or in a flexible wireless way.

ESE790 Prestige ZeroCut.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
ESE790 Prestige ZeroCut.description: Professional rechargeable hair clipper from the Prestige series; Intended for haircuts (suitable for baldness), beard styling and finishing (Zero Cut); has a powerful engine that maintains a constant working speed; The body of the machine is made of metal with a modern and ergonomic design for a comfortable grip; Option to replace the external cover (panel) for customization; A digital display allows accurate monitoring of the battery status to prevent sudden stops during work.

ESE770.name: Rechargeable haircut machine for hair and beard
ESE770.description: A professional haircut and finishing machine designed for hair and beard. The machine excels in maximum precision thanks to the spacious blade structure that allows for complex design work, cleaning in sensitive areas (like above the ears) and precise grading. The unique structure of the knife prevents the accumulation of hair inside the mechanism and allows better visibility of the cutting line while working. Suitable for wireless use and convenient for travel.

ER-DGP65.name: Rechargeable hair clipper
ER-DGP65.description: A professional haircut machine intended for intensive use in barbershops and also for high-quality home use; Constant Control technology that maintains constant blade speed and cutting power regardless of hair density or battery condition; precise cutting at an angle of 45 degrees; The possibility of working with a direct connection to electricity or without a cable; Ergonomic design with rubber grip to prevent slipping; Suitable for full haircuts, ratings, beard styling and outlines; Includes 3 double-sided lifting combs that provide 6 cutting lengths (3/4, 6/9, 12/15 mm).

40306-IS NM.name: Stainless steel pyramid electric kettle painted black
40306-IS NM.description: Fast and powerful boiling; 3 safety mechanisms: automatic shutdown after boiling, protection against operation without water (Dry-boil protection), and safety lid with lock; Transparent window for reading and clear water measurement; removable and washable scale filter to keep the water clean; Illuminated on/off switch; A designated place to store the power cord at the base of the kettle.

41303-IS BM.name: Black painted stainless steel electric kettle
41303-IS BM.description: Quality operating mechanism made by STRIX; 3 safety modes that include automatic shutdown after boiling and automatic shutdown in a state of lack of water; 360-degree base for convenient use for right and left-handed people; removable scale filter for cleaning; transparent window water gauge; Illuminated on/off switch; Safety cover with lock; A place to store the power cable in the base body.

40308 IS-RD.name: Red painted stainless steel pyramid electric kettle
40308 IS-RD.description: The kettle combines a classic retro-style 'pyramid' design with a powerful performance of 3000W for extremely fast boiling. It provides an ideal solution for kitchens looking for a combination of aesthetics and functionality. The stainless steel structure ensures high durability over the years, and the designed handle allows for a comfortable grip and safe pouring without leaks. Thanks to the hidden heating element and the removable filter, the maintenance and cleaning of the device is extremely simple.

40309 IS-SS.name: Stainless steel pyramid electric kettle
40309 IS-SS.description: triple protection mechanism (3 safety modes); automatic shutdown after boiling; protection against operation without water; removable and washable scale filter; transparent window with water height gauge; Illuminated power switch; Safety cover with lock; Power cable storage at the base of the device.

BT-K15.name: Black painted stainless steel electric kettle
BT-K15.description: Extremely fast boiling thanks to a powerful heating element; decorative retro design; heat-insulated safety handle to prevent burns; automatic shutdown mechanism when boiling or in the absence of water (protection against dry boiling); Illuminated power switch with indicator light; removable and washable filter to filter limescale and keep the water clean; Easy lid opening for filling and cleaning.

WK-250W.name: Stainless steel electric kettle + white plastic
WK-250W.description: An activation button that includes an indicator light. Safety mechanism that prevents operation without water (protection against dry boiling). A wide and accessible filling opening that allows easy and convenient cleaning of the inside of the kettle. 360 degree base with a dedicated place to store the cable at the bottom.

JK9544.name: White plastic electric kettle
JK9544.description: an automatic shut-off mechanism that cuts off the operation when the water boils; protection against operation without water (dry boiling); removable and washable micron filter to filter scale deposits; a transparent water meter that allows control of the amount of liquid; an indicator light that illuminates during activation; A place to store the power cord at the bottom of the base.

NC-DK1.name: 1.4 liter electric kettle
NC-DK1.description: A double wall structure that provides thermal insulation with Cool Touch technology to prevent burns on external contact and maintain the water's temperature over time. Triple safety mechanism: automatic shutdown when boiling, protection against operation without water (Boil-dry protection) and automatic shutdown when the kettle is lifted from the base. A minimalist design that combines maximum ease of use with easy opening using a button.

5KEKL2221SOB.name: Electric kettle 1.25 liter retro black
5KEKL2221SOB.description: quick and quiet boiling of water; removable and washable scale filter to maintain water quality; A 360-degree base that allows for easy putting and retrieval from any direction; The spout designed to prevent dripping when pouring; internal water level markings for accurate filling; wide filling opening for easy access; On/off button with visual LED indicator; Compact and elegant retro design suitable for small spaces.

TWK4P434.name: Red painted stainless steel electric kettle
TWK4P434.description: Triple protection system SafetyThree: automatic shut-off when boiling, protection against overheating and operation without water, and automatic shut-off when lifting from the base; Convenient one-handed operation including opening the lid at the push of a button; Large and legible water indicator window on both sides of the kettle (suitable for right and left handed); One cup indicator (starting from 300 ml) to save electricity and time; 360 degree base for easy and convenient use; dedicated place to store the power cable in the base; feet to prevent slipping; illuminated power switch.

TWK5P475 DesignLine.name: Blackened stainless steel electric kettle
TWK5P475 DesignLine.description: Cup Indicator for saving energy by boiling the exact amount required; lid opening with one push of a button (90 degree angle); spout designed for easy pouring without dripping; Triple Safety Feature: automatic shut-off when boiling, protection against overheating and operation without water, and automatic shut-off when the kettle is lifted from the base; Large and extremely readable water meter; Integral cable storage at the bottom of the base.

WKWK695-WH.name: White retro luxury electric kettle
WKWK695-WH.description: Built-in analog thermometer (0-100°C) to display the water temperature in real time; Built-in protection mechanism against operation without water (drying); automatic shutdown when boiling; inspection light in the circuit breaker; Luxurious retro design; Maximum ease of use for right and left-handed people thanks to the 360-degree base; Easy to clean and maintain.

TWK3M121 MyMoment.name: White plastic electric kettle
TWK3M121 MyMoment.description: A triple protection system that includes automatic shutdown during boiling, protection against overheating and dry boiling, and automatic shutdown when lifting the kettle from the base; Water level display with 'cup gauge' to save time and electricity by boiling the exact amount required; Easy and convenient opening of the lid with one hand at the push of a button; removable and cleanable stainless steel scale filter; bilateral water level indicator suitable for both right and left hands; Illuminated power switch; Integral cable storage at the base of the device.

WKWK695-SV.name: Luxury retro silver electric kettle
WKWK695-SV.description: Fast and efficient boiling of water in a volume of up to 1.6 liters; Real-time temperature monitoring that enables the preparation of drinks that require specific heat (such as green tea or coffee); Built-in protection against operating without water (Boil-Dry Protection); automatic shutdown upon reaching the boiling point; Full ease of use for right and left hands thanks to the rotating base; Easy maintenance and cleaning thanks to the hidden heating element and removable filter.

SL-7002.name: Cream luxury electric kettle
SL-7002.description: High-quality English STRIX operating mechanism for high safety and reliability; Three protection systems: automatic shutdown after boiling, protection against operation without water (dry boiling) and a protection mechanism against overheating; removable and washable scale filter; transparent window with a legible and clear water meter; Safety cover with lock; Illuminated power switch (LED); A storage compartment for an electric cable at the base of the kettle.

DC-1005.name: White compact travel electric kettle
DC-1005.description: A dedicated electric kettle for travel and trips with an extremely compact design. Includes an indicator light for activation, a rubber base that prevents slipping for increased stability, and a safety protection mechanism. The hidden heating element allows for easy cleaning and convenient maintenance. Suitable for storage in a suitcase or bag thanks to its small dimensions.

SL-7006.name: Green luxury electric kettle
SL-7006.description: A luxury electric kettle with a retro design; 360-degree base that allows convenient use for right and left-handed people; Transparent window with a clear and legible water indicator; Illuminated on/off switch; Three levels of safety: automatic shutdown after boiling, protection against operation without water (drying) and safety shutdown; permanent filter for filtering; Safety cover with lock; A place to store the power cord at the bottom of the base.

HA7616.name: White plastic electric kettle
HA7616.description: Fast and efficient boiling of water in large quantities (up to 1.7 liters) thanks to a powerful heating element; Ergonomic and comfortable use for right- and left-handed users thanks to the rotating base and the double water indicator; Simple and easy maintenance that includes quick cleaning of the removable scale filter; A triple safety system that guarantees maximum protection during use and prevents damage to the device; Clean design that includes cable storage at the base of the device to maintain order in the kitchen.

BT-4612.name: Compact electric kettle for the car
BT-4612.description: A fast and efficient water heating solution for travel and trips; automatic shutdown mechanism at the moment of boiling; Protection against dry operation (prevention of damage in the absence of water); control light indicating operation mode; transparent gauge for checking the water level; Compact and convenient design for storage in the trunk or inside the vehicle.

SL-7005.name: Luxury light blue electric kettle
SL-7005.description: Fast boiling of water for home and office use. A luxurious retro design that combines aesthetics and functionality. Includes a transparent water gauge to control the amount of water in the tank, a control light for activation, and a place to store the cable at the bottom of the device. Ergonomic structure and easy to pour.

BCS711EXT.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with black accessories with 1 battery
BCS711EXT.description: A flexible rod (Flex Tube) that folds at 90 degrees for easy pumping under low furniture; AllFloor DynamicPower brush with LED lighting to detect dirt in dark corners; Auto mode that automatically adjusts the suction power according to the type of surface (carpet vs. floor); Quick Stand function that allows you to stand the rod and the brush while using the manual vacuum cleaner; Easy Parking Clip mechanism for safely placing the vacuum cleaner on furniture during a break; Emptying of all dust is easy and fast without the need to wash the filters.

BCS711PET Unlimited 7 ProAnimal.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with red accessories
BCS711PET Unlimited 7 ProAnimal.description: Motorized ProAnimal brush with LED lighting specially designed for collecting animal hair; A flexible rod (Flex Tube) at 90 degrees that allows pumping under the furniture without the need to bend; ProAnimal mini electric brush for sofas and upholstery; Quick Stand function that allows the rod and the brush to be placed while using the manual vacuum cleaner; Brush release mechanism using the foot without the need to bend; engine adapted for intensive work with a 10-year warranty (subject to registration); Auto mode that automatically adjusts the suction power to the type of surface (carpet or floor).

EF-936.name: Stainless steel electric kettle
EF-936.description: Automatic protection mechanism: self-shutdown in case of boiling or lack of water (protection against dry boiling); Filter: removable and washable filter for limescale filtering; Water window: transparent water level gauge for ease of use; Operation: control light indicating operation mode; Storage: a designated place to store the cable at the bottom of the base.

ATL-773W EASY FILLING.name: Glass electric kettle with white plastic
ATL-773W EASY FILLING.description: EASY FILLING technology: a unique mechanism that allows quick filling of water directly through the lid without the need to open it. Visual display: peripheral blue LED lighting that lights up during operation. Safety: a protection system that automatically shuts off the device in the absence of water (Dry-Boil Protection) and double insulation in the lower part of the tank to prevent burns. Maintenance: a dense stainless steel strainer to prevent the passage of scale and a large upper opening for easy access to clean the inside of the kettle.

HEM-188.name: White painted stainless steel electric kettle
HEM-188.description: a safety protection mechanism that prevents operation without water; automatic shutdown after boiling; A transparent external water level gauge that allows control of the amount of water; control light during operation; removable and washable filter for filtering the water; A place to store the cable at the bottom of the device.

HEM-1761W.name: 2 liter white plastic electric kettle
HEM-1761W.description: A protection mechanism that stops the operation of the kettle in the absence of water; automatic shutdown when the water boils; A transparent gauge on both sides of the device to control the water level; Removable and washable filter to prevent limescale from entering the glass; a control light that illuminates during operation; A place to store the cable at the bottom of the base.

HEM-1762.name: Glass electric kettle
HEM-1762.description: Boil-dry protection mechanism; automatic shutdown mechanism upon reaching the boiling point; Blue internal LED lighting that illuminates the water during operation; removable and washable filter for primary filtration; Safety cover with opening button; A place to store the cable at the bottom of the base.

ATL-774 EASY FILLING.name: Glass electric kettle
ATL-774 EASY FILLING.description: Easy Filling patent: a unique lid that allows water to be filled directly into the kettle without the need to open the lid; Internal blue LED lighting that illuminates the water during operation; Double protection mechanism: automatic shutdown in boiling and protection against operation without water (Dry-Boil Protection); Heat-insulated ergonomic handle for maximum safety.

HEM-1764.name: Black heat-retaining digital electric kettle
HEM-1764.description: Custom temperature selection: range of 40-100 degrees Celsius (including a dedicated setting of 40 degrees for preparing infant milk substitutes); Keep Warm function: maintaining the water temperature for up to two hours; User interface: high-quality touch buttons that are convenient to use in Hebrew; Protection mechanisms: protection against operation without water (Boil-Dry Protection) and an automatic shutdown mechanism; Accessories: a filter built into the pouring spout and a safety button to open the top lid.

KI840830.name: Glass electric kettle
KI840830.description: quick boiling of water thanks to high power; Internal blue LED lighting that illuminates the water while boiling; A safety mechanism that includes automatic shutdown when boiling or in a water shortage situation; Transparent glass design that allows convenient monitoring of the amount of water; Ergonomic handle to prevent slipping and convenient pouring; Easy opening of the lid with the push of a button.

WD213 HYDRO VAC.name: washing machine
WD213 HYDRO VAC.description: The product combines three operations in one device: vacuums dry dirt, washes floors with water and detergent, and performs automatic self-cleaning. Suitable for a variety of surfaces including hard floors, ceramics, marble, parquet and refreshing carpets. Includes odor neutralization technology (Odor Neutralizer) that prevents bad odors inside the device. Self-cleaning mode at the push of a button that cleans the brush and the internal system to prevent the accumulation of dirt and bacteria. Strong suction capacity that enables quick drying of the surface after washing.

HAV-600S.name: Manual vacuum cleaner
HAV-600S.description: Rechargeable manual vacuum cleaner designed for fast and efficient cleaning of the house, car and office. Equipped with a powerful BLDC motor that ensures durability over time and strong pumping power. The vacuum cleaner is suitable for vacuuming upholstery, rails, pet hair and car seats. Includes two charging options (quick charging base or Type-C cable), emptying the dust tank with one click, and a compact ergonomic design that allows convenient one-handed use.

ZHS-32802.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner
ZHS-32802.description: 3-in-1 wireless vacuum cleaner that allows use as a stick vacuum cleaner, a manual vacuum cleaner or a vacuum cleaner for cleaning high places with the help of an extension rod; Motorized brush with 6 front LED lights to detect dust in dark corners and under furniture; Flexible joint for the brush with a rotation range of 150 degrees for easy maneuvering around furniture; Suitable for cleaning a variety of surfaces including hard floors, parquets, carpets and upholstery; Includes a wall docking station for convenient storage and charging; The container can be easily disassembled for emptying and washing without the need for bags.

Vacuum Cleaner G9 Plus.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner
Vacuum Cleaner G9 Plus.description: The vacuum cleaner is equipped with a multi-purpose V-shaped floor brush that prevents hair from tangling and is suitable for all types of surfaces. The system includes a dedicated electric brush for removing dust mites from mattresses and sofas, and a narrow nozzle for cleaning rails and corners. The device allows emptying of dust with one push of a button without contact with the dirt, and includes a removable battery that can be quickly replaced to extend the cleaning time (an additional battery is purchased separately). The carbonless digital motor ensures quiet and powerful work over time.

Vacuum Cleaner G20 Max.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner with accessories
Vacuum Cleaner G20 Max.description: Carbonless digital engine with extremely high speed; Smart dust detection using an infrared sensor that automatically adjusts the suction power; A multipurpose floor brush with built-in LED lighting to detect dirt in dark corners; 12-cone cyclone technology for efficient dust separation; working time of up to 60 minutes in economy mode; Accessories included: small electric brush (for dust mites), 2-in-1 crevice nozzle, and wall stand for charging and storage.

X50 Ultra Complete.name: White robotic vacuum cleaner
X50 Ultra Complete.description: MopExtend™ RoboSwing 3.0 technology that allows the mop arm to open and reach deep corners and under low furniture; DuoScrub™ brush to prevent tangles and intensive carpet cleaning; Smart dirt detection that activates repeated washing if necessary; active self-cleaning of the station base to prevent mud accumulation; An obstacle detection sensor based on artificial intelligence that identifies over 80 types of objects; Built-in voice control and Dreamehome app support.

ED20 Pro Combo.name: Vacuum cleaner with 3 in 1 accessories
ED20 Pro Combo.description: 3-in-1 device that combines a cordless vacuum cleaner, a manual vacuum cleaner and a vacuum cleaner for furniture and rails; Edge-to-Edge cleaning for thorough cleaning close to the panels; A smart infrared sensor that detects dirt and automatically adjusts the water flow and suction power; A self-cleaning system that includes washing the brush and drying to prevent mold and odors; Accessories: a small beating brush for mattresses, a narrow nozzle for rails and a soft dust brush.

ED12 Pro Max.name: washing machine
ED12 Pro Max.description: Vacuums and washes floors and parquets in one operation that combines powerful suction, scrubbing and drying. The device includes a smart dirt sensor (Smart Dirt Sensor) that adjusts the suction power and water flow according to the level of dirt in real time. Edge-to-Edge cleaning on both sides of the brush allows reaching corners and panels within a few millimeters. An advanced self-cleaning system in the docking station that includes washing the brush and quick drying to prevent bad odors and bacteria.
