Complete separation between clean and contaminated water for maximum hygiene.

Q1 14323-IS.name: Manual vacuum cleaner
Q1 14323-IS.description: A manual and wireless vacuum cleaner designed for dry cleaning of light dirt, crumbs and dust. The device is ideal for use at home, in the office and in the car thanks to its light weight and ergonomic design that allows easy access to narrow places. The vacuum cleaner includes an indicator light for the charging status and a transparent collection container that allows you to know when it needs to be emptied easily with the push of a button.

F25 ACE.name: washing machine
F25 ACE.description: Vacuuming, washing and scrubbing hard floors in one operation; FlatStack function that allows the device to lie down at an angle of 180 degrees for cleaning under furniture; A self-cleaning system that includes washing in hot water (60°C) and drying in hot air to prevent odors and bacteria; a smart DirTect sensor that detects the level of dirt and automatically adjusts the suction power and the water flow rate; cleaning close to the walls on both sides of the brush (Edge-to-Edge); LED screen to display battery status and maintenance alerts.

IZ400 STRATOS.name: Cordless vacuum cleaner
IZ400 STRATOS.description: Clean Sense IQ technology: a smart sensor that detects dirt hidden from view and automatically increases the suction power; Anti Hair Wrap Plus technology: an exclusive brush that prevents entanglement of long hair or animal fur on the brush while working; DuoClean PowerFins: double cleaning head suitable for all types of surfaces (floors and carpets) without the need to change heads; MultiFlex rod: flexible rod that folds at 90 degrees for easy vacuuming under low furniture and compact storage; Odor Neutralizer technology: a dedicated odor cartridge inside the vacuum cleaner to prevent bad odors and emit a fresh smell into the room.

eufy E25 Omni.name: Black robotic vacuum cleaner
eufy E25 Omni.description: Vacuuming and washing are combined with MopMaster 2.0 technology, which includes a pair of pressure-rotating cloths for cleaning stubborn stains. Omni docking station for automatic dust emptying, washing cloths and drying in hot air (45°C) to prevent odors and bacteria. AI.See intelligent obstacle avoidance system that recognizes over 100 different objects. Automatic carpet detection lifts the cloths to prevent wetting. Full control through an app, support for voice commands and creation of multi-story maps.

Saros 10R.name: Black robotic vacuum cleaner
Saros 10R.description: Combined cleaning that includes powerful suction and washing with a pair of rotating cloths that reach the edges of the panels. Protection of carpets through automatic lifting of cloths. Detection and avoidance of obstacles in real time (Reactive AI) which includes detection of small objects and pets. Active corner cleaning using a removable brush arm and cloth arm. Built-in voice control (Hello Rocky) and full support for the Roborock application for managing multi-level maps, defining prohibited areas and scheduling work. Full self-maintenance at the docking station includes self-cleaning of the base of the station with hot water to prevent bacteria and odors.

Crosswave Omniforce Edge Pro 4000N.name: washing machine
Crosswave Omniforce Edge Pro 4000N.description: 2-in-1 device that combines suction and washing at the same time or dry suction only (Power Vac mode); Omniforce technology that provides 70% stronger suction power in dry suction mode; Edge-to-Edge design for thorough cleaning adjacent to panels and corners; Turbo mode for treating tough stains; An automatic self-cleaning cycle that cleans the brush and the internal system at the push of a button; Suitable for all types of hard floors (granite, porcelain, parquet, marble) and carpets.

14326-IS Q12.name: Vacuum cleaner with accessories
14326-IS Q12.description: 3-in-1 combined device: vacuum cleaner, washer and wiper; A self-cleaning system that includes drying in hot air (60 degrees) to prevent odors and mold; Double rollers that allow cleaning adjacent to panels and corners; 180 degree flexible body for full reclining under furniture; Smart LED screen showing operating modes and battery level; Voice prompts in Hebrew and English; A special brush for preventing knots (Anti-Tangle); Suitable for a variety of surfaces: floors, parquet, carpets, sofas and mattresses.

CrosssWave OmniFind 4006N.name: washing machine
CrosssWave OmniFind 4006N.description: simultaneous vacuuming and washing of hard floors and carpets; 'Power Mop' technology for removing particularly sticky and difficult stains; 'Tangle-Free' brush that prevents hair from tangling in the suction head; Improved edge cleaning capability; automatic self-cleaning mode at the push of a button; A complete separation system between clean and dirty water.

LUMINATOR ULTRA-50.name: LUMENS 5000 video projector
LUMINATOR ULTRA-50.description: A high-resolution home theater projector for watching movies and games; Wi-Fi connectivity support for wireless screen mirroring (Screen Mirroring) from Android and iOS devices; Internal media player that supports playing files directly from USB memory; Image distortion correction system (Keystone Correction) manually; Full control via remote control attached to the kit.

ATL-050.name: A device for making pita bread
ATL-050.description: A professional electric device (Sage) designed for the quick preparation of a variety of baked goods at home: pita breads, bakes, pizzas, tortillas, crepes and focaccia. The device simulates the operation of a tabon and allows you to get a crispy and high-quality texture in a short time. The wide surface allows for the preparation of particularly large pastries.

SFERA INV 29.name: 2.5 hp air conditioner
SFERA INV 29.description: Inverter technology that enables significant savings in electricity and maintaining a stable temperature in the room. I FEEL function for adjusting the temperature in the room according to the position of the remote control. Hydrophilic coating to maintain the air conditioner for a long time and prevent corrosion. Quiet Function for extremely quiet operation. Auto Restart system to save operating data after a power outage. Option to connect to the Tadiran Connect component for remote control (WIFI). Sleep mode for pleasant sleep and energy saving.

ATL-2777.name: Baking device 4 shapes
ATL-2777.description: A multifunctional home baking device from the My Cake model that allows the preparation of four different types of pastries in one device. The kit includes 4 sets of removable plates with the push of a button for: Belgian waffles, donuts, cakepops (pastry balls) and cartoon characters. The device is designed for quick baking in a few minutes, easy to clean thanks to the unique coating and suitable for convenient storage in the kitchen.

ATL-260.name: Device for making Belgian waffles
ATL-260.description: A professional home appliance for making square Belgian waffles with the taste and texture of a cafe. The device is characterized by the ability to rotate 360 ​​degrees with the help of a folding handle, which guarantees an even distribution of the batter to obtain a crispy waffle on both sides. The device is designed in a compact way that fits into the kitchen and allows for convenient storage. Suitable for quick preparation of desserts and indulgent breakfasts, and includes a recipe booklet for initial preparation.

SL-1016.name: A device for making red radiant pop
SL-1016.description: Making healthy and natural popcorn without the need to use oil or fat; Quick preparation time of about 2 to 3 minutes; An outlet opening with a 'funnel' effect that flows the prepared popcorn directly into the serving bowl; including a dedicated measuring cup located at the top of the device for measuring the exact amount of kernels; A design that allows easy and quick cleaning after use; Compact retro design suitable for convenient storage.

SUPREME INV 370.name: Air conditioner 3.5 hp
SUPREME INV 370.description: Inverter technology for saving up to 50% in electricity consumption and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in WIFI system for remote control via smartphone. 7 speeds for the internal blower for extremely quiet operation (Quiet Function). I-Feel function for adjusting the temperature in the room according to the position of the remote control. 3D air distribution (3D Airflow) for uniform air conditioning throughout the room. PM2.5 filter for filtering toxic particles and improving air quality. Hydrophilic coating on the indoor and outdoor unit to prevent corrosion and maintain the air conditioner over time. Sleep mode for automatic temperature change at night for a comfortable sleep. Self-cleaning (Self Dry) to prevent mold and bad smells.

SFERA INV 10.name: Air conditioner 1 hp
SFERA INV 10.description: overhead air conditioner with Inverter technology that allows saving electricity and maintaining a stable temperature; Includes built-in Wi-Fi connectivity for remote control (IOT); 5 different ventilation speeds for silent operation; Sleep function for comfortable sleep and energy saving; built-in timer; Hydrophilic coating on the internal and external units to prevent corrosion; Auto Restart system to save operating data after a power outage; Digital display hidden on top of the panel.

30G20MA060 (6714).name: Gas stove 30 cm 2 black glass flames
30G20MA060 (6714).description: Domino gas stove with a luxurious design that incorporates black glass; A powerful burner for fast cooking and a small burner for slow and economical cooking; cast iron pot mounts that guarantee maximum stability and uniform heat distribution; smooth glass surface and easy to clean; Simple and safe operation through automatic ignition and advanced safety sensors

SFERA INV 15.name: Air conditioner 1.25 hp
SFERA INV 15.description: Inverter technology for saving up to 50% in electricity consumption and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity (IoT) for remote control via an app. I-Feel function for adjusting the temperature according to the location of the remote control. Sleep mode for restful sleep and prevention of excessive air conditioning at night. Hydrophilic coating on the inner and outer units to protect against corrosion. Internal fan with 5 speeds for silent operation. Auto Restart mechanism to save data after a power outage. Hidden digital display (Hidden Display).

SP2000C-B.name: Air conditioner (heat diffuser) for a bathroom with a black ceramic front
SP2000C-B.description: A heat diffuser (air conditioner) designed to be installed on a wall in bathrooms. Includes a luxurious black ceramic glass front, a built-in electronic thermostat to maintain the room temperature, an automatic shut-off timer, a protection mechanism against overheating, and a sensor to detect an open window that stops the operation of the device to save energy.

SP2000C-W.name: Air conditioner (heat diffuser) for a bathroom with a white ceramic front
SP2000C-W.description: A designed heat diffuser (air conditioner) designed especially for bathrooms and children's rooms; equipped with a ceramic/tempered glass front for a modern look and easy cleaning; includes an adjustable air shutter for optimal heat distribution in the space; ventilation mode only for use in summer days; Fast and efficient heating thanks to the PTC technology that maintains a constant temperature; Resistant to humid conditions in accordance with the safety standards for electrical appliances in the bathroom.

EN80B.name: Black Nespresso Inisia capsule coffee machine
EN80B.description: Fast heating: ready for work in 25 seconds; Automatic shutdown mechanism: after 9 minutes (programmable up to 30 minutes); Programmed buttons: 2 cup sizes (Espresso 40 ml and Longo 110 ml) with the possibility of customization; Capacity of each used capsule: 9-11 units; Collapsible drip tray: allows the use of tall glasses; Energy rating: A.

EWF1141R9SB.name: Washing machine 11 kg UltimateCare 900 black
EWF1141R9SB.description: AutoDose system: smart automatic dosing of washing liquid and softener to prevent wear of the garment and save materials; SensorWash technology: AI-based sensors that detect the level of dirt and adjust the cycle time to remove up to 49 types of stains; UltraMix system: pre-mixing the detergents with the water before entering the drum to prevent soap residues and preserve the color; Vapor Refresh: a steam refresh program to reduce wrinkles by 30% and neutralize odors without complete rinsing; Wi-Fi connectivity: remote control and receiving laundry recommendations through the Electrolux Life app; Woolmark Blue certification: extremely gentle treatment of woolen clothes intended for hand washing only; LoadSensor: displays the weight inside the drum in real time and recommends the optimal amount of laundry.

FQ6IND-487-1F.name: 60 cm 1-phase induction stove
FQ6IND-487-1F.description: Fast heating with induction technology; Booster function for quick power increase; locking mechanism for child safety; residual heat indicator sensor (warning that the surface is still hot); complete thermal separation between the heating ring and the rest of the surface; automatic detection of pots; luxurious and easy-to-clean black ceramic glass surface; A dedicated model that allows work on a domestic single-phase electricity infrastructure.

RF62C7058SR.name: 4-door 649-liter refrigerator with kiosk and internal stainless steel icemaker
RF62C7058SR.description: SpaceMax technology that enables thin sides for maximum utilization of the interior volume without increasing the external dimensions. Dual Auto Ice Maker system that produces two types of ice: cubes and Ice Bites. An internal water dispenser (Internal Water Dispenser) hidden inside the refrigerator for a clean and luxurious exterior. Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity with support for the SmartThings app and AI Energy Mode for smart management and power saving. No Frost system to prevent ice accumulation. Multi Flow air distribution to maintain a uniform temperature.

SP-2807W.name: White electric kettle
SP-2807W.description: Protection mechanism against dry boiling (operation without water), automatic shut-off after boiling, control light for operation, removable and washable filter to filter limescale, transparent water gauge to track the level.

SP-2807C.name: Cream colored electric kettle
SP-2807C.description: An advanced protection mechanism that stops the operation of the device automatically when boiling dry (without water); automatic shutdown as soon as the water reaches the boiling point; transparent water height gauge for maximum visibility; Control light is on while working; Removable and washable filter for limescale filtering; A designated place for storing the cable at the bottom of the base.

PUFF-215W.name: Freezer 6 drawers 174 liters NF
PUFF-215W.description: Advanced NO-FROST technology that prevents the formation of ice on the sides and the ingredients, which eliminates the need for manual defrosting and keeps the food fresh for a long time. The freezer includes 6 transparent pull-out drawers that allow optimal organization and easy access to products while viewing the contents without opening the drawer. The design of the device enables energy-efficient and extremely quiet operation, suitable for a modern living environment.

PVR2D335-WH.name: Refrigerator bottom freezer 335 liters NF
PVR2D335-WH.description: A powerful and efficient cooling system to save energy; Interior lighting and smart distribution for maximum visibility; Reversible door (possibility of changing the right/left opening direction); 3 shelves in the cooling compartment and a wide fruit and vegetable drawer; 3 spacious storage drawers in the freezer compartment; Fully automatic defrosting to prevent ice build-up; Elegant design adapted to modern kitchens

PVR2D335-BK.name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 335 liters NF blackened stainless steel
PVR2D335-BK.description: A powerful cooling system adapted to the Israeli climate (climate classification: ST/N/SN); Fully automatic defrosting to prevent ice build-up; Powerful internal LED lighting; Reversible doors (the opening direction can be changed); Internal division of a cooling compartment: 3 glass shelves, fruit and vegetable drawer, 2 side shelves and a stand for bottles; Freezer compartment internal division: 3 spacious storage drawers.

IL49FQM9500.name: screen 49'
IL49FQM9500.description: Smart TV based on the WebOS 2.0S operating system that offers an intuitive user interface. Support for popular streaming apps including Netflix and Prime Video with dedicated buttons on the remote. Magic Bluetooth remote that includes a pointer (Air Mouse) and support for voice commands. Connectivity: Wi-Fi (2.4G/5G), Bluetooth 5.1 and wired network connection (RJ45). Interfaces: 3 HDMI inputs (2 of which support ARC), 2 USB inputs, optical audio output, AV input and RF input. Frame-less design for a modern look.

X5000 DECT.name: Wireless home phone
X5000 DECT.description: Caller ID to save the last 20 calls. A built-in phone book that allows storage of up to 50 names and numbers. Redial to last 5 numbers. Ringtone selection: 10 types of melodies to choose from with volume control (5 levels). Microphone silencing function (Mute). Key lock to prevent accidental dialing. User-friendly menu for quick operation.

AS7101.name: Landline home phone
AS7101.description: The Uniden AS7101 is a basic and reliable corded phone designed for home or office use. It provides a stable communication solution that works even during a power outage. The device is particularly suitable for small spaces thanks to the possibility of hanging it on the wall and its ergonomic design. It includes the necessary functions to manage calls in a simple and convenient way without complex settings.

ES2710AB.name: Wireless home phone
ES2710AB.description: The Vtech ES2710AB is a digital cordless phone designed for home or office use, offering maximum comfort and simplicity in operation. The device allows identification of incoming calls, management of an internal phonebook, and use of a built-in speakerphone for long calls with minimal effort. The DECT technology ensures a wide range of reception and noise-free audio quality, while the ECO mode optimizes the power consumption and transmission according to the distance from the base.

KX-TGE110.name: Wireless home phone
KX-TGE110.description: Hearing aid compatibility (HAC) in the ETS 300 381 standard. Three dedicated speed dial keys on the extension. Dedicated control button for increasing the volume on the side of the device. Phone book containing up to 50 names and numbers. Blocking unwanted calls (up to 50 numbers). Alarm clock function with 'snooze' option. Support for an identified call (subject to service from the provider). Redial the last 10 numbers. Option to lock keys to prevent accidental dialing. Eco mode for saving energy and reducing radiation.

KX-TGB310MBB.name: Wireless home phone
KX-TGB310MBB.description: Blocking nuisance calls (Nuisance Call Block) up to 50 numbers using a dedicated button. Support for an identified call and call waiting service (subject to the service provider). 20 types of polyphonic melodies to choose from in the wireless extension. An advanced alarm clock function that includes a snooze option. Option to silence the microphone (Mute). Eco mode for saving energy and reducing transmission power. Rounded and compact ergonomic design adapted to a comfortable grip.

KX-TGD313.name: Wireless home phone with 2 additional extensions
KX-TGD313.description:
• Power Back-up Operation: continued operation of the phone during a power outage (when the extension is placed on the base).
• Clear Sound: technology to improve audio quality and reduce background noise.
• Blocking annoying calls: option to block up to 50 specific phone numbers.
• Eco Mode Plus mode: significant reduction of transmission power and radiation.
• Baby monitor function: monitoring noise in the room and sending an alert to another extension or an external number.
• Intercom: internal communication between the extensions, transfer of calls and a conference call between 2 extensions and an outside line.
• Night service (Do Not Disturb): setting hours when the device will not ring.
• Speakerphone: built into the wireless extension.
• Advanced alarm clock: option to set daily, weekly or one-time alerts.

VT-2032-W.name: Wireless phone and white answering machine
VT-2032-W.description: Built-in digital answering machine: recording option of up to 15 minutes with access from the base and the wireless extension; Speakerphone: allows a high-quality hands-free conversation; Phone book: storage of up to 50 names and numbers; Identified call: support for an identified and waiting call (subject to the provision of the service by the communication provider) with a memory for the last 20 incoming calls; Redial: memory for last 5 dialed numbers; Ringtones: 10 types of melodies to choose from with volume control; Additional features: the option to silence the microphone (Mute), lock the keys, and an alarm clock.

KX-TG1612.name: Wireless home phone with 1 additional extension
KX-TG1612.description: A kit that includes a base and two wireless extensions (Handsets). Phone book containing up to 50 names and numbers. Caller ID support with memory for 50 records. Redial to the last 10 numbers. Internal communication (intercom) between the extensions, call transfer and conference call between the extensions and the outside line. Includes an alarm clock, 6 types of ringtones and the option to hang on the wall.

KX-TGD312.name: Wireless home phone with 1 additional extension
KX-TGD312.description: A kit that includes one base unit and two wireless extensions (Handsets); Speakerphone built in extensions; Blocking nuisance calls (Nuisance Call Block) of up to 50 numbers; Eco Mode to reduce transmission power and energy consumption; Power Back-Up Operation: the possibility of making calls during a power outage using a power supply from the extension to the base; Phone book: up to 120 names and numbers (Hebrew support); Support for an identified call service (Caller ID) and identified call waiting; Intercom, transfer of calls and conference calls between extensions; 40 types of ringtones (10 tones and 30 polyphonic melodies); Do Not Disturb/Night Mode; baby monitor function (Baby Monitor); A full multilingual menu including Hebrew, English and Russian; Expansion option for up to 6 extensions in total.

BM-1000.name: Baby intercom
BM-1000.description: High-quality and clear audio communication (Crystal Clear Sound) without interference from Wi-Fi networks or other wireless devices. Enhanced security with data encryption to maintain privacy. The parent unit includes a belt clip for maximum mobility around the house. A visual volume indicator (5 LEDs) that allows you to see the volume of noise in the baby's room even when the parent unit is muted. A particularly sensitive microphone for picking up subtle noises.

VT-2032-B.name: Cordless phone and black answering machine
VT-2032-B.description: Built-in digital answering machine that allows recording of up to 12 minutes; Option to filter calls and listen to messages remotely; adjust the volume at 5 different levels; A selection of 10 ringtones to choose from (5 normal and 5 polyphonic); Mute function; Option to lock keys to prevent wrong dialing; Low battery warning and out of reception range.

HDT-1200B.name: Black home phone
HDT-1200B.description: The Hyundai HDT-1200B is a basic landline phone designed for home or office use, which excels in a compact and decorative structure that saves space. The device allows making calls with clear audio quality, support for various telephone exchanges thanks to the Tone/Pulse selector, and a convenient possibility to redial the last number entered at the press of a button. Its ergonomic design allows comfortable work even when it is mounted on the wall, making it an ideal solution for kitchens, corridors or crowded workstations.

N-5004.name: Shabbat plate 4 pots
N-5004.description: capacity to heat up to 4 pots at the same time; Continuous and uniform heat retention throughout Shabbat and the holiday; Approved for use on Shabbat by the CMT Institute; scratch-resistant and easy-to-clean surface; A safety design that includes air flow to prevent overheating of the surface on which the plate is placed.

HDT-2600B.name: Office phone with monitor
HDT-2600B.description: call identification (Caller ID) in FSK and DTMF standards; support for conference calls; Managing a detailed call log that includes a time display and repeated calls; Decorative and compact design suitable for desktop use in the office or at home; Option to connect another extension.

ML-1002.name: Shabbat plate 2 pots
ML-1002.description: An electric plate intended for placing 2 pots to keep the food warm on Shabbat and the holiday, includes a control light to indicate operation, 2 safety and heat-insulating handles, approved for use on Shabbat by the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute.

EF-94A.name: Shabbat plate 6 pots
EF-94A.description: An electric heating plate intended for use on Saturdays and holidays to keep the food warm; Capacity: suitable for placing 4 pots (it should be noted that according to the manufacturer's specifications the EF-94A model is intended for 4 pots, while the 6-pot model is EF-96); includes a control light for operation; stainless steel elevation legs isolated from the surface; An energy efficient and safe structure for prolonged use.

HDT-2400B.name: Black home phone
HDT-2400B.description: The phone is designed for home or office use and allows high quality landline calls. It includes an ergonomic keyboard with easy-to-press buttons, the option to mute the microphone during a call, and a quick redial function to the last number that called. The device operates using telephone line voltage and does not require an external power source or batteries (in the standard wired model). Its compact design allows space saving on the desktop or convenient hanging on the wall.

HEM-976.name: Double electric heating sheet
HEM-976.description: Separate control: equipped with 2 separate regulators (controllers) that allow independent control of the temperature for each side of the bed; Protection and safety: protection mechanism against overheating; Maintenance: detachable power cable that allows manual washing of the sheet; Convenience: control LEDs in the controllers to indicate operation; Heat levels: a selector that allows you to choose between several intensity levels (usually 3).

HEM-269.name: Shabbat plate 6 pots
HEM-269.description: A huge Shabbat plate designed for heating and cooking food; Estimated capacity: up to 6 pots; Safety and comfort: includes carrying handles, inspection lamp and power cable; Compatibility: suitable for heating all types of pots; Halachic approvals: approved for use on Shabbat by the Scientific and Technological Institute for Halacha and by the 'Junction' Institute; Efficiency: economical in electricity consumption.

HEM-270.name: Shabbat plate 4 pots
HEM-270.description: Shabbat electric plate for heating and cooking; A unique and energy-efficient ceramic heating system protected by a metal rail; High-quality and extremely durable enamel coating; Includes an inspection light and a built-in power cable; equipped with carrying handles; Approved for use on Shabbat by the Scientific and Technological Institute for Halacha (Junction/The Halacha Institute).

HEM-975.name: Single electric heating sheet
HEM-975.description: uniform and pleasant heating of a single bed; one regulator (remote) to control the heat level; Soft touch brass fabric for maximum comfort; Protection against overheating and compliance with international safety standards.

NC303IS.name: CREAMi homemade ice cream machine
NC303IS.description: A home ice cream machine that includes 7 smart programs with one click: Ice Cream, Gelato, Sorbet, Lite Ice Cream, Smoothie Bowl, Milkshake and Mix-In; Unique Creamify technology and mixing in the Creamerizer system to turn frozen ingredients into a creamy and perfect texture in minutes; An advanced digital display panel with a full interface in Hebrew; Possibility of making customized desserts (sugar-free, low-fat, vegan or keto); The containers, lids and blade can be washed in a dishwasher (on the top shelf).

HEM-7013.name: Shabbat plate 4 pots tempered glass and proof
HEM-7013.description: Shabbat plate for heating 4 pots; an easy-to-clean tempered glass surface that does not absorb chemicals; High-quality heaters to keep the food warm; Includes a check light on the front and comfortable grips; Approved for use on Shabbat by the Halacha Technological Institute headed by Rabbi Halperin and by the Israeli Standards Institute; Suitable for use with meat and milk (separately) and for use on Passover without preparation.

BC129W.name: Office refrigerator 90 liters DF white
BC129W.description: Defrosting method: semi-automatic (De-Frost) with internal drainage; Adjustable metal mesh shelf; a transparent drawer for fruits and vegetables with a volume of about 8 liters; interior lighting; Adjustable feet for stability; ergonomic door handle; door shelves for storing bottles and accessories; Includes a device for eggs; Extremely quiet operation.

MR-2 WH.name: White bath heat diffuser
MR-2 WH.description: The heat diffuser is designed for efficient and quick heating of bathrooms, children's rooms and other spaces in the house. Thanks to the tangential blower, the device performs an optimal heat distribution in the room space. The device includes advanced safety mechanisms, including a fireproof body and resistance to moisture conditions. Its compact and innovative design allows for easy installation on the wall while aesthetically fitting into the room.

EMG30D22BM.name: Digital microwave 30 liters integrated black grill
EMG30D22BM.description: UltimateTaste 500 Series; CombiGrill technology that includes 3 programs that combine microwave and grill for optimal cooking and browning results; Crispy Reheat function for reheating that maintains a crispy texture; 12 automatic cooking programs (including pizza, pasta, roast chicken, vegetables, fish and more); Favorite function for saving 3 customized cooking programs; Automatic thawing system by weight or time; digital timer up to 60 minutes; child safety lock; Internal lighting and a quick start function (Quick Start) of 30 seconds.

MS-700.name: Pressure cooker 6 liters black
MS-700.description: A professional multi-chef pot designed for pressure cooking and slow cooking. The device is suitable for quick and efficient preparation of a wide variety of foods such as meat, poultry, fish, soups, rice, vegetables and legumes. The device allows a choice between automatic programs and full manual control over time and pressure level.

EOH5211G.name: Black digital built oven
EOH5211G.description: 4D EvenCooking® technology with active turbo for uniform heat distribution and baking on several levels at the same time; InfiSpace® baking chamber is 20% larger than the standard; 9 cooking and baking programs (active turbo, conventional, bottom heating element, grill, quick grill, grill with turbo, pizza, baking with humidity, lighting); Digital timer with touch display (Touch); CoolDoor door with 2 layers of glass for safety; VelvetClosing® silent closing door; Clear'n Clean coating for easy cleaning of the enamel; EasyEntry rails and a set of telescopic rails; Strong internal halogen lighting.

EQE5600BB.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 572 liters 2 drawers blackened stainless steel
EQE5600BB.description: NutriFresh Inverter compressor for significant energy savings and maintaining temperature stability. TasteLockAUTO technology combined with a NutriPlus filter that preserves freshness, nutritional values ​​and vitamins in vegetables and fruits for up to 7 days. EvenTemp cooling system that guarantees a uniform and accurate temperature in every shelf and compartment. QuickChill (quick cooling) and QuickFreez (quick freezing) functions with an automatic return mechanism to normal mode. DrinkChill function: timer (20-45 minutes) for cooling drinks in the freezer with an alert. The strict Shabbat system is structured with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Transparent SpacePlus drawers for convenient storage. Internal LED lighting and a digital Touch control panel. FlexSpace flexible shelf arrangement. Recessed ergonomic handles.

EW6T4603AM.name: Washing machine 6 kg top opening white
EW6T4603AM.description: SensiCare technology for automatic weighing and adjusting the washing time to the weight; TimeManager to shorten the cycle time; SoftPlus for uniform conditioner distribution; SoftAccess for gentle opening of the door and drum; Quick program for 14 minutes; Platinum heating element with diamond polishing to prevent scale; Diverse programs including anti-allergy with steam, wool/silk, and outerwear; mechanism for balancing the washing in the drum; child lock; LCD monitor and Touch control panel.

SL-4141.name: Pancake maker
SL-4141.description: Simultaneous preparation of up to 6 units of pancakes, omelets or blintzes; including a power regulator (thermostat) to control the degree of heat; A control light that indicates when the device has reached the optimal temperature and is ready for work; easy to clean work surface; heat insulating safety base; Built-in ON/OFF button; Includes accessories: a wooden ladle for removing the pancakes without damaging the coating.

ATL-2702.name: Rectangular "Chef Master" pan
ATL-2702.description: A multi-purpose electric frying pan from the "Chef Master" model designed for cooking, frying, baking and heating a variety of dishes. The product includes a removable mold that is separated from the heating element, allowing direct serving to the table and extremely easy cleaning. The pan is equipped with a heat-proof RESISTANT glass lid to monitor the cooking process and heat-insulated integral handles for maximum safety. Thanks to the rectangular and deep structure, it provides an especially large preparation area suitable for large quantities of food without the need to use stoves.

EW6T3733BM.name: Washing machine 7 kg top opening white
EW6T3733BM.description: SensiCare technology for automatic weighing and adjusting the washing time to the weight; TimeManager to shorten the cycle time; Carbonless inverter motor for quiet and reliable operation; FlexiDoze Plus removable detergent drawer; SoftPlus for uniform conditioner distribution; SoftAccess gentle opening of the door and drum; Woolmark Green certification for delicate wool and silk washing. Various programs: Eco cotton, synthetic, delicate, quick 14 minutes, sports clothes, anti-allergy with steam, duvets, jeans and outerwear. Option to delay start up to 20 hours.

EW1142R9WC.name: Washing machine 11 kg UltimateCare 900 white
EW1142R9WC.description: AutoDose: an automatic dosing system that dispenses a precise amount of detergent and softener according to the weight of the laundry; SensorWash: AI sensors that detect the level of dirt and detergent residues to adjust the washing time and the number of washes; UltraMix: technology that mixes the detergents with the water before they reach the drum for optimal cleaning at low temperatures; Steam Refresh: a steam refresh program to reduce wrinkles and odors without washing; Hygienic Care: removal of 99.9% of bacteria and allergens using steam; IntelliQuick: a variety of quick programs (15 minutes for individual items, 39 minutes for daily washing, 45 minutes for a full machine); Wi-Fi connectivity: control and receive alerts remotely using the Electrolux app; LoadSensor: a weighing sensor that displays the recommended maximum weight and the actual weight; Woolmark Blue certification for extra gentle treatment of woolen clothes.

ATL-066.name: 6.5 liter slow cooker
ATL-066.description: A device designed for slow and healthy cooking of a variety of foods such as soup, meat, poultry and casseroles. The device includes four operating modes for choosing the required heat intensity. Equipped with a control light to monitor the operation of the device. The clay bowl is removable from the base and allows easy serving directly to the table and easy cleaning. The device is approved for use on Shabbat and holidays by the C.M.T. Institute.

ATL-2860.name: Heater 5 spirals + hot steam device
ATL-2860.description: The stove is designed for fast and effective heating of large and medium spaces. The combination of 5 heating elements allows a wide and uniform distribution of heat in the room. The uniqueness of this model is the built-in hot steam device, which prevents the feeling of dryness that characterizes standard spiral ovens and maintains a pleasant humidity level in the air. The device is very convenient to transport between rooms thanks to the built-in wheels and includes adjustment options for personalized power consumption.

3700N.name: A steam cleaning machine that vacuums and rinses
3700N.description: A portable spot cleaning device with HydroSteam technology that combines suction, washing and steam; 3 dedicated cleaning modes: wash (Wash), steam only (Steam only), and combined wash and steam cleaning (Steam&Wash); The steam technology allows the removal of sticky and hard dirt up to 50% faster; A system of two separate tanks that ensures constant cleaning with clean water; Includes built-in wheels for easy mobility; HydroRinse accessory for self-cleaning of the pipe at the end of use; Suitable for a variety of surfaces: sofas, upholstery, carpets, car interior, curtains and tiles.

SIERRA-48.name: ceiling fan 48'
SIERRA-48.description: 6 operating speeds to choose from; winter and summer mode (possibility of changing the direction of engine rotation for efficient distribution of hot or cold air); Full control via remote control; built-in timer for automatic shutdown; 3 color temperature modes for lighting (3000K warm white, 4000K natural white, 6000K cool white); Extremely quiet operation suitable for bedrooms and significant savings in energy consumption.

SIERRA-56.name: ceiling fan '56
SIERRA-56.description: Full control via remote control including speed selection, lighting shade and timer. Winter/summer mode: possibility to change the direction of rotation of the blades for optimal distribution of hot or cold air. IP44 protection allows outdoor installation (covered balconies and pergolas). Extremely quiet DC motor suitable for bedrooms and open spaces. Significant energy savings compared to standard AC motors.

TP-808.name: Stainless steel color milk frother
TP-808.description: The device is intended for preparing a variety of coffee drinks and offers 4 operating modes: hot and thick frothing (for cappuccino), light hot frothing (latte), milk heating and cold frothing (for iced coffee). The foamer is equipped with an automatic shutdown mechanism for safety and thermal insulation to prevent burns. Its interior includes a non-stick coating for quick and easy cleaning.

MK-MG1300.name: Meat grinder 1300 watts
MK-MG1300.description: A powerful electric meat grinder designed for intensive home use. The device includes 3 types of grids (discs) for cutting in different degrees of thickness: thin, medium and coarse, which allow the preparation of a variety of types of food. The grinder is equipped with self-sharpening stainless steel blades and a protection mechanism (Circuit Breaker) that stops the operation of the device in case of overload to preserve the longevity of the motor.

SE-787.name: Quartz heater 2400 watts 4 heating elements
SE-787.description: The oven is based on radiant heating technology (infrared) that allows immediate and focused heating of large spaces and living rooms without the need for a long waiting time. The device is suitable for safe home use thanks to the protection mechanism against overturning. The unique reflector increases the heating effect of each heating element, which ensures high energy efficiency and a deep feeling of warmth.

ATL-930.name: Steam cleaning device
ATL-930.description: thorough cleaning, disinfection and destruction of bacteria and germs without the use of chemical cleaning agents; removing grease, hard dirt and sticky substances from diverse surfaces; Suitable for cleaning windows, blinds, rails, upholstery, kitchens and bathrooms; Includes a full set of accessories: scrubbing brush, window wiper, floor brush, thin nozzle for tight spaces, long main nozzle, flexible threaded hose, measuring cup and filling funnel.

HEM-2163.name: Electric grill
HEM-2163.description: Multipurpose health grill designed for grilling meat, poultry, fish, vegetables and making sandwiches (toasts). The device is equipped with a fat drainage system that includes a removable liquid collection tray, which enables healthier cooking with a reduced amount of fat. The structure of the device allows uniform pressing of the food or full opening to increase the grilling area.

ME308827.name: Meat grinder 1600 watts gray
ME308827.description: The meat grinder Moulinex HV3 ME308827 is a compact but powerful device designed for home and multipurpose use. The device is capable of grinding a variety of types of meat at a fast rate of approximately 1.9 kg per minute. In addition to grinding, the device is used as a food processor for preparing salads thanks to three interchangeable cones that allow the layout and shredding of vegetables and cheeses. The device includes a reverse gear function that prevents hard pieces of meat from getting stuck in the mechanism. The built-in blade is equipped with self-sharpening technology that guarantees consistent grinding results over time.

CHP61.000WH.name: Vegetable chopper
CHP61.000WH.description: The chopper is designed for quick processing of vegetables, fruits, nuts and herbs. The powerful motor and the 4 blade system allow crushing ice and making sauces and spreads. The device includes a dedicated accessory for making homemade mayonnaise easily. Simple one-handed operation by ergonomically pressing the top part. Maximum stability thanks to an anti-slip base ring. Maximum safety with an interlock locking mechanism. The parts of the device (bowl and blades) can be washed in the dishwasher.

ATL-1606.name: A small white 7' lamp
ATL-1606.description: A dual-purpose fan (2 in 1) that allows use as a normal desk fan or as a clip fan fixed with a clip to shelves and tables. The device includes an adjustable head (up/down) for customized air distribution, an extremely dense protective net for maximum safety (suitable for children's rooms), and extremely quiet operation suitable for work and sleep environments.

SE-612.name: Electric sieve
SE-612.description: Fast and efficient sifting of flour, powdered sugar or cocoa with a simple push of a button, prevents the formation of lumps and aerates the flour for perfect baking, ergonomic structure that allows one-handed work, easy to clean and maintain, suitable for small and large quantities for home use.

ATL-2705.name: Integrated grill grill with glass lid
ATL-2705.description: The grill allows grilling a wide variety of foods including meats, fish, vegetables and pastries in a healthy way and without the need to add oil. The cast heating element comes in direct contact with the food, which ensures uniform heat distribution and a significant reduction in the amount of smoke compared to an open grill. The device allows monitoring of the cooking process through the transparent glass lid. Thanks to the removable electric cable, you can place the device in the center of the dining table and use it as a serving dish that keeps the food warm.

B-71.name: Vegetable chopper 2 liters 3 layers of knife blades
B-71.description: The chopper is designed for quick processing and chopping of a variety of food types such as vegetables, fruits, meat, fish, nuts and herbs. The unique structure of the blades in three floors ensures a uniform cut in the entire volume of the bowl in a few seconds. In addition to chopping, the device is capable of whipping eggs and cream and making sauces and spreads (such as mayonnaise). The bowl is especially large and allows working with significant quantities, and is easy to disassemble and clean.

RF65DB970E22.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 645 liters with kiosk and transparent window, black
RF65DB970E22.description: Transparent See-Thru Door with automatic lighting that allows you to view the contents of the refrigerator without opening it. An internal Beverage Center that includes a water spout and an automatic filling jug (1.4 liters) without BPA. Dual Auto Ice Maker (regular cubes and Ice Bites). The FlexZone zone allows variable temperature setting in 5 modes (freezing to cooling drinks). Smart energy savings using SmartThings AI Energy Mode (up to 10% savings). Automatic door opening by touch (Auto Open Door). Metal Cooling technology to maintain temperature stability and a built-in UV Deodorizer odor filter.

HEM-215.name: Vegetable chopper with glass bowl
HEM-215.description: Powerful chopping of vegetables, fruits, meat and nuts; Includes a dedicated accessory for peeling dry garlic cloves; Simple operation by pressing (Pulse); Rubber base to prevent slipping and maximum stability while working; Bowl and blades that can be quickly disassembled for easy cleaning.

HEM-213.name: Deep frying pot 2.5 liters white
HEM-213.description: Deep frying pot designed for making chips, schnitzels and a variety of fried foods; Includes a lid with a large viewing window that allows you to monitor the frying process without opening the device; Built-in charcoal filter to reduce odors and filter vapors; A frying basket with a folding handle that allows the food to be lifted and lowered; The body of the device is heat insulated (Cool Touch) for user safety; Compact white design suitable for home use.

ATL-9914.name: Deep frying pot 1.5 liters
ATL-9914.description: Deep frying pot designed for home use for frying chips, schnitzels and a variety of foods. Includes a lid with a large viewing window that allows you to monitor the progress of the frying without opening the device. Equipped with a permanent filter to filter odors and smoke. The inner container is coated with a quality non-stick material to prevent sticking and easy cleaning. A stainless steel frying basket that includes a detachable and folding handle that allows the basket to be lifted and lowered safely.

HEM-233.name: Deep frying pot 2.5 liters black
HEM-233.description: Electric frying pot designed for fast and efficient deep frying; Equipped with a lid that includes a large viewing window that allows you to monitor the progress of the frying without opening the device; Fixed charcoal filter in the lid to prevent frying smells at home; Inner bowl with high-quality non-stick coating to prevent sticking and easy cleaning; A frying basket with a folding handle that allows the food to be lifted and lowered; Cool touch sides for maximum safety during use.

DPA144.name: Food chopper 1000 watts
DPA144.description: The product is designed for quick and efficient cutting of a variety of food types: meat (up to 330 grams), onions, garlic, herbs, nuts, almonds and hard cheeses. Suitable for making sauces, spreads, purees and baby food. Includes a safety mechanism that prevents the blades from operating when the lid is not properly closed. The parts of the device (container, lid and blade) can be washed in a dishwasher.

ATL-072.name: 1.8 liter rice cooker
ATL-072.description: automatic and fast rice cooking; Automatic transition to the Keep Warm mode after the cooking is finished; Control LEDs indicating cooking mode and heat preservation mode; heat-insulated handles (Cold Touch) for user safety; easy to clean and operate; Suitable for preparing different types of rice, quinoa and other grains.

KMS851.name: Stand mixer with bowl 5 liters 1000 watts white
KMS851.description: The mixer is intended for home use and specializes in kneading doughs, whipping and mixing. The powerful engine enables the processing of heavy and massive mixtures in a uniform way thanks to the planetary movement. The device includes a transparent splash guard equipped with a feed window for adding ingredients while working without dirt. The accompanying accessories (kneading hook, guitar hook and beater) allow a perfect adjustment to different types of baked goods, from chosh cakes to bread and yeast doughs.

AHY-205 RED.name: Stand mixer with bowl 5 liters 1000 watts red
AHY-205 RED.description: The mixer is intended for a wide range of domestic use, which includes kneading yeast doughs (breads, challahs, pizzas), whipping proteins and cream at high speed, and mixing doughs for cakes and pies. The powerful motor allows work with heavy masses relative to the volume of the bowl. The device is characterized by a modern design in metallic red color and simple operation convenience.

MFW68640.name: Meat grinder 2200 watts
MFW68640.description: A powerful meat grinder from the ProPower series designed for intensive and fast work; able to process large amounts of meat in a short time thanks to the powerful engine; The device is versatile and allows not only grinding meat but also grating and slicing vegetables, hard cheeses and nuts using the dedicated drums; Includes overload protection to preserve engine life; Easy to store thanks to the built-in storage compartments for accessories.

MFW3X10W.name: Meat grinder 2000 watts
MFW3X10W.description: CompactPower series meat grinder that combines high power with a compact and space-saving design. The device is able to process large quantities of meat quickly and efficiently. Includes an integrated storage compartment in the body of the device for the grinding nets, an ergonomic carrying handle and rubber feet for maximum stability while working. The double-sided knife ensures correct assembly every time and extends the life of the blade.

ME620132.name: Meat grinder 2000 watts
ME620132.description: A powerful meat grinder from the HV8 series designed for intensive home use; includes a REVERSE function that allows easy release of blockages and meat residues; equipped with a self-sharpening knife to maintain cutting quality over time; includes built-in storage compartments in the body of the device for the accompanying accessories and for the power cable; Suitable for preparing a variety of types of ground meat, koba and meatballs.

ATL-246.name: Device for making hot dogs
ATL-246.description: The device is intended for quick and homemade preparation of sausages in a bun. It allows steaming up to 6 hot dogs at the same time in a dedicated container that preserves their juiciness, and at the same time heating and firing two buns using the stainless steel spikes. The device is very easy to operate, cleans easily and is suitable for safe home use.

HB1212B.name: Stick blender with accessories 1200 watts black
HB1212B.description: making hot soups (heat-resistant), smoothies and cocktails; Chopping vegetables, nuts and meat using an 800 ml chopper accessory; whipping eggs and cream using a dedicated whisk accessory; the kit includes a 600 ml measuring cup and an ergonomic stand for orderly storage of all accessories.

35014-IS.name: Deep frying pot 1.5 liters
35014-IS.description: Deep frying device (chipser) designed for preparing a variety of fried foods such as chips, chicken and vegetables. The device includes a thermostat for precise temperature control, a viewing window that allows you to monitor the cooking process without opening the lid, and a modern and compact design suitable for home kitchens.

EF-330.name: Showcase refrigerator 230 liters with freezer compartment
EF-330.description: A designed showcase refrigerator designed for displaying drinks and food in an aesthetic and convenient way. The device includes a built-in internal freezer compartment that allows keeping small frozen products or ice at the same time as the ongoing cooling. Especially suitable for offices, private rooms, kiosks and points of sale. The compact structure allows maximum utilization of the storage space while maintaining full visibility of the products through the glass door.

DF5200.name: Deep frying pot 4 liters
DF5200.description: Cool Zone technology that prevents food crumbs from burning at the bottom of the tank and keeps the oil clean and clear for a long time; Complete and convenient disassembly for thorough cleaning of all parts of the device; removable oil tank for emptying and easy washing; A lid that includes a large viewing window to monitor the progress of the frying and a permanent filter to filter odors and eliminate vapors; Overheating protection mechanism.

HB1212W.name: Stick blender with accessories 1200 watts white
HB1212W.description: A multifunctional device that combines 3 functions in one device: stick blender, food chopper and whisk. Especially suitable for crushing and mixing hot soups directly in the pot, making smoothies, cocktails and sauces. Ability to chop vegetables, nuts and herbs using the chopper container, and whipping eggs or cream with the whisk accessory. The device includes a particularly quiet and powerful motor that allows for prolonged and efficient work.

TX-209.name: Baking device 4 shapes
TX-209.description: A multi-cooker device that allows the preparation of four different types of pastries by changing the plates: Belgian waffles, donuts, cupcakes and muffins/popcakes; The plates are easily removed at the push of a button for cleaning and washing; The device enables fast and uniform baking without the need to use a lot of oil thanks to the non-stick coating; Compact design that allows storage while standing up to save space.

MS8CM6190.name: Stick blender with accessories 1000 watts
MS8CM6190.description: A multifunctional all-in-one kit that includes an advanced food processor accessory that allows cutting, spreading, scraping and even kneading dough. The accompanying accessories include: a universal chopper, a dedicated knife for crushing ice, a stainless steel whisk for making whipped cream and egg foam, and a transparent measuring and mixing container that includes a lid for storage. All plastic parts that come into contact with food are BPA-Free (without bisphenol A). The blender foot and accessories (except the motor and transmission parts) can be washed in the dishwasher. The system is suitable for processing particularly difficult components and preparing a wide variety of recipes.

MS6CB61V5.name: Stick blender with accessories 1000 watts
MS6CB61V5.description: A built-in vacuum system (Fresh Vacuum System) that includes a vacuum pump to keep the food fresh for a long time in the refrigerator or freezer; Comprehensive accessory set: 1.2 liter vacuum container, 6 reusable vacuum bags (3 1.2 liter and 3 3.8 liter), chopper for chopping herbs, nuts and cheese, stainless steel whisk for whipping egg whites and cream, and a 600 ml measuring cup with lid; ergonomic SoftTouch handle for a safe and comfortable grip; Protection against splashes (AntiSplash); accessories can be washed in the dishwasher (except for the engine and transmission parts).

EW6T4723AM.name: Washing machine 7 kg top opening white
EW6T4723AM.description: SensiCare system: continuous automatic weighing that adjusts the washing time, water and energy to the weight of the load to prevent overwashing. TimeManager: Option to shorten the washing cycle time to save time and energy. SoftPlus technology: ensures uniform distribution of the softener in the fabric fibers. Anti-Allergy Vapor program: combining steam to remove bacteria and allergens. Woolmark Blue certification: gentle and safe treatment of wool items that require hand washing. Various programs: Eco cotton, fast (14 minutes), sports clothes, jeans, and baby clothes. Delayed start option up to 20 hours.

EW5T7612AM.name: Washing machine 6 kg top opening white
EW5T7612AM.description: SensiCare technology that adjusts the cycle time, water and energy according to the weight of the laundry to prevent overwashing; Eco TimeManager function that allows the user to shorten the length of the washing cycle as needed; Anti-Allergy Vapor program that combines steam to remove bacteria and allergens from clothes; Possibility of delayed activation; Various programs including: cotton, synthetic, delicate, wool/silk, quick wash (20 minutes), and drain/spin.

Minipimer 1 MQ10.001MWH.name: 450 watt hand blender
Minipimer 1 MQ10.001MWH.description: The blender is designed for quick and easy mixing of soups, sauces, smoothies and baby food. The design of the device is extremely compact and lightweight, allowing comfortable one-handed work. The power button is large and accessible, and the PowerBell technology ensures uniform mixing results while keeping the work environment clean from splashes.

MSM4W421 ErgoMaster.name: Stick blender with accessories 800 watts
MSM4W421 ErgoMaster.description: Making smoothies, smoothies and soups with a smooth texture. Quick chopping of meat, hard cheeses, nuts, herbs and onions using a chopper (500 ml). Whipping egg whites, whipped cream and airy desserts using a stainless steel whisk. Mixing and measuring container (600 ml) which includes a lid to keep it fresh in the refrigerator. Accessories can be washed in a dishwasher (except for the engine and transmission parts).

MSM2650B CleverMixx.name: Stick blender with accessories 600 watts
MSM2650B CleverMixx.description: preparing purees, soups, smoothies and sauces quickly thanks to a powerful motor and AntiSplash design that prevents splashing; Effective chopping of herbs, nuts, hard cheeses, onions and meat using the universal chopper; whipping cream, egg whites and making light batters for cakes and pancakes using the whisk; convenient storage of the food in the refrigerator directly in the work tool thanks to the attached lids; Simple operation with one push of a button and ergonomic design for a comfortable and safe grip.

MQ100 CURRY.name: 450 watt hand blender
MQ100 CURRY.description: The MultiQuick 1 series blender is designed for mixing, grinding and preparing purees, sauces, smoothies and soups with a smooth texture. Includes a removable stainless steel leg with the EasyClick method for easy replacement and cleaning. The device is equipped with SplashControl technology to keep the kitchen free from splashes during work. The kit includes a 600 ml measuring cup (beaker) with milliliter and fl oz markings.

MSM14000 CleverMixx.name: 400 watt stick blender
MSM14000 CleverMixx.description: A stick blender from the Bosch CleverMixx series designed for mixing, making smoothies, sauces and purees (puree) quickly and efficiently. The device is characterized by an ergonomic design adapted to the palm of the hand for easy work without fatigue. The blender's foot is designed to prevent splashes (AntiSplash) to keep the work environment clean. The motor is quiet and has low vibration despite its power. The parts of the device (except the motor unit) can be washed in the dishwasher.

MSM6M810 ErgoMaster.name: Blender rod 1200 watts
MSM6M810 ErgoMaster.description: ErgoMaster Series 6 stick blender designed for hard work; ability to crush particularly hard components and mix to a smooth texture; One-handed operation thanks to an ergonomic non-slip handle; Safety locking mechanism for easy release of the accessories; suitable for making smoothies, soups, spreads, whipping proteins and chopping vegetables and nuts; Durability over time thanks to German engineering and the use of ceramic components instead of plastic in the drive mechanism.

Multiiblend.name: Stick blender with accessories 1200 watts
Multiiblend.description: The product is a multi-purpose stick blender designed for mixing, cutting, chopping and whipping both hot and cold food. The device is suitable for preparing soups, smoothies, sauces, baby food and chopping spices and nuts. The kit includes accessories: a chopper container (500 ml) with a lid to preserve freshness, a transparent measuring and mixing cup (800 ml) with lids, and a stainless steel whisk head for whipping eggs and cream.

MultiQuick 3 MQ3020 Pesto.name: Stick blender with accessories 700 watts
MultiQuick 3 MQ3020 Pesto.description: The blender is designed for mixing, chopping and grinding a variety of ingredients. The pesto set includes a dedicated chopper that is especially suitable for preparing sauces, chopping herbs, nuts, hard cheeses, onions and carrots in seconds. The bar enables the preparation of soups, smoothies and baby food with an especially smooth texture thanks to the extended cutting blade, which also handles large pieces of food with maximum efficiency.

MQ100-SOUP.name: Plastic stick blender 450 watts
MQ100-SOUP.description: The blender is designed for mixing, grinding and preparing soups, sauces, smoothies and baby food. Braun's unique PowerBell technology combines steel blades at opposite angles with a bell-shaped leg to prevent splashing (SplashControl) and achieve uniform and fast mixing results with one push of a button.

HEM-2168.name: 250 watt hand mixer
HEM-2168.description: The mixer is designed for home and multi-purpose use that includes whipping, mixing and kneading. It is suitable for making whipped cream, at night for cakes, sauces and kneading light doughs. The device is characterized by a compact and lightweight design that allows for an ergonomic and comfortable grip over time, while providing precise control over the texture of the mixture.

HR3740/00.name: 450 watt hand mixer
HR3740/00.description: Viva Collection series hand mixer designed for mixing, whipping and kneading. The device is equipped with conical beaters that allow maximum air introduction for an airy texture and a shorter whipping time. The powerful motor makes it possible to deal with difficult doughs. Includes an Eject button to remove the accessories with one click, an ergonomic handle to prevent slipping, and accessories that can be washed in the dishwasher (2 beaters and 2 kneading hooks).

ATL287A.name: Hand mixer includes a 5 liter bowl
ATL287A.description: Dual-purpose combined device (2 in 1): can be used as a standing mixer on a base with a rotating bowl for 'hands-free' work, or as a removable manual mixer for free work inside other bowls. The device is intended for whipping eggs and whipped creams, mixing at night for cakes and kneading light to medium doughs. The rotating bowl ensures reaching all parts of the mixture and a uniform texture. The device is easily disassembled for convenient cleaning and maintenance.

HM1010W.name: 450 watt hand mixer
HM1010W.description: The MultiMix 1 series mixer is designed for quick whipping of eggs and cream, overnight mixing for cakes and kneading soft doughs. The device is equipped with a quiet and lightweight motor that provides maximum comfort during prolonged use. EasyClick technology allows simple and quick replacement of the accessories using a spring release button. Ergonomic design that ensures a stable and safe grip.

37571-S.name: Multipurpose cooking pot
37571-S.description: A multifunctional device that combines a rice cooker, a steamer and a frying pan. Includes 6 built-in cooking programs: white rice, whole rice, hot cereal/oats, steam cooking, and sauté that allows preliminary frying of ingredients before cooking. The device includes a delay timer (Delay Start) for future timing and an automatic keep warm function (Keep Warm) that is activated at the end of cooking. Allows cooking on two floors - cooking rice or grains on the bottom and steaming vegetables or protein in the upper basket at the same time.

HM300.name: Hand mixer includes a 2.5 liter bowl
HM300.description: Sauter's HM300 mixer is an integrated device that allows use as a portable hand mixer or as a stationary mixer mounted on a stand with a bowl. The device is suitable for a wide range of tasks in the kitchen, from whipping egg whites and whipped creams to mixing cakes and pies at night. Its unique design allows for easy and convenient assembly and disassembly for cleaning and storage, and the rotating bowl ensures a uniform texture and extremely stable foam.

HB1000.name: Stick blender with accessories 1000 watts
HB1000.description: A multi-purpose kit that includes a 500 ml chopper (chopper), an 800 ml measuring cup and a stainless steel whisk. The device is suitable for chopping vegetables, meat and nuts, making smoothies, sauces, soups, baby food and whipping eggs or cream.

HEM-2616.name: Double induction cooker with buttons
HEM-2616.description: 9 levels of cooking intensity to choose from; Operation using digital front switches (buttons); protection against overheating; automatic safety shutdown mechanism; child safety lock; Suitable for use on the counter; Automatic identification of pots suitable for induction.

SE-947.name: Stainless steel 3-burner gas stove
SE-947.description: A powerful tabletop gas stove intended for use indoors, on balconies or in outdoor conditions (camping). The stove includes rotary control regulators that allow precise adjustment of the flame intensity in each individual burner. The stainless steel structure ensures durability over time and easy and quick cleaning of the cooking surface. The stove is equipped with a built-in lid that protects the burners during storage and serves as a splash guard during use. Very suitable as an additional cooking solution for the holidays (ideally for Passover) or for housing units.

EF-732.name: Double ceramic cooktop with buttons
EF-732.description: extremely fast heating that reaches working temperature in a few seconds; full compatibility with all types of pots and pans (no need for dedicated cooking utensils); maintaining a constant temperature over time for precise cooking; high mobility suitable for use in homes, housing units, offices and camping; A smooth glass surface that allows easy and quick cleaning using only a damp cloth.

MFQ4930B.name: 850 watt black hand mixer
MFQ4930B.description: The mixer from the prestigious Styline series is equipped with FineCreamer technology: a pair of innovative beaters that include small balls for increased air introduction to obtain more airy whipped cream or egg foam in a short time. The device includes 2 stainless steel kneading hooks for working with hard doughs. The motor is powerful but extremely quiet, with an ergonomic design that includes a soft grip handle (SoftTouch) to prevent slipping. All plastic parts that come into contact with food are BPA-free. The accessories can be washed in the dishwasher and there is a separate exhaust system for quick replacement of the accessories.

BXHBA1501E.name: Stick blender with accessories 1500 watts
BXHBA1501E.description: The product is intended for mixing, chopping, whipping and grinding a wide variety of foods. Thanks to the powerful motor (1500W), the device is able to handle particularly difficult components and produce a smooth texture in seconds. Suitable for making soups, sauces, smoothies, purees, chopping vegetables, nuts and whipping cream or eggs. The parts of the device can be quickly disassembled and washed in a dishwasher (except for the motor unit).

5KHBL1321EOB.name: Blend rod 180 watts
5KHBL1321EOB.description: Classic series rod blender designed for mixing, crushing and making purees. Suitable for making soups, smoothies, sauces and baby food. The device includes an 'S' design blade for optimal performance. The kit includes a BPA-free 700 ml mixing jug with a dedicated lid. The mixing rod can be easily removed and is suitable for washing in the dishwasher (on the top shelf). Ergonomic design allows for a comfortable and safe grip while working.

HEM-202.name: Double cooking stove with metal heads
HEM-202.description: Double electric cooking stove intended for cooking and frying in places where there is no gas infrastructure. The device is suitable for use in homes, offices, housing units and camping. The metal heads (casting) are characterized by maintaining heat for a long time and distributing heat evenly over the surface of the vessel. The familiarity allows simultaneous work on both plates at different heat intensities according to the user's needs.

HEM-7012.name: Double ceramic cooktop with buttons
HEM-7012.description: Fast and efficient heating adapted to all types of pots and pans; heat-insulated side handles for safety and portability; built-in protection mechanism against overheating; Control LEDs for hot surface warning and operation; Wide and especially stable base to prevent slipping; The glass surface is smooth and easy to clean.

HEM-201.name: A single cooktop with a metal head
HEM-201.description: A single electric cooking stove designed for home, office or field conditions (camping); equipped with automatic heat control that maintains a constant temperature according to the setting; The base of the device is wide and stable to prevent slipping while working; The device is compact and portable, cleans easily and provides a quick and efficient cooking solution in places where there is no access to gas.

SL-7766I.name: Single digital induction cooktop
SL-7766I.description: Fast and economical cooking with induction technology that produces heat directly in the cookware; A safety mechanism that includes automatic detection of pots and child lock; built-in protection against overheating and a self-cooling mechanism; smooth surface without splits for easy and quick cleaning; Extremely thin 'Slim' design that allows high mobility and convenient storage; Suitable for use on the counter or as an additional extension for cooking at home and outside.

SL-6633.name: Double ceramic cooktop with buttons
SL-6633.description: A powerful double ceramic stove that enables fast and efficient cooking in two centers at the same time; Suitable for all types of pots and pans (including glass, aluminum and stainless steel); includes 9 built-in cooking programs for customization; equipped with heat-insulated handles for safe and comfortable carrying; The flat glass surface allows easy and quick cleaning after use; Includes a control light that warns when the surface is still hot.

SL-1155.name: Single digital ceramic cooktop
SL-1155.description: The stove is suitable for working with all types of pots and pans (stainless steel, aluminum, cast iron and more) without the need for special tools; Allows for a variety of cooking operations, from quick boiling and frying to slow cooking; includes a built-in control system in the body of the device for easy and convenient cleaning; A safety mechanism that includes a child lock to prevent unwanted activation; A self-cooling mechanism to protect the device components and extend the life of the product; Slim design that allows portability and convenient storage.

SL-6655.name: Digital ceramic double cooktop
SL-6655.description: A double ceramic stove based on infrared technology, suitable for all types of cookware (including glass, aluminum, stainless steel and ceramic); fast and energy-saving heating; 10 variable intensity levels for each individual burner; Overheating protection mechanism; child safety lock; an easy-to-clean surface without stuck-on food residues; Modern 'Slim' design that allows portability and use in small kitchens, offices or for trips.

STH3000/20.name: Vertical steam iron 1000 watts
STH3000/20.description: 3000 series vertical steam iron with a compact and foldable design intended for convenient use at home and on trips; Allows fast vertical ironing without the need for an ironing board; Safe to use on all types of ironable fabrics (including delicate fabrics such as silk) without fear of fabric burns; The steam technology kills up to 99.9% of bacteria and 100% of dust mites; Ideal for refreshing clothes, removing odors and disinfecting curtains and bedding; Includes an indicator light that indicates when the device is ready for operation.

FV6870.name: Steam iron option for vertical ironing 2800 watts
FV6870.description: Fast and efficient ironing thanks to a combination of high power and powerful steam output; Easy and smooth sliding on the fabric thanks to the advanced bottom technology; A vertical ironing option that allows the removal of wrinkles from hanging clothes, jackets and curtains; Optimum vapor distribution throughout the bottom area; Easy and simple maintenance that extends the life of the device through convenient descaling; Eco mode for saving electricity consumption while maintaining performance.

FV1713.name: Normal steam iron 2000 watts
FV1713.description: Virtuo series steam iron designed for quick and easy ironing; includes the option of vertical ironing to refresh clothes on a hanger or curtains; Built-in anti-calc system to remove limescale and maintain the performance of the device over time; Ergonomic steam trigger located at the bottom of the handle for maximum comfort; Compact design and light weight that reduces strain during use.

FV9845.name: Normal steam iron 3200 watts
FV9845.description: A unique Micro-Calc filtration system that prevents scale stains on clothes and ensures clean steam. Extremely fast heating thanks to the high power. Comfortable and easy sliding on the fabric thanks to the advanced sole technology. Automatic adjustment of the steam intensity according to the selected temperature. Wide water filling opening for maximum comfort.

SV6131G0.name: Professional steam iron 2400 watts
SV6131G0.description: A powerful steam iron from the Express Easy series that provides results up to 3 times faster than a normal steam iron. The device includes a vertical ironing function to refresh hanging clothes and curtains, Eco mode to save energy, and Calc Clear technology for simple maintenance against scale without the need for cartridges. The device is equipped with a locking system for the base for safe storage and carrying, and an automatic shutdown mechanism for maximum safety.

GV9550.name: Steam iron option for vertical ironing 2600 watts
GV9550.description: A powerful steam iron from the Pro Express Ultimate series that includes High Pressure Boiler technology for professional results. Supports vertical ironing for refreshing hanging clothes and curtains. Equipped with an intuitive control panel with 5 presets for an optimal combination of temperature and steam. Includes the Protect System that prevents water stains on the garment by turning drops into steam, and extremely quiet operation for maximum ease of use.

DT1020G0.name: Vertical steam iron 1200 watts
DT1020G0.description: A vertical steam iron from the Pure Pop series designed for fast and daily use and for travel. The device includes a smart reversible head system that allows an easy transition between a side for removing lint and hair and a velvety side that protects delicate fabrics from damage. The powerful steam helps disinfect the garment and destroy up to 99.9% of bacteria and germs, while neutralizing unpleasant odors. The ergonomic and slim design allows for convenient storage in a travel bag and use without the need for an ironing board.

SL-8822I.name: Double digital induction cooktop
SL-8822I.description: Fast and economical cooking with induction technology that transfers heat directly to the cookware. Automatic detection of pots suitable for induction. A safety mechanism that includes protection against overheating and child lock. Separate and precise control of the intensity of heat and temperature for each cooking center. Modern slim design, portable and easy to clean and maintain.

GC524/60.name: Vertical steam iron 1600 watts
GC524/60.description: EasyTouch Plus vertical steam iron designed for refreshing clothes and removing wrinkles quickly. The device is equipped with a particularly large StyleBoard plate that provides support and stability throughout the garment. Safe to use on all types of ironable fabrics, including silk and delicates, without fear of burns. The Easy De-calc function enables simple descaling to extend the life of the device. The large tank allows prolonged ironing without the need for frequent refilling.

PSG7040/10.name: Professional steam iron 2100 watts 8 bar
PSG7040/10.description: OptimalTEMP technology: ironing all types of ironable fabrics (from real to jeans) without the need for temperature control and without the risk of burns; SteamGlide Elite sole: premium sole for optimal sliding and high resistance to scratches; Easy De-Calc system: easy descaling to maintain steam performance and extend the life of the device; Carry Lock mechanism: safety locking of the iron to the base for easy carrying; Automatic shutdown (Auto-off): safety self-shutdown and energy saving; Suitable for use in tap water.

2505-HEM.name: Wireless steam iron 2200 watts
2505-HEM.description: Wireless ironing that allows full freedom of movement without a cable that interferes with the operation. Support for vertical ironing to remove wrinkles from hanging clothes and curtains. Anti-Calc system to prevent limescale build-up. Anti-Drip system to prevent water dripping at low temperatures. Self-Clean function to keep the iron in good condition over time. Option to spray front water spray and a powerful steam blast.

26483-56.name: Normal steam iron 2400 watts
26483-56.description: The iron from the Light & Easy Brights series allows efficient and fast ironing thanks to a combination of powerful power and a particularly smooth ceramic bottom. The vertical ironing feature allows clothes to be refreshed on hangers or curtains easily. The automatic steam technology optimizes the ironing process and guarantees excellent results without the need for complicated settings.

19795-IS.name: Normal steam iron 3000 watts
19795-IS.description: A variety of work options including steam ironing, dry ironing and powerful vertical ironing to refresh hanging clothes and suits. The device is equipped with a three-stage Anti-Calc system to prevent scale accumulation, an Anti-Drip system to prevent water dripping at low temperatures, and a Self-Clean function for self-cleaning. Includes a water spraying button (Spray) and a Soft Touch handle for a comfortable grip and prevention of sweating.

HEM-268.name: Professional steam iron 2400 watts
HEM-268.description: Powerful vertical ironing ability to refresh curtains and suits, manual temperature regulator to adjust to different types of fabrics, overheating protection system, Self-Clean mechanism for cleaning limescale, control light to monitor the working temperature, option for dry ironing or steam ironing.

2501-HEM.name: Normal steam iron 3000 watts
2501-HEM.description: Powerful steam ironing to remove particularly difficult wrinkles; Option for vertical ironing designed for curtains, suits and hanging clothes; adjustable temperature regulator that allows precise adjustment to different types of fabrics (cotton, wool, silk and synthetic); very fast heating of the surface thanks to the high power; Ergonomic and comfortable handle for prolonged work; Spray button for softening hard fabrics.

WW80FG5L32AB.name: Blackened stainless steel 8 kg washing machine
