WW80FG5L32AB.description: AI EcoBubble technology that turns soap into bubbles for deep cleaning even in cold water; Hygiene Steam program for steam disinfection and removal of 99.9% of bacteria and allergens; Super Speed ​​program for fast washing in 39 minutes; 15 minute quick program; Drum Clean+ for self-cleaning of the drum; SmartThings app support for remote monitoring and control; Ceramic heating element to reduce scale build-up; built-in surge protector and lightning; Diamond Drum for maintaining the fabric fibers.

GC1744.name: Normal steam iron 2000 watts
GC1744.description: EasySpeed ​​series steam iron designed for efficient and fast ironing. The device features a 'Triple Precision' ironing tip designed with a pointed tip, button slot and an ergonomic nose design for reaching hard to reach areas. Equipped with a built-in 'Calc-clean' scale cleaning system (slider) to maintain steam performance over time. Includes a built-in spray function to soften the fabric and vertical ironing capability to refresh hanging clothes.

WW90DG5U35TE.name: Washing machine 9 kg full white color
WW90DG5U35TE.description: AI Ecobubble™ technology that produces bubbles for deep cleaning even in cold water; AI Energy mode through the SmartThings app to save up to 70% on electricity consumption; Hygiene Steam - a steam program that eliminates 99.9% of bacteria and allergens; SpaceMax - a design that provides a large internal volume in standard external dimensions; Super Speed ​​- program for complete washing in 39 minutes; Drum Clean+ for self-cleaning of the drum and removal of odors; the StayClean drawer that cleans soap residue automatically; Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity for remote control and receiving laundry recommendations.

WW80FG5L32AE.name: 8 kg white washing machine with a black door
WW80FG5L32AE.description: AI EcoBubble technology: turns the soap into penetrating bubbles for deep cleaning at low temperatures; Hygiene Steam: a steam program that neutralizes 99.9% of bacteria and allergens; SmartThings connectivity: remote control via Wi-Fi and optimization of energy consumption via AI Energy Mode; Super Speed ​​program: fast washing in 39 minutes; Quick Wash program: 15 minutes for small amounts; Drum Clean: a dedicated program for cleaning and disinfecting the drum; Protection mechanisms: built-in surge protector and lightning, child lock (Child Lock); Automatic weighing: adjusting the water and electricity consumption to the weight of the laundry; Diamond Drum: to prevent clothes from wearing out.

65DME30007SS (6780).name: Black-silver mechanical built oven
65DME30007SS (6780).description: The oven offers 8 varied cooking and baking programs that can be customized. Includes a turbo (passive) system that guarantees uniform and ideal heat distribution throughout the oven cavity. The control panel is mechanical and includes push-pull switches for a clean look and ease of cleaning. The baking chamber is coated with high-quality enamel and is easy to clean. The oven door is safety and includes two layers of tempered glass. Equipped with a mechanical timer for automatic shutdown of up to 120 minutes, which also includes a permanent operation mode (Stay On), and internal lighting that allows control of the food without opening the door.

MULTIWAVE-WHITE.name: Digital microwave 23 liters white
MULTIWAVE-WHITE.description: Multiwave technology that ensures uniform and fast heat distribution throughout the microwave cavity; Various automatic cooking programs; the defrosting function by time or by the weight of the food; Safety locking mechanism for children (Child Lock); quick cooking function (Quick Start); Voice alert at the end of the heating operation; Convenient opening door at the push of a button.

65M90M1-B (6694).name: Retro style black mechanical built oven
65M90M1-B (6694).description: The oven combines a classic retro design with modern functionality. Thanks to the active turbo system, the device allows uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity for optimal baking results. The inner sides of the oven are coated with Easy Clean enamel to prevent the accumulation of fats. The device includes a peripheral ventilation system to protect the kitchen cabinets and strong internal lighting to monitor the cooking process.

GN1406222GW.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 572 liters white
GN1406222GW.description: NeoFrost Dual Cooling technology that uses two separate cooling systems to prevent the passage of odors and maintain humidity. HarvestFresh technology that simulates the sunlight cycle to preserve vitamins in fruits and vegetables. IonGuard system to neutralize unpleasant odors and bacteria. A MultiZone chamber that allows use as a flexible cooling or freezing space. Digital control panel (Touch) on top of the door. LED peripheral lighting. Includes approved Saturday device (Sabbath mode). Twist & Serve manual ice dispenser.

MS2535GIS.name: Digital microwave 25 liters black inverter
MS2535GIS.description: Uniform defrosting and heating that prevents overcooking at the edges. Fast cooking and time saving. Varied programs including making yogurt, fermenting, melting chocolate/butter and softening. A hexagonal base ring (Hexagonal Ring) that gives high stability to the rotating plate and prevents tools from slipping. Powerful and economical internal LED lighting. Child lock mechanism.

MW2080P.name: 20 liter retro pink mechanical microwave
MW2080P.description: The Sauter retro series microwave combines a unique vintage design with modern functionality. The device includes a defrost program based on time or weight, the option of quick heating and personalized cooking using 5 power levels. The device is equipped with an ergonomically designed opening handle, internal lighting and a warning bell that indicates the end of the heating operation. The mechanical interface guarantees maximum reliability and ease of operation.

R-709W.name: Digital microwave 25 liters white
R-709W.description: The product combines a microwave and a grill for cooking, heating and browning in one device. Includes 8 automatic cooking programs (popcorn, potatoes, frozen vegetables, drinks, pizza, etc.); 2 combined cooking programs (microwave + grill); OP function to eliminate odors using a fan without heating; automatic defrosting according to time or weight; child safety lock; timer and digital clock; magnetron technology and centralized microwaves for fast and uniform heating.

MIC223D.name: Silver digital 23 liter microwave
MIC223D.description: 8 automatic cooking and heating programs. MULTI SYSTEM system for uniform heating. The defrosting function by time or by weight and power. Digital timer up to 60 minutes. An operating panel that includes illustrations for maximum comfort. Opening mechanism using a handle.

R-268FH(BS).name: Digital microwave 26 liters without plate black-silver
R-268FH(BS).description: The microwave uses SPACE MAX (Flatbed) technology, which eliminates the need for a rotating plate and enables the utilization of the entire compartment space for heating large or rectangular dishes. The inverter motor ensures a stable temperature that preserves the juiciness of the food and the nutritional values. The product includes advanced defrosting functions by weight or time, a digital timer, a child safety lock and a smooth, easy-to-clean inner surface without the need to disassemble parts.

MS23K3513AS.name: Digital microwave 23 liters black-silver
MS23K3513AS.description: Quick Defrost: 5 quick defrost programs (meat, chicken, fish, vegetables, bread/cakes); T.D.S system: trifocal heat distribution for uniform heating; Deodorization: Odor neutralization function in the cooking chamber; ECO mode: energy saving in standby mode; 20 automatic Healthy Cooking programs; Chef programs for melting and softening (butter, chocolate, sugar); child lock mechanism for safety; Easytronic electronic control and opening with a handle.

DL2330.name: Digital microwave 25 liters white
DL2330.description: 8 preset automatic cooking programs; Automatic defrost function by weight or time; adjustable digital timer up to 95 minutes; child safety locking mechanism; Voice alert at the end of an operation; Opening a door using a pull handle.

NAK-20LMW.name: 20 liter black mechanical microwave
NAK-20LMW.description: The microwave is designed for quick heating, basic cooking and defrosting food in a simple and user-friendly way. The defrosting function allows efficient handling of meat, fish and frozen pastries according to time. The mechanical structure makes it ideal for people who prefer operation without complex digital menus, and its compact size is especially suitable for small kitchens, offices or student apartments.

MS23K3513AK.name: Digital microwave 23 liters black
MS23K3513AK.description: T.D.S (Triple Distribution System) technology for uniform trifocal heat distribution. Quick Defrost function for quick and automatic defrosting of 5 common types of food. Deodorization program to remove air from the cooking chamber. ECO Mode for significant power savings in standby mode. 20 automatic cooking programs for healthy cooking. 4 chef programs for melting and softening (butter, chocolate, sugar). Keep Warm function to keep food warm. Child safety lock mechanism.

MM720CJ7 (6537).name: 20 liter retro cream mechanical microwave
MM720CJ7 (6537).description: The microwave combines a classic retro design with modern technology. It is equipped with a defrost function that allows efficient defrosting of food according to weight or time. The operation is simple and intuitive using two rotary buttons to control the intensity of the heat and the cooking time. The device includes internal lighting that allows you to view the food during operation and an alarm at the end of the heating program. The door is opened using a retro designed handle.

EM823A2GU-B (6564).name: Digital microwave 23 liters white
EM823A2GU-B (6564).description: 8 built-in automatic cooking programs; the quick defrost function by time or by food weight; memory for 3 fixed cooking programs for the user's choice; Quick start button (Express Cook); Possibility of multi-stage cooking; child safety locking mechanism; warning sound for the end of the cooking operation; Digital LED display.

EM823A2GU-S (6567).name: Silver digital 23 liter microwave
EM823A2GU-S (6567).description: 8 automatic cooking programs (including pizza, meat, vegetables, pasta, potatoes and fish); automatic defrosting mechanism according to weight or time; safety lock against children; digital timer of up to 95 minutes; quick cooking function (Quick Start); warning sound at the end of the operation.

MM8P022KG-W (65006).name: 25 liter white mechanical microwave
MM8P022KG-W (65006).description: The microwave oven is designed for fast and uniform heating of food and performing efficient defrosting operations. The mechanical interface includes two rotary switches that allow simple and user-friendly operation without the need for complex programming. Includes the defrost function based on time or food weight. The internal structure allows for easy cleaning and simple maintenance, and is suitable for intensive home use thanks to durable components and a powerful motor.

AM720C2AT (6566).name: Digital microwave 20 liters white
AM720C2AT (6566).description: 8 preset automatic cooking programs. Automatic defrost function by time or weight. Digital timer up to 95 minutes. Child safety locking mechanism. Clear LED display showing cooking time and time. Fast cooking function (Express Cooking). Sound alert at the end of the operation.

GR-1085.name: Showcase refrigerator 85 liters
GR-1085.description: Showcase refrigerator (mini bar) designed for display and storage of drinks and light food products. The device includes a double transparent glass door with a stainless steel (stainless steel) frame that gives a luxurious look and durability over time. The interior of the refrigerator is equipped with internal LED lighting that illuminates the contents clearly, 3 nickel-plated mesh shelves that can be adjusted in height, and a hidden handle for a clean look. The refrigerator is characterized by extremely quiet operation, which makes it ideal for use in offices, bedrooms, guest rooms and shops.

TRB66MFT.name: 60 cm gas combined oven black
TRB66MFT.description: A multi-function oven that offers a variety of cooking and baking programs, among them: an active turbo that allows uniform baking of several molds at the same time, an electric grill for browning, defrosting, and traditional baking. The device is equipped with massive cast iron pot nets for maximum stability. The design is a luxurious rustic/retro style with a black finish, which includes matching buttons and an analog clock/mechanical timer to manage the cooking time.

ZGH65424XS.name: Gas stove 60 cm stainless steel
ZGH65424XS.description: A particularly powerful wok burner (4kW) that provides double heat for quick heating of pots and pans; Built-in electronic ignition that allows ignition by turning and pressing the control button; A safety mechanism using thermocouple sensors that stop the flow of gas as soon as the flame is turned off; A sloped frame designed to prevent liquids from spilling onto the work surface and easy cleaning; Extended pot supports for maximum stability of cookware of any size; Accurate and fast control of the flame intensity using advanced regulators.

EF-160.name: Office top freezer refrigerator 80 liters NF white
EF-160.description: Office refrigerator with 2 doors (separate top freezer); A high-quality freezer that reaches a temperature of up to -18 degrees Celsius; height-adjustable glass shelves; drawer for storing fruits and vegetables; interior lighting; adjustable thermostat; including a door lock; Built-in egg dispenser and bottle stand in the door; A mold for making ice cubes is included.

MF100T80B/W-IL (6442).name: Washing machine top opening 8 kg white
MF100T80B/W-IL (6442).description: Lunar series in an extremely narrow Slim design (40 cm) | Soft Open mechanism for soft opening of the drum door | Wide LED digital display and digital program selector | 15 washing programs including: steam care (Steam Care), fast program 15 minutes, fast program 45 minutes, hygienic washing at 90 degrees, economic program (Eco), gentle washing, and a dedicated program for cleaning the drum | Delay Start system for up to 24 late activation Hours |. Smart memory for automatic operation after a power failure |. Child safety protection system |

ZVENM7K1.name: Black microwave oven
ZVENM7K1.description: 9 cooking programs including: bottom heat, traditional cooking, defrosting, quick roasting, grill, microwave, Italian pizza, and cooking with hot air (True Fan Cooking); the QuickCook function that combines an oven and a microwave to cut the cooking time in half; Fast Cooking function for a crispy finish in combination with the microwave speed; Fast heat-up: fast heating that shortens the waiting time by 40%; Convection cooking (turbo) for uniform heat distribution and cooking at 20% lower temperatures to save energy; Guided time control system with automatic temperature suggestion; Safety mechanisms: child lock, automatic shutdown, residual heat indicator and cooling fan.

MSNMG96MFT.name: Combined gas oven 90 cm 5 flames black stainless steel forging
MSNMG96MFT.description: A professional multi-system oven that includes 9 baking and cooking programs: active turbo, electric grill, defrosting, static baking (top+bottom), grill with turbo and more. SUPER STOP safety sensor system to prevent gas leakage in all burners. Electronic ignition is built into the power buttons. Baking chamber with high-quality Blue Crystal enamel coating, resistant to scratches and easy to clean. A digital timer that allows future on and off programming. Adjustable legs that allow installation as part of the kitchen cabinet strip (Tzokel). Fingerprint-resistant matte black finish with stainless steel hardware.

GR-B374BG.name: A 344-liter bottom freezer refrigerator is designed for a pair of black glass
GR-B374BG.description: The Inverter Compressor is extremely economical and quiet. No Frost cooling system to prevent ice accumulation. Door Cooling+ technology for fast and uniform cooling even in the refrigerator door. ThinQ smart connectivity for remote control and Smart Diagnosis fault diagnosis through the smartphone. Digital touch monitor (Touch Control) for temperature control. Express Freezing and Express Cool functions for fast cooling and freezing at the push of a button. The Shabbat standard is built in with the approval of the Scientific and Technological Institute for Halacha (Halperin). Tempered glass shelves including a folding shelf. A dedicated cooling drawer for vegetables/fish/meat and a fruit/vegetable drawer. Possibility to change the door opening direction. Luxury black glass design intended for installation alone or as a pair (Side by Side).

HB234A0B0.name: Black digital built oven
HB234A0B0.description: 7 cooking and baking programs: turbo 3D (baking on 3 levels at the same time), top/bottom heat, turbo grill, large grill, pizza setting, bottom heating, and gentle hot air; cookControl10: 10 preset automatic programs for perfect results; softClose technology: soft and quiet door closing without slamming; ecoClean: special coating on the back of the oven that breaks down fats and makes cleaning easier; fastPreheat: fast preheat function to save time; varioClip: a telescopic rail that can be installed on each of the oven levels; child safety lock; Digital clock with timer to turn off and on.

HO-1905G.name: Gray digital built oven
HO-1905G.description: 10 baking and cooking programs including: active turbo, maximum grill, grill with turbo, defrosting, and top/bottom heating. The AirFryer program is built-in for making crispy food without oil. Steam/Art program for baking and cooking with steam to maintain juiciness. A unique pizza program that reaches a temperature of 300 degrees Celsius. Steam Clean steam cleaning system combined with Clean EZ internal coating for easy cleaning of grease. Perimeter and front ventilation to protect the kitchen cabinets.

SJ-FSR920-BK.name: Refrigerator 5 doors 668 liters black glass
SJ-FSR920-BK.description: J-Tech Inverter compressor for quiet and economical operation. Plasmacluster Ion Pro technology to neutralize bacteria, germs and mold. ActiFresh Hybrid cooling system to keep food fresh and prevent dehydration. A flexible storage room (Multi-Temperature Room) with a variable temperature between +3 and -18 degrees Celsius. Automatic ice cube maker that produces 4 types of ice. External touch panel (Touch LCD). Vacation Mode (Vacation Mode) Economy mode (ECO). Sound alert for an open door. No-Frost technology to prevent ice build-up.

RM70F63REW.name: Zero line 4-door refrigerator 648 liters Kitchen Fit NF white glass coating
RM70F63REW.description: Kitchen Fit design for installation at the zero line with the 70 cm deep kitchen cabinets; SpaceMax technology that allows for thinner insulation walls to increase the internal volume; an accurate AI-based cooling system that adapts the defrost cycle to usage habits; built-in Wi-Fi connectivity with support for the SmartThings app to manage energy consumption, food status and receive notifications; built-in Shabbat function; half-width foldable Slide-in shelf for storing bottles and pots high; doors opening at an angle of 90 degrees allowing full drawer pull-out even in narrow aisles; luxury white glass finish with recessed handles.

EBE5304AWW.name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 508 liters NF white
EBE5304AWW.description: The Shabbat Mehadrin system is built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute (activated by pressing Display Lock and the minus button for 3 seconds). TasteLock technology in combination with a NutriPlus filter to preserve the freshness and nutritional value of fruits and vegetables for up to 7 days. FlexStor storage compartments - a modular compartment system in the refrigerator door for quick customization. Boost function for cooling that protects the food texture. TasteGuard system - an active deodorizer that neutralizes odors and 99.8% of bacteria.Perimeter and front lighting.Tryst & Serve ice dispenser in the freezer compartment and silver handles.

EQE5600BA.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 572 liters 4 drawers blackened stainless steel
EQE5600BA.description: NutriFresh inverter compressor for maintaining temperature stability and saving energy. EvenTemp cooling system for uniform cooling on every shelf. TasteLockAUTO technology with NutriPlus filter to maintain freshness and vitamins in vegetables and fruits for up to 7 days. Deli drawers for keeping at a temperature of 0 degrees for meat, fish and cheeses. Cooling and quick freezing functions: QuickChill, QuickFreez and DrinkChill (timer for cooling drinks). A built-in Shabbat mode activated by pressing the Chill Drink and freezer temperature buttons for 3 seconds. LED peripheral lighting. Manual ice maker (Twist) with drawer. FlexSpace shelves and modular arrangement.

RF72DG9620B1.name: 4 door 678 liter DID refrigerator with matte black kiosk
RF72DG9620B1.description: Digital Inverter compressor for energy saving and silence. Beverage Center system that includes an internal water kiosk and an automatic filling jug (AutoFill) with a volume of 1.4 liters. Triple & Metal Cooling cooling system to maintain optimal temperature and humidity and prevent odors. Silver Nano technology to destroy bacteria. Cool Select+ Room compartment (FlexZone) which allows turning a freezer compartment into a refrigerator in 5 different temperature modes. Dual Auto Ice Maker that produces ice cubes and Ice Bites. Intuitive internal LCD control. Shabbat mode is strictly built-in. Crisper+ and Flex Crisper drawers to keep fruits and vegetables fresh. SmartThings app support.

OXFORD X10FF6.name: Integrated gas oven 90 cm black stainless steel forging
OXFORD X10FF6.description: The OXFORD X10FF6 model is a semi-professional two-compartment combined oven that includes: a main multisystem oven with 9 cooking and baking functions (including active turbo, grill, defrosting and more) | Static secondary oven designed for slow cooking or complementary baking An electronic ignition system is built into the gas buttons Safety sensors (gas disconnectors) to prevent leakage in the event of the flame being turned off A designed analog clock that includes a timer and a baking end programmer Lower storage compartment (volume 25 liters) for storing molds or accessories Accessories included: chrome grids, enameled baking pans, rotating skewer (Rotisserie) and wok device.

ZWQ71235SI.name: Washing machine 7 kg top opening white
ZWQ71235SI.description: A top-loading washing machine that includes Fuzzy Logic technology for automatic adjustment of water and electricity consumption to the amount of laundry; soft opening mechanism (Soft Access) for the drum doors; Drum Self-Positioning system that puts the drum opening upwards at the end of the program; PowerJet technology to keep the detergent drawer clean; A large LCD monitor that shows the program time and other operations; A variety of programs including: cotton, economical cotton, synthetic, delicate, wool plus, refresh 20 minutes, mixed 20 and a quick program 30'@30° (30 minutes at 30 degrees); FinishIn function to determine the end time of washing.

GR-730BINS.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 637 liters NF knock-knock black
GR-730BINS.description: InstaView technology (double tapping on the door glass allows you to see the contents of the refrigerator without opening it). The UVnano system for disinfecting the water nozzle that eliminates 99.99% of bacteria. Wi-Fi connectivity and remote control via the LG ThinQ app. Hygiene Fresh+ air filtration system in 5 stages to prevent odors and bacteria. Linear Cooling and Door Cooling+ technologies to maintain a uniform temperature and freshness of the food. Automatic water and ice kiosk (cubes and crushed ice). Shabbat status with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Perimeter interior LED lighting and tempered glass modular shelves.

WS-558G.name: 55' LED screen
WS-558G.description: webOS operating system that includes built-in apps such as Netflix, YouTube and Prime Video; Support for HDR10 and HLG to improve image quality and contrast; AI ThinQ technology for intelligent voice control; TruMotion mechanism for smoothing movement and preventing jitter; Support for screen mirroring via AirPlay, Miracast and DLNA; Built-in DVB-T2 digital tuner for receiving Idan+ channels and DVB-S2 satellite tuner; Dolby Audio support for a surround sound experience; A smart dashboard to control IoT devices at home.

RT62K7044BS.name: Refrigerator top freezer 622 liters NF black
RT62K7044BS.description: Smart Conversion 5-in-1 system: option to operate the refrigerator in 5 different programs (normal refrigerator, vacation mode, turning the freezer into a refrigerator and more); Twin Cooling Plus technology: a double cooling system that maintains 70% humidity to prevent the food from drying out and preventing odors from passing between the cells; Space Max: advanced insulation that allows thin walls to increase the internal volume without changing the external dimensions; Multi Flow: multi-flow air distribution to maintain a uniform temperature; Silver Deodorizer: absorbs odors and kills bacteria using the Silver Nano method; Strict Shabbat command: built-in (activation by pressing the Freezer button for 10 seconds); Internal LED lighting in the cooling compartment and the freezing compartment; The Ice Max X3 ice dispenser is removable to save space.

SER-388.name: Showcase refrigerator 322 liters white-transparent
SER-388.description: Showcase refrigerator (display) designed for storing and cooling bottles and food products; Equipped with 3 adjustable mesh shelves and an additional lower shelf (total of 4 storage areas); includes internal LED lighting for an optimal display; double insulated glass door to maintain a stable temperature and prevent cold loss; mechanical control combined with a digital display; includes a lower condenser to improve durability and cooling efficiency; extremely quiet operation suitable for offices, businesses and institutions.

EEQ47200L.name: Full integrated wide dishwasher
EEQ47200L.description: AirDry technology: automatic opening of the door at the end of washing for perfect drying and energy saving; Inverter motor: extremely quiet, economical and long-lasting; Beam on Floor: projection of a point of light on the floor to indicate work status; SensorControl: sensors that detect the amount of dishes and the degree of dirt to adjust water and electricity consumption; QuickSelect slider: intuitive touch interface for selecting program duration; 8 washing programs: 160 minutes, 60 minutes, 90 minutes, AUTO Sense (automatic), Eco, Machine Care (self-cleaning), a quick program of 30 minutes (60 degrees), and rinsing and waiting (Rinse & Hold); Glass protection: SoftSpikes system to protect delicate tools; WaterStop mechanism: safety valve to prevent flooding; Delay timer: possibility of late activation of 1-24 hours; Upper basket is height adjustable even when full.

UE70U8000F.name: 70' LED screen (Newpro)
UE70U8000F.description: Tizen Smart TV operating system with access to apps and web browser. PurColor technology for displaying a wide range of vivid and natural colors. Support for HDR10+ and HLG formats to improve contrast and detail. Adaptive Sound (Adaptive Sound) with a power of 20W (2CH). OTS Lite technology for virtual sound that follows the objects. Q-Symphony support for perfect synchronization with a sound projector. Luxurious Metal Stream design with a thin frame on 3 sides. Samsung Knox built-in data security. SmartThings support for managing smart devices. ALLM and HGiG gaming mode for a smooth gaming experience.

FSE63817P.name: Fully integrated dishwasher made in Italy
FSE63817P.description: ComfortLift technology: the lower basket rises to the height of the upper basket for convenient loading and unloading without bending over. QuickSelect interface: intuitive selection of the washing time and automatic adjustment of the savings and cleaning settings. AirDry drying: automatic door opening at the end of the operation to utilize natural air for optimal drying. SatelliteClean arm: double spray arm that guarantees water coverage 3 times higher than the standard. Beam-on-Floor: An indicator light that projects a red or green dot on the floor to indicate the flushing status. MaxiFlex cutlery drawer: deep and flexible top drawer for different types of cutlery and serving utensils. 7 washing programs: 160 minutes, 60 minutes, 90 minutes, AUTO Sense (automatic detection of the level of dirt), Eco, Machine Care (self-cleaning program), Quick 30 minutes. Protection for glassware: SoftGrips and SoftSpikes systems for stable holding of delicate glasses. Total AquaControl system for protection against leaks.

A75AN.name: Gas stove 75 cm black metal bronze forging
A75AN.description: Professional and wide gas cooking that includes 5 flames of different sizes for maximum compatibility with various cooking utensils. A turbo/wok flame designed for fast frying and powerful boiling. A luxurious country style design with ironwork in a bronze tone that gives a classic retro look to the kitchen. Simple maintenance thanks to burners that can be quickly disassembled and an easy-to-clean enamel surface.

MM720C2GS (6569).name: 20 liter silver mechanical microwave
MM720C2GS (6569).description: A simple and user-friendly mechanical operating system; 5 levels of intensity to choose from; timer of up to 35 minutes; The thawing plan is structured according to the weight of the food or time; Alert sound at the end of the cooking operation; A door with an opening mechanism by pressing; Inner space coated with painted steel for easy and convenient cleaning.

EOP7528X.name: Built-in oven digital pyrolytic black stainless steel forging
EOP7528X.description: Pyrolytic self-cleaning with 3 cleaning programs of different levels of intensity. SurroundCook technology with active turbo for uniform heat distribution that allows cooking in several molds at the same time. The InfiSpace baking chamber is 20% larger than a standard baking chamber. 9 working programs including: active turbo, pizza, upper+lower heating element, lower heating element, defrosting, grill, grill with turbo, grill with lower heating element, and moist baking. 41 built-in automatic programs (fish, meat, pastries and more). Digital touch control panel (Touch Control). Advanced time functions: clock, timer, stopwatch, cooking length setting, and delayed start/end. Door with Soft Close mechanism for soft closing. EasyEntry rails for easy insertion of molds and easy disassembly for cleaning. Internal halogen lighting and frontal ventilation.

QE50Q7F.name: 50' QLED screen (NewPro)
QE50Q7F.description: The screen is based on Quantum Dot technology that guarantees 100% color volume and color accuracy certified by Pantone. Advanced AI capabilities including: 4K Upscaling to upgrade content to 4K resolution in real time, adaptive sound optimization (Adaptive Sound), and OTS Lite (object tracking sound) technology. Gaming Features: Motion Xcelerator for motion smoothing, ALLM (Automatic Low Latency Mode), and Game Bar. Tizen OS operating system that includes access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and more), a built-in SmartThings hub for smart home control, and Samsung Knox security. Includes a SolarCell remote that is charged using lighting without the need for batteries.

QE55Q6FAAUXIL.name: 55' QLED screen (Newpro)
QE55Q6FAAUXIL.description: Tizen Smart TV smart operating system that includes access to leading streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+); Samsung Knox built-in data security; SmartThings support for smart home management; OTS Lite technology for object tracking sound; Q-Symphony for perfect synchronization with a sound projector; Automatic Gaming Mode (ALLM); The Solarcell remote is charged via lighting and USB; Screen mirroring option from the smartphone (Mobile to TV); Q4 Lite processor that upgrades content to 4K quality; Slim and elegant Stream Metal design with adjustable stand.

GNFP4542DC.name: Wide normal blackened stainless steel dishwasher
GNFP4542DC.description: CornerWash technology that includes a unique spray arm that reaches all corners of the dishwasher; DeepClean function for intensive cleaning of bottles and deep dishes; SelfDry system for automatic opening of the door at the end of the operation for optimal drying; HygieneCare technology for disinfection and destruction of bacteria at high temperature; 8 different washing programs (including automatic, economical and fast); Removable upper cutlery tray.

QE65Q6FAAUXIL.name: 65' QLED screen (Newpro)
QE65Q6FAAUXIL.description: 100% color volume using Quantum Dot technology that provides rich and accurate colors at any brightness level. Pantone certified for realistic color accuracy. Tizen Smart TV operating system that includes access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+). SmartThings support for smart home management directly from the screen. Gaming capabilities including Auto Game Mode (ALLM). Support for screen mirroring (Mobile to TV Mirroring) and Apple AirPlay 2. SolarCell remote control is charged using lighting. Advanced data security using Samsung Knox. Thin and elegant Slim Look design with a minimal frame (3 Bezel-less).

GSN209P8X.name: Standard wide stainless steel dishwasher
GSN209P8X.description: 8 washing programs: pre-rinse, mini 30 minutes (35 degrees), glassware (40 degrees), Eco (50 degrees), Quick & Clean (58 minutes at 70 degrees), intensive (70 degrees), automatic (40-65 degrees) and mixed program (MixWash). Another program for self-cleaning of the dishwasher. Automatic half quantity function (Dynamic Memory). Turbo SuperGloss drying technology for shiny dishes without stains. Rapid Clean function to shorten the washing time. Adjustable upper basket and folding tines in lower basket for flexible arrangement of pots and pans. Antibacterial seal to prevent odors.

TGE583WTX.name: Dryer 8 kg heat pump condenser
TGE583WTX.description: Heat-Pump technology for hot air reuse and significant electricity savings. Humidity sensors (NTC) that stop drying automatically according to the selected dryness level. Two-way drum movement (Criss-Cross) to prevent wrinkles and uniform drying. Internal LED lighting inside the drum. Control panel in Hebrew. Possibility of direct water drainage to the sewer without the need to empty the tank. Indicators for full water tank and filter cleaning. Child lock and buzzer to end operation. Extra wide drum opening (155 degrees).

ZDCB284W.name: Washer dryer 8 kg condenser
ZDCB284W.description: AutoAdjust technology: smart sensors that detect the humidity level in the drum and adjust the drying time to save energy; EasyIron program: bidirectional drum movement that reduces wrinkles and shortens ironing time; Mix EasyDry program: for combined drying of cotton and synthetic fabrics together; Delay Start: option to delay the start of the drying cycle; Reversible door: the possibility of changing the direction of the door opening to match the structure of the room; A variety of special programs: bedding, economical cotton, delicates, jeans, sports clothes, refreshment and programs according to time.

WQP14-W7633C-W (6466).name: Wide normal white dishwasher
WQP14-W7633C-W (6466).description: 8 washing programs (5 in direct selection: intensive, quiet, economical, 90 minutes, fast; 3 more through the app: hygienic, self-cleaning, glassware). WIFI connectivity for remote control using the Midea SMART HOME application. Delay Start function for future activation (3/6/9/12 hours). Half load button to save water and electricity. Increased drying button. Adjustable middle basket and upper cutlery drawer.

EW6C4853CM.name: Washer dryer 8 kg condenser
EW6C4853CM.description: SensiCare technology that adjusts the drying time to the weight of the laundry to prevent over-drying; Bi-directional rotation system (Reverse Tumble) to prevent tangling of clothes and reduce wrinkles; Various drying programs: ECO cotton, cotton, synthetic, delicate, easy ironing, refresh, shirts, down, bedding, sportswear, jeans and mixed; Drying sensors (Sensors) that detect the humidity level and stop the operation automatically; drying options by time; Al-Kamet program increased up to 120 minutes; large and comfortable LCD monitor; Activation delay timer up to 20 hours; child lock; warning indicators for filter cleaning, water tank emptying and condenser cleaning; Possibility of a voice prompt at the end of the program.

WW8ST4043CE.name: Washing machine 8 kg white
WW8ST4043CE.description: Hygiene Steam program that neutralizes up to 99.9% of bacteria and allergens through steam. Smart Check system for monitoring and diagnosing faults through a smart phone app. A daily Mixed Load program of about an hour. Quick wash program in 15 minutes. Diamond Drum to protect the fabric fibers. Eco Drum Clean program for cleaning and self-disinfection of the drum and boiler without chemicals. Fuzzy Logic electronic control for automatic weighing and saving water and electricity. Delay timer up to 19 hours. Built-in surge protector and lightning. Child Lock safety mechanism.

HWS34GGH1.name: Wine fridge 34 bottles 90 liters
HWS34GGH1.description: The Wine Bank 50 Series 3 wine cooler has a single adjustable temperature zone in the range of 5°C to 20°C. Includes a glass door with a UV filter to protect against light that is harmful to wine aging. A unique anti-vibration system to prevent vibrations that damage the taste of the wine. Activated charcoal filter to maintain clean and odor-free air. External digital control panel for convenient operation without opening the door. Economical internal LED lighting that does not emit heat. Option to change the door opening direction (reversible door). Audible and visual warning system in case of malfunction or extreme temperature change. Wi-Fi connectivity for remote control through the hOn app.

WF9014WB.name: Washing machine 9 kg white
WF9014WB.description: AI DD technology: diagnoses the weight of the laundry and the softness of the fabric to automatically adjust the drum movements; Steam system: combining steam in the washing process for deep cleaning and allergen neutralization; 6 Motion technology: performing 6 different drum movements simulating manual washing to preserve the clothes; 14 Speed ​​program: fast washing in only 14 minutes (up to 2 kg); Add Item function: option to add forgotten clothes after starting work; Smart Diagnosis: system for locating faults and solutions using a smartphone; Auto Balance: automatic detection and balancing of the load before the spinning phase; Fuzzy Logic: smart management of the washing cycle to save water and electricity; 12 different washing programs including a program for self-cleaning the drum.

MC-W810-W.name: Washing machine 10 kg white
MC-W810-W.description: One Touch Smart Wash system: an AI chip that automatically detects the weight of the laundry and adjusts the amount of water and cleaning power with one click | Steam Washing: penetration of steam molecules at a high temperature into the fabric fibers to remove odors, disinfect and maintain softness | Pure Drum technology: a drum with a 'water drop' design that reduces friction and wear of the clothes Italian plasma welding: extremely smooth finish of the inside of the drum to prevent tears in delicate fabrics High pressure washing: powerful water currents to clean cleaning agent residues from the door and window Anti-allergenic and disinfection program: possibility of washing at a temperature of up to 85 degrees to remove allergens and bacteria | Deep washing in 6 steps: thorough cleaning from different angles to remove tough stains Extremely quiet operation thanks to the inverter motor

PX-465.name: Speaker 6.5' white
PX-465.description: A powerful 2-Way speaker intended for indoor and outdoor installation (Indoor/Outdoor); Full resistance to extreme weather conditions, sun, humidity and rain thanks to a hard plastic case and a stainless aluminum grill; Possibility of horizontal or vertical installation using racks included in the package; The speaker icon can be rotated for visual adjustment according to the direction of hanging; Especially suitable for gardens, balconies, restaurants, banquet halls and pools.

MAX INVERTER 140.name: Air conditioner 1.2 hp
MAX INVERTER 140.description: Inverter technology for significant electricity savings and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in WiFi for remote control via the Electra Smart app. Shabbat mode is built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. 4D air distribution (air flow in four directions). Self-cleaning function of the battery to prevent mold and odors. Hydrophilic coating (Gold Coating) for protection against corrosion. 8 blower speeds (3+5 speeds). Two-sided drainage option for flexible installation. Sleep mode for quiet and comfortable operation at night.

MAX INVERTER 170.name: Air conditioner 1.3 hp
MAX INVERTER 170.description: Inverter technology for saving electricity and maintaining a stable temperature. Shabbat mode is built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Built-in WiFi connectivity for remote control via the SMART app. Air distribution in 4 directions (4D Airflow) for uniform air conditioning throughout the space. Self-cleaning of the battery to prevent the accumulation of mold and bad smells. 8 blower speeds in the indoor unit. Gold hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and extend the life of the air conditioner. Two-sided drainage option for ease of installation.

MAX INVERTER 240.name: Air conditioner 2 hp
MAX INVERTER 240.description: Inverter technology for saving energy and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in WIFI connectivity for remote control via the Electra Smart app. Shabbat mode is built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. 4D air distribution system (in all directions). Self-Cleaning function for self-cleaning of the battery to prevent bacteria and mold. 8 speeds for the evaporator blower. Double-sided drainage that allows flexibility in installation. Hydrophilic coating on air conditioner batteries to extend the life of the product. Option to connect a Kiri control or dry contact (Dry Contact) for an additional fee.

(KG120-Z12L24BY (700312.name: 12 kg silver washing machine
(KG120-Z12L24BY (700312.description: Steam Wash technology for cleaning with steam that helps disinfect and remove stubborn stains A quick 15-minute washing program to refresh clothes Option to delay activation (Delay Start) up to 24 hours Child lock mechanism for safety Automatic weighing system for adjusting the amount of water to the weight of the laundry A special program for self-cleaning the drum (Drum Clean) | Memory for power outages that allows work to continue from the stopping point | Diamond drum structure to protect the fibers of the garment and prevent wear.

SMS4HTW00E.name: White standard wide dishwasher (Clinton)
SMS4HTW00E.description: Home Connect: remote control and monitoring of the operation of the dishwasher using a dedicated application. EcoSilence Drive: Bosch's quietest and most durable carbonless magnetic motor. ExtraDry: button for increased drying of plastic dishes and dishes that are difficult to dry. VarioDrawer: a third drawer for cutlery and small kitchen utensils that allows for maximum utilization of the dishwasher space. Rackmatic: possibility to adjust the height of the upper basket to 3 different levels, even when it is loaded. AquaStop: full protection against water damage 24 hours a day throughout the life of the appliance. DosageAssist: a dosage control system that ensures complete and uniform dissolution of the cleaning tablet. Machine Care: a dedicated program to keep the dishwasher clean and remove residues Fat and scale Favorite function: setting a personal favorite program at the push of a button.

KRF-460WS (700113).name: Refrigerator top freezer 466 liters NF silver
KRF-460WS (700113).description: The NO FROST defrosting method (automatic). A separate digital temperature control system for the refrigerator and freezer. Includes 3 tempered glass shelves in the cooling compartment and 4 bottle shelves in the door. Transparent drawer for fruits and vegetables. Internal LED lighting. Concealed handles in a clean design and adjustable feet for stabilization.

XA142ZQTWQT1 (700350).name: Wide normal white dishwasher
XA142ZQTWQT1 (700350).description: Automatic door opening (Auto Open) at the end of the washing operation for quick and optimal drying of the dishes. Option to wash half load (Half Load) which allows you to choose between washing the upper or lower basket separately to save water and electricity. Timer to delay the start of work up to 24 hours. A flexible basket system that includes an upper cutlery tray that frees up additional space in the lower basket. Includes a dedicated self-cleaning program to maintain the hygiene of the device over time.

KRF-431WPW (700129).name: Refrigerator 4 doors 427 liters white glass
KRF-431WPW (700129).description: 4-door structure for maximum access convenience and prevention of cold loss; Multi Air Flow system for uniform air distribution in all parts of the refrigerator; Front digital temperature display for easy control; LED interior peripheral lighting; tempered glass shelves and deep vegetable and fruit drawers; Extremely quiet operation; Luxury design in white glass finish with hidden handles.

MF100T70B/W-IL (6441).name: Washing machine 7 kg top opening white
MF100T70B/W-IL (6441).description: 15 varied washing programs including: Steam Care for disinfecting and removing wrinkles, quick program in 15 minutes, quick program in 45 minutes, mixed program, cotton (20, 40, 60 degrees), synthetic, gentle, economical (Eco), special drum cleaning, wringing, and washing and wringing. Includes a Delay Start system for late activation (up to 24 hours), a smart memory that continues from the point where the operation stopped during a power outage, and a locking mechanism for child safety.

KRF-431WPB (700128).name: Refrigerator 4 doors 427 liters black glass
KRF-431WPB (700128).description: The refrigerator provides an advanced storage solution in large volume with a division into 4 doors that allows easy access and reduction of cold loss. No Frost technology ensures uniform cooling and prevents the accumulation of ice in the cells. The device is specially adapted to work at high temperatures (Class T) and includes an external control monitor for convenient temperature control without opening the doors. The design with a black glass finish gives a modern and luxurious look, and the quiet operation makes it suitable for open spaces.

24DMS4G113-W (6727).name: Combined gas oven 60 cm white
24DMS4G113-W (6727).description: An integrated baking oven that offers a complete solution for cooking and baking in one device with a width of 60 cm. The device includes an active turbo system that ensures uniform heat distribution throughout the oven space for perfect baking results. The stove is equipped with 4 burners with variable strengths for precision cooking, built-in electronic ignition and an advanced safety system. In addition, the oven includes internal lighting, an upper glass lid, a lower storage drawer for kitchen utensils and adjustable legs to match maximum for the height of the kitchen.

MF110W80/W-IL (64311).name: Washing machine 8 kg
MF110W80/W-IL (64311).description: 15 wash programs including: cotton, jeans, delicate, mixed wash, economical program, wash at 20 degrees, spin, rinse and spin; Ultra-fast 15-minute and 45-minute programs; Steam Care technology for steam disinfection and removal of tough stains; TURBO button that allows shortening of operating times by up to 50%; Option to delay activation (Delay Start) up to 24 hours; A dedicated program for cleaning the drum (Drum Clean) to maintain hygiene; additional washing and soaking function; Safety lock mechanism for children.

ND-1014.name: Washing machine 10 kg white
ND-1014.description: Advanced inverter motor for quiet operation and energy saving; 14 varied washing programs including a quick program in 15 minutes, sports program, wool and blankets; Intelligent system for detecting load, foam and imbalance; timer to delay operation between 3 and 24 hours; Extra wide door with a diameter of 52 cm with an opening of 150 degrees for easy loading; automatic restart mechanism after a power failure; fault notification system and door locking

WGG244ZWGR.name: Washing machine 9 kg white (Clinton)
WGG244ZWGR.description: AntiStain system: removal of 4 types of tough stains automatically; Iron Assist: steam treatment to reduce wrinkles in dry clothes in about 20 minutes; ActiveWater Plus technology: precise adjustment of water consumption to the weight of the laundry; SpeedPerfect: shortening the washing time by up to 65%; Hygiene Plus program: washing at a constant temperature to destroy bacteria and allergens; Reload option: adding forgotten items after the start of the program; DrumClean program: self-cleaning of the drum with a reminder function; AntiVibration structure panels: for increased stability and noise reduction.

SMV2HVX02E.name: Full integrated wide dishwasher (Clinton)
SMV2HVX02E.description: Home Connect: remote control and monitoring through a smartphone app Extra Dry: function for intensive drying of dishes that are difficult to dry InfoLight: a red point of light projected on the floor to indicate when the device is on | EcoSilence Drive motor: quiet and durable carbon-free magnetic motor AquaStop: full protection against water damage 24/7 with a guarantee for the life of the device Rackmatic: upper basket adjustable to 3 heights | VarioDrawer: dedicated third level for cutlery and small kitchen utensils | SpeedPerfect+: option to shorten the rinsing time by up to 66% | Favorite program: setting a personal program at the push of a button | 5 rinsing programs: automatic (45°-65°), economical (50°), intensive (70°), fast (65°), and a favorite program (Pre-rinse).

WAN28218IT.name: Washing machine 8 kg white (Clinton)
WAN28218IT.description: Iron Assist technology: a steam program that reduces wrinkles in dry clothes by up to 50% and makes ironing easier. SpeedPerfect: a function that allows you to shorten the washing time by up to 65% without compromising on the quality of cleaning. ActiveWater Plus: Smart water management that is precisely adjusted to the amount of washing in the drum for maximum water savings. Reload function: possibility to pause the operation and add items that were forgotten after the start of the program. Antivibration structure: the sides of the machine are designed to isolate noises and prevent vibrations during squeezing. A variety of washing programs: cotton, ECO, synthetic, wool, silk/delicate, quick program (15/30 minutes), mixed, shirts, jeans, sportswear, hygiene plus and drum cleaning.

ND-1214W.name: 12 kg white washing machine
ND-1214W.description: Quiet and economical BLDC Inverter motor; LED display panel with touch interface; Intelligent system for detecting load, foam and imbalance; delay timer (3 to 24 hours); 15 minute quick program; Special programs: sportswear, wool, blankets, and baby clothes; Extra wide door with a diameter of 520 mm with an opening of 150 degrees; automatic restart mechanism after a power failure; child lock for safety.

TX6G821B.name: Washer dryer 8 kg condenser (Clinton)
TX6G821B.description: ProSense (or OptiSense) technology that adjusts the drying time and energy consumption to the amount of laundry and the humidity level. Anti-Crease function that activates bidirectional rotation to prevent wrinkles. Option to delay activation (Delay Start) up to 20 hours. Automatic drying sensors that stop the operation when the clothes are dry. Extremely quiet system.

WGG254Z6II.name: Washing machine 10 kg white (Clinton)
WGG254Z6II.description: EcoSilence Drive motor: carbon-free magnetic motor, quiet and long-lasting; Iron Assist: a steam program that reduces wrinkles in dry clothes by up to 50%; ActiveWater Plus: accurate and economical water management that is automatically adjusted to the weight of the laundry; SpeedPerfect: the possibility of shortening the program time by up to 65% without compromising the results; Reload function: which allows adding items after starting work; VarioDrum: a unique drum structure to protect the fabrics; Special programs: quick wash in 15 or 30 minutes, hygienic, mixed, wool, silk and more; Large and convenient LED display; Safety protections: flood protection mechanism and child lock.

IL65QQM9500.name: 65' QLED screen
IL65QQM9500.description: FRAMELESS design for a modern look MAGIC Bluetooth smart remote that includes voice search Support for ThinQ AI and Amazon Alexa | Intuitive user interface that allows control of IOT products Built-in apps: Netflix, YouTube and web browser | Support for dynamic HDR to improve image quality Picture-in-Picture (PIP) function | REALTEK chip for advanced image processing performance T2/S2 support for receiving Idan Plus and satellite broadcasts

CR32E.name: 32' screen
CR32E.description: LED TV screen designed for home or office use. Includes an internal multimedia player that allows displaying content (movies, music and photos) directly from an external USB memory. Supports connection to a computer (VGA/HDMI) and external converters. Full user interface in Hebrew, English and other languages. Includes automatic shut-off timer (after 4 hours by default) and full remote control.

HS-364FWEN (6360).name: Freezer 8 drawers 272 liters stainless steel NF
HS-364FWEN (6360).description: No Frost technology that prevents ice accumulation and eliminates the need for manual defrosting. Super Freeze function for extremely fast freezing of fresh food. Multi Air Flow system for uniform distribution of cold in all parts of the freezer. A dual-use model (Convertible) that allows you to turn the freezer into a refrigerator with one push of a button. An external electronic control panel is easy to operate. Option to change the door opening direction (right/left). Suitable for the Israeli climate (Tropical Class). Adjustable front legs and rear wheels for easy transport.

UE43U8000F.name: 43' screen (Newpro)
UE43U8000F.description: Smart TV (Smart TV) powered by the Tizen OS system; Support for leading streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+); Screen mirroring and Apple AirPlay; Built-in data security Samsung Knox Security; Ultra-thin MetalStream Slim design; Q-Symphony technology for synchronization with sound projectors; Auto Play Mode (ALLM); SmartThings support for managing smart home devices; Smart remote control included.

FQ6VT-1063-1F.name: 60 cm 1-phase ceramic stove
FQ6VT-1063-1F.description: Digital display for each center; digital timer for scheduled shutdown (up to 99 minutes); Safety lock function against children (Child Lock); Residual heat indicator (H) that warns of a hot surface to prevent burns; Overheating protection mechanism; automatic shut-off mechanism in the event of liquids spilling over the keyboard; complete thermal separation between the cooking areas and the rest of the surface; Glass surface is easy to clean and maintain.

HD-1905B.name: Digitally built oven with black steam cleaning
HD-1905B.description: For more details about a digitally built oven with black steam cleaning and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

ARCTIC-B.name: Ergonomic executive chair with mesh back and headrest
ARCTIC-B.description: An ergonomic executive chair that includes dedicated lower back support to prevent pain during prolonged sitting; Adjustable and extra wide headrest to support the neck and upper vertebrae; Padded armrests with height adjustment option (up/down); A rocking mechanism that allows tilting of the seat and the backrest as one unit; A flexible and airy mesh back that disperses the load and prevents the accumulation of heat and sweat; A large and comfortable seat to reduce pressure on the legs.

SPIDER-FORMULA.name: Professional gamers chair with 125° reclining option
SPIDER-FORMULA.description: Angle of backrest tilt (reclining): up to 125 degrees; Maximum carrying weight: up to 120 kg; rotation: 360 degrees; accessories: including neck support pillow and lower back support pillow; special features: 2 ventilation openings on the back of the chair for air circulation and sweat prevention, ergonomic design for body grip and maximum stability.

LUXOR-3000W.name: Halogen heating mushroom with a power of 3000 watts
LUXOR-3000W.description: For more details about the 3000 watt halogen heating mushroom and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

HEM-968.name: Halogen heating mushroom with a power of 3000 watts
HEM-968.description: Powerful heating intended for outdoor use in gardens, balconies and yards; A safety mechanism that includes a sensor that cuts off the electric current automatically when overturning; stable and heavy base to prevent falls; adjustable height for optimal adaptation to the seating area; Simple operation with an on and off switch; Decorative design that combines with garden furniture.

CH-38-DANI-BK.name: Ergonomic executive chair with mesh back and headrest
CH-38-DANI-BK.description: Comprehensive ergonomic support that includes two auxiliary pillows (a neck support pillow and a lower back support pillow), a backrest that reclines up to an angle of 125 degrees with the option of stopping, a carrying capacity of up to 120 kg, a hybrid design suitable for use as executives or as gaming for prolonged sitting.

HEM-958.name: Quartz heater 2500 watts 4 heating elements
HEM-958.description: Designed for efficient heating of indoor spaces up to 20 square meters in area. Includes a built-in rear projector for optimal and uniform heat distribution in the room. Protection and safety mechanism that automatically cuts off the electrical current in the event of a fall or rollover. Dense external protection net for maximum safety. The device is portable and includes 4 wheels at its base that allow easy transportation between rooms.

60GH503B (6737).name: Gas stove 60 cm black glass
60GH503B (6737).description: The stove includes 4 cooking flames of different intensities for full control, including a double turbo flame for fast and powerful heating. The product is equipped with safety sensors (FFD) for automatic disconnection of the gas supply in the event of the flame being extinguished. Includes cast iron pot mounts for uniform heat distribution and maximum stability, and precise control taps for the direction of the flame intensity.

THUNDER BL/A/90/LX.name: Hood 90 cm black glass chimney
THUNDER BL/A/90/LX.description: operation using a touch panel (Touch Control); 3 different working speeds; Peripheral suction method (Double-breath aspiration) to improve suction efficiency; Possibility of working in two modes: external air extraction or internal circulation (by adding a charcoal filter); Dishwasher-safe aluminum grease filter; Elegant black glass design incorporating a stainless steel chimney.

SILV-3366.name: Chimney hood 90 cm white
SILV-3366.description: A hood designed in the form of a chimney with a width of 90 cm, suitable for wide stoves and providing full coverage for extracting steam and cooking smells. The device includes a powerful motor that extracts up to 661 cubic meters per hour while maintaining a relatively low noise level of 55 decibels. The collector is equipped with economical LED lighting and allows flexibility in installation - whether connected to an external pipe or in internal air circulation mode using a washable charcoal filter. The maintenance of the device is simple thanks to the washable aluminum grease filters.

60F49-SS (6571).name: 60 cm hood for installation under a silver kitchen cabinet
60F49-SS (6571).description: A flat and minimalist hood intended for close installation under the kitchen cabinets. The device supports two operating modes: internal circulation (using activated carbon filters) or external exhaust using a chimney. The collector includes an efficient grease filtration system based on washable aluminum filters, and two motors that provide suction power adapted to intensive home cooking while maintaining a thin and space-saving design.

E90TEW2J82 (6526).name: Hood 90 cm attached to a black glass wall (old model 90J82-B)
E90TEW2J82 (6526).description: Suction power: 800 mash; 3 suction speeds to choose from; working methods: adapted for use through internal circulation (circulation) or external exhaust through a chimney; design: oblique model (Inclined) from the Black Collection series; includes a digital display and an automatic shut-off timer.

BRB80F26CEF0ML.name: Integral refrigerator with bottom freezer, 267 liters, width 54 cm, height 177.5 cm
BRB80F26CEF0ML.description: Metal Cooling technology: metal back to maintain a stable temperature and fast cooling; All-Around Cooling: a system for uniform air distribution in all parts of the refrigerator; Built-in Wi-Fi: full support for the SmartThings application for management, power consumption monitoring and notifications from the smartphone; Digital Inverter compressor: has 5 speeds for quiet and economical operation; SpaceMax: thin insulating walls that allow a large internal storage space without increasing the external dimensions; Optimal Fresh+ drawer: a dedicated drawer for preserving meat and fish at a lower temperature; Power Freeze function: fast freezing at the push of a button; Easy Slide shelf: removable shelf for easy access to deep items; vacation mode (Vacation Mode) to save energy during absence; Open door warning and reversible doors.

LC-H-P60RC.name: Hood 60 cm retro style cream color
LC-H-P60RC.description: Retro/rustic style hood (pyramid) in a luxurious cream finish; Control using a front operating panel with push buttons; The possibility of working in two modes: internal circulation (filtering odors using a charcoal filter) or external exhaust (releasing air through a pipe); Aluminum filters that can be washed in the dishwasher for easy maintenance.

FJ-CHRT91B.name: Hood 90 cm retro style cream color
FJ-CHRT91B.description: Hood in a luxurious retro/rustic design with a width of 90 cm; a particularly strong suction power of 890 m/s designed for the effective removal of steam and cooking smells; includes built-in lighting to illuminate the work area; characterized by a special structure that includes a decorative rack designed for hanging pots, pans, and kitchen towels; A cream colored finish that gives a unique vintage look to the kitchen.

G75D25.name: 75' screen
G75D25.description: Smart TV based on the Google TV operating system, which allows direct access to the Google Play app store and downloading a variety of streaming services such as Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, Prime Video, and Israeli apps (Cellcom TV, Partner TV, HOT, yes+). The screen includes a smart remote (Magic Remote) with Bluetooth connectivity and support for voice commands using Google Assistant for quick search. Supports Idan Plus broadcasts through a built-in digital tuner (DVB-T2). Includes HDR10 technology to improve image quality and contrast, and a multilingual user interface that includes full Hebrew.

FQ6IND-487-3F.name: 60 cm 3-phase induction stove
FQ6IND-487-3F.description: Front operation by touch (Touch Control); A separate digital display for each center; Programmable digital timer up to 99 minutes; Booster function for quick heating; Safety locking mechanism for children; indicator (warning light) for residual heat to prevent burns; automatic pot identification system; Complete thermal separation between the cooking areas and the rest of the surface to maintain a low ambient temperature.

RQ84.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 591 liters QZero black glass
RQ84.description: Vacuum Fresh Drawer: a unique vacuum drawer that keeps the food fresh up to 10 times than usual; My Fresh Choice: lower right modular compartment that can be converted from a refrigerator to a freezer in a temperature range between +5 and -18 degrees; Triple Zone: three separate cooling zones for precise control; Hi-Nano: a built-in ionizer that neutralizes odors and destroys bacteria and germs; Ultrathin Slot-In: zero-line design that allows full opening of doors even in a narrow niche (only 60 cm deep); Metal Tech: internal metal back for even and efficient cold distribution; Flexi Hinge: smart hinges that open at an angle of 103 degrees; Multi Air Flow: multi-focal air flow system; Super Cool & Super Freeze: extremely fast freezing and cooling functions; Humidity Control Drawer: drawer with automatic humidity control.

SMV4HAX19E.name: Full integrated wide dishwasher
SMV4HAX19E.description: Full integrated wide dishwasher from Series 4 (Serie 4) which includes: Home Connect for remote control and management through an app; ExtraDry - intensive drying button for plastic dishes; InfoLight - a red point of light projected onto the floor to indicate when the dishwasher is running; Carbon-free EcoSilence Drive engine for quiet operation and durability over time; Rackmatic basket system adjustable to 3 heights; Speed ​​Perfect Plus for fast washing up to 66% of the normal washing time; and AquaStop for perfect protection against flooding.

MW6623B.name: A built-in 25-liter microwave integrated with a black glass grill
MW6623B.description: Full digital operation using touch buttons. Includes 5 power levels to choose from and 8 built-in automatic cooking programs. Equipped with a digital timer for the kitchen, the defrost function and a grill for browning. Includes a child safety lock mechanism. Luxury design with black glass front.

NRK6192SYW.name: Bottom fridge freezer 300 liters NF white
NRK6192SYW.description: NoFrost Plus technology to prevent the accumulation of ice in the freezer and maintain optimal humidity in the refrigerator; IonAir system with MultiFlow 360° that distributes ionized air to keep food fresh and neutralize odors; Smart AdaptTech technology that learns usage habits and maintains a stable temperature; CrispZone drawer with HumidityControl to regulate humidity in fruits and vegetables; FastFreeze function for quick freezing of new food; SuperCool function for intensive cooling of the cooling chamber; Convert FreshZone drawer that allows temperature adjustment for meat, fish or fruits and vegetables; EcoMode mode for energy saving; Digital LED monitor for temperature control and display; Sound warning on an open door; Internal LED lighting in the ceiling of the refrigerator.

BM235SYB.name: Built-in 30-liter digital microwave with integrated black grill
BM235SYB.description: Combined microwave and grill cooking for browning; AquaClean function for cleaning the interior of the device using steam; child lock mechanism for safety; Automatic defrosting by time or weight; Digital control panel (SmartControl) with LED display; 6 predefined work plans; Opening a door at the push of a button.

HARMONY INV -28.name: Air conditioner 2.4 hp
HARMONY INV -28.description: Inverter technology for energy saving and quiet operation; Built-in WIFI for remote control via app; A structured Shabbat situation approved by the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute; Sleep function for pleasant sleep and energy saving; Super Quiet mode for extremely quiet operation at the push of a button; Auto Restart for automatic return to operation after a power outage; My Temp - adjusting the temperature in the user's environment accurately; 5 ventilation intensities to choose from; Hydrophilic coating in units to prevent corrosion; Option to control using dry touch (room card).

BO76SYW.name: White built-in digital oven
BO76SYW.description: HomeMade Plus structure: a vaulted baking chamber inspired by Tabun that allows uniform heat distribution and baking like in a professional bakery; Simplicity system: convenient control using a central button combined with a digital display with Touch technology; AdaptBake: a smart system that remembers the preferred temperature for each program according to last use; 11 work programs: including active turbo, large/small grill, defrosting, heating plates, turbo baking and more; GentleClose: special hinges for soft and silent closing of the oven door; AquaClean: fast self-cleaning function using steam; Telescopic rails: 2 levels of rails for safe retrieval of molds; Multi-level baking: the possibility of baking several molds at the same time without mixing smells and flavors.

Moon Inverter 143.name: 1 hp inverter air conditioner
Moon Inverter 143.description: Full DC Inverter technology (compressor, internal motor, external motor and expansion valve); Energy savings of up to 30%; Ultra-quiet operation with compressor insulation blanket; 4-way air distribution (electrical); Smart mode for automatic adjustment to room conditions; I Feel function for a temperature sensor on the remote; Self-diagnosis system; Anti-bacterial protection to prevent mold by drying the battery after switching off; continuous heating up to an external temperature of -10 degrees Celsius; Super mode for fast cooling; Preparation for WiFi connection for remote control; Soft operation to prevent electrical disturbances.

FS40-19M (6845).name: Fan column 16' 3 wings
FS40-19M (6845).description: Horizontal alignment at a wide angle of up to 85 degrees; Adjustable pole height for customization; Vertical tilt angle is adjustable; Extremely dense protective net (Finger Protection) for maximum safety around children; round base designed and stable to prevent vibrations or overturning; Extremely quiet operation suitable for bedrooms, offices and living spaces; air gust speed of about 100 meters per minute; Easy and simple assembly without the need for special tools.

FLEXIS BLACK 16.name: Air conditioner 1.4 hp black ON/OFF
FLEXIS BLACK 16.description: A designed overhead air conditioner that includes remote control via a WIFI application (available for iOS and Android); Smart motion sensor (Eco Sensor) for energy saving; Shabbat function with the approval of the Shabbat shifts; TURBO mode for rapid cooling of the space (up to 47% faster); 4D Airflow air distribution system; Extremely quiet operation (Super Quiet); I FEEL mode for adjusting the temperature around the remote; LED display with option to cancel; advanced sleep mode; DC motor in the indoor unit; Hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion; drainage option on both sides; Drying mode to extract moisture.

(FS40-15F (6807.name: Fan column 16' 5 wings black
(FS40-15F (6807.description: 3 fixed work speeds to choose from; possibility of horizontal alignment (oscillation) at an angle of up to 85 degrees for wide air distribution; Telescopic rod for adjusting the height of the fan; adjustable head that allows changing the tilt angle (up/down); round floor base, heavy and designed for maximum stability; simple and reliable mechanical control method; Suitable for home and office use.

B-2004S.name: Industrial fan 3 in 1 20'
B-2004S.description: The fan offers full versatility thanks to the 3-in-1 design that allows use as a high column fan, a low floor fan or a hanging fan on the wall depending on the need. The powerful motor combined with 5 blades provide a particularly strong airflow suitable for large spaces, warehouses, workshops, offices and home use. The device includes a wide ventilation mechanism for optimal air distribution in the room, relatively quiet operation and economical electricity consumption.

B-TF14.name: Table fan 14' white
B-TF14.description: A powerful and quiet desktop fan designed for home or office use. Includes an energy efficient motor, a wide oscillation mechanism to cover a large area, and the possibility to adjust the vertical tilt angle. The structure that includes 9 wings allows a continuous and more pleasant air flow compared to standard fans with 3 wings. The base of the fan is wide and stable to prevent vibrations while working.

HEM-615.name: Fan column 16' 3 wings
HEM-615.description: Multi-directional air distribution through vertical and horizontal alignment (automatic and manual). Extremely quiet operation suitable for bedrooms. Wide and stable base to prevent slipping or vibrations. Includes a carrying handle in the body of the device for easy transfer between rooms. Direction of inclination angle (Tilt) to customize the air flow.

HF-42.name: Folding ceiling fan 42' white
HF-42.description: A smart ceiling fan that includes hidden wings that open when activated (folds); Built-in Bluetooth speaker for playing music in stereo quality; LED lighting with the possibility of changing the color of the light (white light, natural light, warm light) and colorful RGB lighting (red, green, blue); Full control via a smart app (Tuya Smart) or remote control; 3 ventilation speeds (low, medium, high); quiet and energy-saving motor; Timer function for automatic setting of on and off time.

KRF-460WW (700110).name: Refrigerator top freezer 466 liters NF white
KRF-460WW (700110).description: The No Frost system that prevents ice accumulation and eliminates the need for manual defrosting; Full compliance with the Israeli climate standard (Class T) for efficient work at high temperatures; Digital temperature control that allows maximum precision in maintaining the freshness of the food; Modular interior arrangement with glass shelves and optimal division of the door compartments.

SL-5303.name: Metal table fan 8'
SL-5303.description: A unique retro metallic design from the RETRO METAL series; Optimal air distribution using 4 wings; vertical alignment (up/down adjustment); Wide round base for maximum stability; A carrying handle is built into the body of the device; safety metallic protection net; Durable metal body.

HSC644C.name: Integrated microwave oven 40 liters black-stainless steel
HSC644C.description: Compact microwave oven with 11 cooking and baking programs; SurroundTemp technology for uniform cooking; Hydroclean® ECO cleaning system; Touch Control control panel with LED display; 5 microwave power levels; Automatic defrosting by time and weight; quick heating function (Quick Start); child safety lock; A door with 3 layers of glass.

65DME30004WH (6772).name: A white mechanical built oven
65DME30004WH (6772).description: 8 diverse cooking and baking programs; Turbo (passive) baking system for uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity; A mechanical control panel that includes switches (pressed in on some versions); Automatic shut-off timer of up to 120 minutes including permanent operation mode; A door with two layers of tempered glass for safety and insulation; baking chamber with high-quality enamel coating for easy cleaning; interior lighting; Additional accessories: two molds (one deep and one flat) and one grid.

HEM-632.name: Fan column 20' 5 wings
HEM-632.description: A powerful column fan designed for efficient cooling of large spaces such as living rooms, offices and open spaces. The device includes 5 wings that produce a stronger and quieter airflow compared to 3-wing fans. The fan is equipped with a timer that enables automatic shutdown, adjustable height and tilt angle, and a round base that prevents vibrations and vibrations while working.

B-2010S.name: fan page 16
B-2010S.description: A column fan that includes the option of oscillating at an angle of 90 degrees for optimal air distribution in the room space. The device includes a telescopic rod for adjusting the height of the fan and an adjustable head that allows tilting up and down. Relatively quiet operation and low power consumption.

FZ10-16AR (6812).name: A smart digital tower fan includes a white-black remote control
FZ10-16AR (6812).description: A smart digital tower fan that includes 3 operating modes: normal, sleep mode and natural wind simulation; includes a remote control that allows full control of all functions; automatic display shutdown mechanism after 30 seconds without operation to prevent disturbance at night; Elegant and space-saving design; Extremely quiet operation suitable for use in bedrooms and living rooms.

AC200-W (6836).name: Portable floor air cooler
AC200-W (6836).description: A multifunctional air cooler that combines three functions in one device: cooling, salting (humidifier) ​​and air purification using an ionizer (negative ions); Includes 3 ventilation modes: normal, natural wind simulation and sleep mode; Equipped with a digital control panel with touch buttons and LED display; includes a full remote control for a range of up to 5 meters; a built-in protection mechanism that stops the operation of the pump in case of a lack of water in the tank; Wide air dispersion angle with automatic alignment; High-quality drive wheels that allow easy and comfortable movement around the house.

CH-8030.name: 12' metallic table fan in red vintage design
CH-8030.description: Horizontal alignment (right/left) for wide air distribution; Possibility of fan angle direction (up/down); decorative retro vintage design; Heavy base for maximum stability; Powerful and energy efficient motor; Dense and safety protection net; A carrying handle is built into the body of the device.

FS40-23MT MFS-160M0BPK (6844).name: Fan column 16' 7 wings black-stainless steel
FS40-23MT MFS-160M0BPK (6844).description: A designed column fan with 7 wings that allow a particularly strong and quiet airflow compared to standard fans. Includes a side function (oscillation) for wide air distribution in the room space, a vertically adjustable head (tilt) in the direction of the wind angle, and a telescopic rod for adjusting the height of the fan. The device is characterized by silent operation suitable for bedrooms and a durable motor designed for prolonged work.

SL-5300 Metal.name: Luxury metal column fan 16' black
SL-5300 Metal.description: A luxurious and powerful column fan (turbo model) designed for cooling large spaces efficiently; Includes a siding mechanism (right-left) for wide air distribution in the room; adjustable height that allows customization of the air flow direction; Extremely high air flow while maintaining economical power consumption; A full metal structure that provides high durability over time and a luxurious look.

HEM-607.name: 16' white floor fan
HEM-607.description: Effective multi-directional air distribution through a rotating mesh screen (rotor technology), the possibility of vertical and horizontal alignment to adjust the air flow, a built-in carrying handle in the body of the device that allows easy movement between rooms, a particularly wide and stable base to prevent falls, a dense and safe protective net for use in a children's environment.

SL-5301 Metal.name: Luxury metal column fan 16' silver
