SL-5301 Metal.description: A luxury column fan from the METAL series that offers an extremely high air flow rate; 3 speed levels for operation (Low, Medium, High); Right-left side (oscillation) mechanism for wide air distribution; Telescopic pole that allows for custom height adjustment; Optimal air distribution thanks to the 5 blades; Energy efficient operation; A luxurious design suitable for homes and offices.

SQC1.name: Loudspeaker (subwoofer + sound projector) 160 watts
SQC1.description: A wireless subwoofer that allows for flexible placement without unnecessary cables; Wireless music streaming from your smartphone or tablet via Bluetooth; Auto Sound Engine technology that balances the sound at any volume level; Bluetooth Stand-by support that allows the device to wake up automatically when a connection is detected; Possibility of control using TV remotes of leading brands (LG, Samsung, Sony and more); Compact and elegant design adapted to small and medium screens; Wireless sound synchronization system (LG Sound Sync) for compatible LG TVs.

FLASH-2.name: Home theater speaker kit
FLASH-2.description: For more details on the home theater speaker set and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

560F.name: Home theater speaker
560F.description: A powerful speaker designed to be used as a front speaker (Front) in home theater systems or as a pair of speakers for stereo systems; Especially suitable for large and medium spaces thanks to the high power and impressive efficiency; provides a detailed and balanced audio experience with an emphasis on deep bass sounds and clear high frequencies; Can be easily operated with a wide variety of receivers and amplifiers on the market.

CHOROS-015.name: Speaker 15' 1400 watts
CHOROS-015.description: For more details about the 15' 1400 watt speaker and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

CHOROS-010.name: Speaker 10' 1000 watts
CHOROS-010.description: For more details about the 10' 1000 watt speaker and product availability, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

YOO22.name: Stereo system with CD/DVD
YOO22.description: an 'All-in-One' micro-stereo system that combines a DVD player, a radio and a docking station; Multi-zone DVD player that supports PAL and NTSC methods; Full support for DIVX files and burned movies; a docking station that allows playing music and charging simultaneously for iPod/iPhone devices; Built-in digital equalizer to control the sound tone and audio modes according to musical style; full settings menu (OSD) displayed on the TV screen; support for 8 languages ​​and 32 types of subtitles; Advanced viewing functions: zoom (Zoom), slow motion (Slow Motion) and digital image stop.

SC-NE5.name: Wireless stereo system with CD player
SC-NE5.description: Full wireless music streaming via Bluetooth, AirPlay and DLNA. CD unit and external docking that allows playing physical discs and streaming them wirelessly to the speaker unit. Full compatibility with Apple devices with Lightning connection (such as iPhone 5). Aero Stream Port technology to produce deep and dynamic bass without distortions. Pure Direct Sound system that uses digital signal processing to ensure clean audio. Support for the Panasonic Music Streaming application for convenient control from the smartphone. Possibility of hanging on the wall for a clean design and saving space. Includes a full remote control and a built-in equalizer with preset modes (Heavy, Clear, Soft, Vocal, Flat).

XT60.name: A pair of floor speakers
XT60.description: The Polk Monitor XT60 provides high-resolution sound (Hi-Res Audio Certified) suitable for listening to music, watching movies and gaming. The system includes double passive radiators for deepening the bass without the need for ventilation openings (Port), which enables clean bass performance even in a location close to the wall. The speaker is compatible with Dolby Atmos and DTS:X technologies and can be combined with the MXT90 height speakers to create a 3D sound experience. The unique tweeter enables an extremely high frequency response reaching up to 40kHz, which ensures a detailed and airy sound.

Signa S2.name: Speaker (subwoofer + sound projector)
Signa S2.description: Dolby Digital 5.1 decoding for rich virtual surround sound. Polk VoiceAdjust technology that allows for personal adjustment of voice levels to significantly improve the clarity of speech in movies and programs. A powerful wireless subwoofer that provides deep bass without the need for unnecessary cables. Support for HDMI ARC that allows control of the volume of the projector using the original TV remote control. Preset audio modes: Movie mode, Music mode and Night Mode to reduce the bass and emphasize speech without disturbing those around you. Extremely thin design (Slim) at only 2 inches high that allows placement under the TV without blocking the remote's IR sensor.

MS23K3555EK.name: Microwave 23 liter digital black
MS23K3555EK.description: Healthy Steam function for healthy steam cooking including a glass steaming pot. Quick Defrost function for quick and uniform defrosting of 5 common types of food. Keep Warm function to keep food warm without overcooking. Deodorization program to neutralize odors in the cooking chamber. ECO mode for saving energy in standby mode. TDS system (Triple Distribution System) for trifocal and uniform heat distribution. Antibacterial ceramic coating is scratch-resistant and easy to clean. A variety of automatic cooking programs and pre-programmed local recipes. Child safety lock.

MW3-EM25PE(MB)-IL (200404).name: Microwave 25 liters digital black
MW3-EM25PE(MB)-IL (200404).description: Digital control panel with LED display and touch buttons. 10 different power levels for precise defrosting and heating. 8 automatic cooking menus for a variety of food types. 6 shortcut buttons for fast cooking (Express Cook) between 1 minute and 6 minutes. Option to defrost by weight or by preset time. Child safety lock to prevent unwanted activation. Cooking timer up to 99:99 minutes. Inner space coated with EaseMax Clean that allows easy and quick cleaning of grease and dirt. Designed mirror door and convenient opening with a handle.

MS23K3555ES.name: Microwave 23 liter digital black-silver
MS23K3555ES.description: TDS technology: trifocal distribution system for uniform and efficient heating; Deodorize function: a program to neutralize odors in the cooking chamber; ECO mode: energy saving in standby mode; Quick Defrost: 5 automatic defrost programs for different types of food; Healthy cooking: 20 automatic cooking programs; Steam cooking (Healthy Steam): includes a dedicated glass pot for steam cooking that preserves the nutritional values; Keep Warm function: keeping the food warm until serving; The melting/softening function: chocolate, sugar and butter; child lock; Clock and maximum cooking time of 99 minutes.

TC034B2U (6603).name: Built-in 34-liter digital microwave with integrated black grill
TC034B2U (6603).description: 8 automatic cooking programs; Digital command system with touch buttons (Touch); The defrost function by time or weight; combined cooking programs (microwave + grill/turbo); child safety locking mechanism; digital timer up to 95 minutes; Internal stainless steel cooking chamber; interior lighting; Opening a door at the push of a button.

EM823A2GU-W (6563).name: Digital microwave 23 liters white
EM823A2GU-W (6563).description: 8 preset automatic cooking programs. The defrost function by weight or by time. Quick Start button. Multi-stage cooking that allows programming a sequence of operations. Internal memory for 3 permanent cooking programs for the user to choose. Safety lock mechanism for children. Alert sound at the end of the cooking operation.

MM7P012MZ-W (65004).name: 20 liter white mechanical microwave
MM7P012MZ-W (65004).description: Heating and defrosting with inverter technology for uniform and economical heating; The defrost function according to time or according to the weight of the food to maintain the texture of the product; Extremely quiet operation suitable for home use; Voice alert at the end of the cooking operation; Compact and convenient design for simple daily operation.

MM9P022KG-S (65008).name: 25 liter silver mechanical microwave
MM9P022KG-S (65008).description: A mechanical operating system that includes a convenient and user-friendly control panel; Option to defrost food based on weight; an alert sound indicating the end of the cooking operation; A rotating plate that ensures uniform heating of the food.

MM8P022KG-B (65007).name: 25 liter black mechanical microwave
MM8P022KG-B (65007).description: heating, cooking and defrosting a variety of food types; The defrosting function is structured according to time or according to the weight of the food; A simple and user-friendly mechanical control panel (including Hebrew lettering in some editions); Opening a convenient door using a pull handle (Pull Handle); Inner cavity with enamel coating is easy to clean; Alert sound at the end of the cooking operation.

WQP12-5315A (6467).name: Wide integral dishwasher

Delay Start function that allows future activation to be delayed up to 24 hours in advance. Dedicated button to remove half amount. Includes 2 washing baskets and a separate cutlery basket. Indicator lights to warn of a lack of salt or rinse aid.

CS4C4LoW.name: Full integrated wide dishwasher

WQP14-W7633C-B (6465).name: Black regular wide dishwasher

The dishes are dried using residual heat technology (Inherent Heat).

DW60BS7503BI.name: Full integrated wide dishwasher
DW60BS7503BI.description: WaterJet Clean: sprinkler system with 10 spray directions for thorough cleaning; Auto Open Door: automatic door opening at the end of washing for optimal drying and energy saving; Hygiene Plus: disinfection program at 75 degrees to eliminate bacteria; SmartThings: remote control and monitoring via Wi-Fi; Floor Info Light: projection of work status indication on the floor; Extra Quiet: extremely quiet working mode; Speed ​​Booster: a function to shorten the program time; Aqua Stop: flood protection system; A third flexible basket for cutlery and small utensils; half the amount: option to wash in the lower basket only.

MRET-292.name: Office refrigerator top freezer 80 liters NF retro style black

Dedicated bottom drawer for storing vegetables and fruits. Wide storage shelves in the refrigerator door and the freezer door. Doors with vacuum lock. Adjustable legs for maximum stability. BC-50 GLASS BLACK.name: Office fridge and Trina 50 liter black

DW60BS7300SL.name: Standard wide stainless steel dishwasher

DVN05321B.name: Black regular wide dishwasher

PVNF244-W.name: Freezer 6 drawers 174 liters NF

FNE1075N.name: Freezer 75 liters NF for Bo

BRB266030WW.name: Integral refrigerator with bottom freezer, 264 liters, width 54 cm, height 177.5 cm

EF-140.name: Showcase office refrigerator 90 liters black

RT42CG6004WW.name: Refrigerator top freezer 420 liters NF white

BC-129 GLASS BLACK.name: Showcase office refrigerator 90 liters black

BRR297235WW.name: One door integral refrigerator without freezer 289 liters NF
BRR297235WW.description: Integral refrigerator with No Frost technology to prevent ice formation. Metal Cooling: A metal cooling panel that maintains a stable temperature. SpaceMax: thin insulation technology that allows a larger internal volume with standard external dimensions. Multi Flow: Multi-flow air distribution system for uniform cooling. Silver Nano: technology to neutralize odors and eliminate bacteria. Optimal Fresh+: dedicated zero drawer for keeping meat and fish fresh. Built-in WiFi connectivity with SmartThings app support and AI Energy mode for power saving. The Shabbat function is structured (strictly) with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Door on Door installation method with smart hinges for direct attachment of the kitchen door. Economical internal LED lighting. Reversible door.

RB60DS35ESA.name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 580 liters NF stainless steel
RB60DS35ESA.description: Twin Cooling double cooling system that separates the cells to maintain high humidity and prevent odors from passing through; Multi Flow technology for uniform air distribution in all parts of the refrigerator; A built-in Sabbath function that is activated by continuously pressing a button; A huge Zone Fresh drawer for keeping dairy and meat products fresh; Master Ice semi-automatic ice maker (twist) in the freezer compartment; Three extra wide Big Box drawers for storing large products; Quiet and energy-efficient operation over the years; Possibility to reverse the opening direction of the doors to fully adapt to the kitchen

RT53DG7A14WW.name: Refrigerator top freezer 530 liters NF white
RT53DG7A14WW.description: Twin Cooling Plus: a double cooling system that uses two evaporators and two fans to maintain high humidity and prevent odors from mixing; SmartThings AI Energy: a built-in Wi-Fi connection that enables power consumption monitoring via an app and savings of up to 10%; Smart Conversion 5-in-1: five working modes that allow the freezer to be turned into a refrigerator or put into vacation mode; Space Max: thin insulating walls that allow a larger internal volume without increasing the external dimensions; Strict Shabbat command: built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute; Multi Flow: multi-flow air distribution to maintain a uniform temperature; Silver Deodorizer: absorbs odors with Silver Nano technology to neutralize bacteria and bad odors; Ice Max X3: removable and portable ice dispenser that allows flexibility in storage; Clean Back: The back of the refrigerator is closed and smooth to prevent dust accumulation and easy cleaning.

BRZ227205WW.name: One door integral freezer 220 liters NF

RM70F63REB.name: Zero Line 4 door refrigerator 648 liters Kitchen Fit NF black glass coating

RT53DG7A64B1.name: Refrigerator top freezer 530 liters NF brushed black

Built-in WiFi connection with support for the SmartThings app and AI Energy Mode to save up to 10% on electricity. Including a strictly built-in Shabbat device. Multi Flow system for uniform air distribution. Silver Deodorizer filter to neutralize odors and bacteria. Optimal Fresh+ cooling drawer and Ice Max X3 removable ice dispenser.

RS70F64KET.name: Refrigerator 2 doors SBS 635 liters with direct connection kiosk NF stainless steel
RS70F64KET.description: SpaceMax technology that enables thin sides for maximum internal space utilization. Outdoor kiosk for water, crushed ice and ice cubes with direct connection to the plumbing. All-around Cooling system for uniform air distribution. Power Cool and Power Freeze functions for extremely fast cooling and freezing. Fingerprint-resistant brushed stainless steel finish.

RT62K7044SL.name: Refrigerator top freezer 622 liters NF stainless steel
RT62K7044SL.description: Twin Cooling Plus technology that uses two evaporators and two fans for separate cooling of the cells, maintaining 70% humidity and preventing the passage of odors. Smart Conversion 5-in-1 system that allows switching between 5 different working modes (including turning the freezer into a refrigerator). Space Max technology for thin insulation that allows a larger internal volume with standard external dimensions. מערכת Multi Flow לפיזור אוויר אחיד בכל חלקי המקרר. מסנן Silver Deodorizer בשיטת Silver Nano לניקוי בקטריות ונטרול ריחות. מצב שבת מובנה (Shabbat Mode) באישור המכון המדעי הטכנולוגי להלכה. תאורת LED פנימית, מתקן קרח Ice Max נשלף, ומגירת מעדנים ניידת (Deli Tray).

HRF-4560FW.name: Refrigerator 4 doors 463 liters NF white glass coating
HRF-4560FW.description: Multi Cooling system for circular air flow that ensures uniform cooling; A flexible Multi Zone compartment that allows you to turn the storage compartment into a refrigerator or freezer at the push of a button; My Zone compartment with independent temperature control (from 5 to 18 degrees); Smart Fresh Cooling filter to destroy up to 97% of bacteria and neutralize odors; Super Cooling and Super Freezing functions for fast cooling and freezing of fresh food; Built-in Shabbat device with the approval of the 'Shabbat shift'; Opening a door at the zero line (90 degrees) which allows installation close to the walls or in a niche; open door sensors with voice warning; Memory function that keeps the settings after a power failure; Tempered glass shelves are leakproof and childproof.

CN160239EW.name: Bottom fridge freezer 580 liters white
CN160239EW.description: HarvestFresh technology that simulates the sunlight cycle to preserve vitamins in fruits and vegetables. The NeoFrost system, which includes two separate cooling systems to prevent the passage of odors and maintain humidity. A built-in Shabbat mechanism (with the approval of 'Shabbat for generations'). ProSmart Inverter compressor for quiet and economical operation. CoolRoom compartment for keeping dairy and meat products at an optimal temperature. Durable tempered glass shelves. Perimeter internal LED lighting.

MDRT489MTL46D (6374).name: Upper freezer refrigerator 338 liters NF silver
MDRT489MTL46D (6374).description: AIR COOLING 360° peripheral cooling system to maintain uniform freshness. Super Cool mode for quick cooling of new products. Fresh Filter to neutralize unpleasant odors. Electronic control panel for separate control of the refrigerator and freezer temperature. 0° drawer dedicated to keeping meat, fish or dairy products. Wide internal LED lighting. Durable tempered glass shelves. Possibility to change the direction of opening the doors.

CN160237EXB.name: Bottom freezer refrigerator 580 liters blackened stainless steel
CN160237EXB.description: NeoFrost technology - two separate cooling systems to maintain optimal humidity and prevent the transfer of odors. HarvestFresh technology - lighting that simulates the solar cycle to preserve the vitamins in fruits and vegetables. The Shabbat Mehdrin device (Shabbat for generations) is built in. Powerful internal LED lighting. Tempered glass shelves. Extremely quiet operation thanks to the inverter compressor.

ZOHNX3X1A.name: Built-in digital oven with black-stainless steel steam cleaning
ZOHNX3X1A.description: AquaClean steam cleaning system for easy removal of dirt and grease residues. FanCook technology (active turbo) for uniform heat distribution and cooking on several levels at the same time. Digital LED display with electronic timer and timing functions (start/end). Retractable knobs for a clean look and easy cleaning. Various cooking programs: quick grill, normal grill, traditional cooking (top+bottom), defrosting, pizza program, baking with moisture. Baking chamber with 5 height levels. Double glass door that can be disassembled for easy cleaning. Peripheral cooling fan to protect the kitchen cabinets.

ETM3400SC.name: Refrigerator top freezer 344 liters NF blackened stainless steel
ETM3400SC.description: 360° Cooling system for uniform peripheral air distribution that maintains a stable temperature in every corner. FreshAir Deodorizer filter to neutralize unpleasant odors and prevent odor mixing. Zero ExtraChill drawer designed to keep meat, fish and delicacies fresh for a long time. Huge and transparent GreenZone/SpacePlus vegetable drawer with humidity control. A strictly structured Shabbat system operated by means of a simple mechanical command, approved by the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Economical internal LED lighting. Removable Twist & Serve ice dispenser. Height adjustable tempered glass shelves and hidden handles for a modern look.

RT48CB6626WH.name: Refrigerator top freezer 470 liters white glass coating
RT48CB6626WH.description: All-Around Cooling and Multi Flow system for uniform air distribution; +Optimal Fresh drawer with temperature control (between 4 and -4 degrees); MoistFresh Zone technology to maintain stable moisture for fruits and vegetables; Silver Deodorizer filter for absorbing odors and eliminating bacteria using the Silver Nano method; Built-in Shabbat function (with the approval of the Halacha Technological Institute); Pure Flat design with hidden handles; internal LED lighting; Removable Ice Max ice dispenser.

WCR-45.name: Wine cooler 21 liters 8 bottles black
WCR-45.description: Touch operating system for temperature control; Digital display with option to choose between Celsius and Fahrenheit; automatic key lock; Double glass door with UV radiation protection to maintain the quality of the wine; A unique internal structure that allows storage of 4 bottles lying down and 4 bottles standing up (ideal for open bottles); adjustable legs for leveling and maximum stability; Energy efficient and extremely quiet operation.

EOP6526V.name: White pyrolytic digital built oven
EOP6526V.description: pyrolytic self-cleaning that includes 3 cleaning programs; SurroundCook technology for uniform heat distribution and cooking in several molds at the same time; 9 work programs (including active turbo, pizza, defrosting, grilling, and moist baking); 41 built-in automatic programs (for fish, meat, cakes and more); enlarged InfiSpace baking chamber; Temperature sensor (Food Probe) for learning to do it accurately; EasyEntry rails for easy insertion and removal of molds; clock, timer, stopwatch, and delayed start/stop functions; Dischargeable door and glass for easy cleaning; Internal halogen lighting and frontal ventilation system.

EOH6426V.name: White built-in digital oven
EOH6426V.description: 9 work programs including: active turbo, pizza, conventional (steam cleaning), lower heating element, defrosting, baking with humidity, grill, grill with turbo and lighting; SurroundCook system for uniform cooking on several levels at the same time; The InfiSpace baking chamber is 20% larger than a normal chamber; Aqua Cleaning technology for easy cleaning using steam at 90 degrees for 30 minutes; CoolDoor Plus door with 3 layers of reflector glass to keep the door cold; automatic fast heating; clock and timer with touch command; EasyEntry rails for convenient insertion of templates; Includes 2 sets of telescopic rails; Accessories: 2 regular InfiSpace trays, 1 deep tray and 1 grid; Top heating element disassembles for easy cleaning; Frontal ventilation and halogen lighting.

PDF215-WH.name: Refrigerator top freezer 260 liters white DF
PDF215-WH.description: Two-door refrigerator with a top freezer that operates with the De-Frost cooling method (manual defrosting). The device includes a reversible door that can be adjusted to the desired opening direction, a designed sunken handle, and the possibility to lock the door. The interior of the refrigerator is equipped with 3 adjustable glass shelves, a dedicated drawer for fruits and vegetables, and 3 side shelves in the door that include a bottle holder. The freezer compartment includes an internal shelf and a freezing capacity of up to 2 kg in 24 hours. The refrigerator is extremely quiet and suitable for use in housing units, offices and shared spaces.

WCR-65.name: Wine cooler 32 liters 12 bottles black
WCR-65.description: A unique internal structure that allows storage of 8 bottles lying down and 4 bottles standing up (an ideal solution for open bottles to prevent leaks); Touch technology operating system with a digital monitor for full control; Double glass door with hermetic sealing and internal shading to protect against UV radiation; extremely quiet and energy-saving operation; Luxury blue interior lighting; internal chrome shelves; automatic key lock; Option to choose temperature display in Celsius or Fahrenheit; Adjustable legs for leveling and maximum stability.

GSX66MFT.name: Combined gas oven 60 cm stainless steel
GSX66MFT.description: 10 baking and cooking programs including active turbo, defrosting, grill and multi-system; separate electronic ignition for each burner; safety sensors (FFD) to prevent gas leakage in the event of the flame being turned off; A peripheral ventilation system to maintain the kitchen cabinets and cool the work environment; Smooth and scratch-resistant internal crystal enamel coating for easy cleaning; Mechanical timer up to 90 minutes with the possibility of permanent work and automatic shutdown; removable tempered glass top cover; Storage compartment for dishes at the bottom of the oven; Possibility of installation in the line of kitchen cabinets (Zokel) to look like a built-in oven.

H4F226WEH1.name: Freezer 226 liters NF white
H4F226WEH1.description: Instaswitch technology that allows you to turn the freezer into a refrigerator as needed (temperature range for the freezer: -16 to -24, for the refrigerator: 2 to 8 degrees); External digital touch monitor (Soft Touch) that allows full control of temperature and functions without opening the door; Wi-Fi connectivity for remote control using the hOn app; Strong internal LED lighting located at the top of the device; temperature and door open alert; possibility to change the door opening direction; Total No Frost system to prevent ice build-up and keep food fresh for a long time.

TRW66MFT.name: Combined gas oven 60 cm white
TRW66MFT.description:
- Advanced cooking and baking in 10 different work methods including active turbo for optimal heat distribution
- Extremely high cooking power in stoves with a dedicated turbo burner (4.2kW)
- Easy cleaning and maintenance thanks to a discharge glass door and internal crystal coating
- High level of safety to prevent gas leaks in home use
- Flexible design that allows free standing or installation in the line of kitchen cabinets (Tzokel)

PFSO60-BK.name: 60 cm gas combined oven black
PFSO60-BK.description: A standing gas stove integrated oven that includes 7 baking, cooking and grilling programs. Includes a passive turbo function for uniform heat distribution in the baking chamber. The stove is equipped with a tempered glass cover for protection and safety sensors (thermocouples) to prevent gas leakage in case the flame is turned off. Includes a mechanical timer to alert you when cooking is complete, internal lighting, built-in electronic ignition with buttons, and comes with a template and grid.

GSX56SF.name: Narrow 50 cm stainless steel integrated gas oven
GSX56SF.description: Multi-blade cooking with maximum safety, baking and grilling in a chamber with a smooth crystal coating for easy cleaning and resistance to scratches. The oven includes a top cover made of tempered glass that can be pulled out, two baking trays and one grid. The device allows for integrated installation in the kitchen (tzokel) to look like a built-in oven thanks to adjustable legs.

PVFSO60-NI.name: Combined gas oven 60 cm stainless steel
PVFSO60-NI.description: The oven includes 7 varied baking and cooking programs, including grill and passive turbo for uniform heat distribution. The stove is equipped with 4 burners of different sizes, including a powerful wok burner. The device includes a glass cover for the burners, a mechanical timer to control the cooking times, and internal lighting in the baking chamber. The oven door is made of transparent double glass that can be pulled out for easy and convenient cleaning. The kit includes a baking pan and griddle.

ZOPKD7K1A.name: Black pyrolytic built oven
ZOPKD7K1A.description: A 60 series multipurpose oven that includes 12 cooking functions (active turbo, pizza, grill, defrosting, baking with moisture and more); pyrolytic self-cleaning (SelfClean) which decomposes food residues and fat into ash at a temperature of 500 degrees; PlusSteam technology that allows the addition of steam at the beginning of baking to obtain crispy and golden pastries; Fast heat-up which shortens the time to reach the desired temperature by 40%; uniform cooking on 3 levels at the same time thanks to an additional annular heating element; Guided LED display that offers a recommended temperature according to the type of program; Improved safety that includes an electronic child lock, automatic shutdown, residual heat indicator and a 3-layer glass door; Luxury black finish with anti-fingerprint coating.

EC6A5HB90Y.name: Gas stove 60 cm stainless steel casting grid
EC6A5HB90Y.description: The stove offers precise and unprecedented flame control thanks to StepFlame technology, which allows a choice between 9 fixed heat levels for consistent cooking results. The central/side wok burner provides extremely high power suitable for quick frying and sautéing. The surface is made of high-quality stainless steel that is heat-resistant and easy to clean, while the casting grids ensure maximum stability for heavy pots. The device includes a thermal protection system (Thermocouple) for complete security in the kitchen, which prevents gas leakage in case the flame goes out.

HD-1905W.name: Digitally built oven with white steam cleaning
HD-1905W.description: For more details about a digitally built oven with white steam cleaning and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

NQ5B5763DBK.name: Integrated microwave oven 50 liters black
NQ5B5763DBK.description: A compact Bespoke Series 5 integrated microwave oven that combines oven cooking and microwave heating in one device. Air Fry technology for frying in hot air without oil. Natural Steam function for cooking with steam that preserves the juiciness of the food. Dual Fan system for uniform and fast heat distribution. Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity with support for the SmartThings app for remote control, receiving recipes and managing menus. Steam Clean system for easy cleaning of the inside of the oven. 20 automatic cooking programs and 5 defrosting programs. Triple Glazed door with silent slamming mechanism (Pre-stop Hinge). The oven operates without a rotating plate, which allows the use of the entire chamber volume.

HB279GBB0.name: Black pyrolytic digital built oven
HB279GBB0.description: 13 cooking and baking programs: turbo 3D (baking on 3 levels at the same time), top/bottom heat, turbo grill, large grill, pizza setting, bottom heat, gentle heating, keeping warm and more; activeClean system: self-pyrolytic cleaning at a temperature of 480 degrees; cookControl 40: 40 built-in automatic programs for perfect cooking results; humidClean: auxiliary hydrolytic cleaning (using steam) for light dirt; SoftMove: soft and silent opening and closing mechanism of the door; fast preheating function and coolStart technology for frozen food; internal halogen lighting; Child safety lock.

NV7B41301AK.name: Black pyrolytic digital built oven
NV7B41301AK.description: Pyrolytic cleaning that reaches 500 degrees Celsius. Add Steam technology for adding steam during cooking to maintain food moisture. Wi-Fi connectivity and support for the SmartThings app (including SmartThings Food). 20 automatic cooking and baking programs and 8 manual programs. Telescopic rail (Smooth Gliding Shelf) for easy insertion and removal of molds. A door with 4 layers of glass for maximum insulation and safety. Child safety lock, timer and digital clock. Eco Convection mode for energy saving. Grill, active turbo and top/bottom heating functions.

NV68A1140BS.name: Black-stainless steel catalytic digital built-in oven
NV68A1140BS.description: True Convection technology (active turbo) that combines a heating element and a fan for uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity. A catalytic cleaning system (Catalytic Cleaning) on ​​the back wall absorbs fats and breaks them down during baking. 9 cooking and baking functions including full grill, partial grill, top+bottom heating, and defrosting. Digital control panel with ice blue LED display. Removable rotary operating buttons (Pop-up Dial) for a clean look and ease of cleaning. Child safety lock mechanism. A digital timer for timing the end of cooking and a built-in clock. Protection against voltage surges (Over Voltage Protection). Inner door glass is removable for easy and efficient cleaning.

N5M90E5-B (6761).name: Black digital built oven
N5M90E5-B (6761).description: 9 varied cooking and baking programs: defrosting, double power grill, double grill combined with fan, top and bottom heating (with or without fan) and active turbo for uniform heat distribution. Includes a soft close mechanism for the door. Equipped with telescopic rails (half opening) for maximum comfort. Peripheral ventilation system to protect the kitchen cabinets. Flat baking chamber with high-quality enamel coating that is easy to clean and internal lighting.

N5M90E5 (6762).name: White built-in digital oven
N5M90E5 (6762).description: 9 customized cooking and baking programs that include: defrosting, double power grill, double grill and fan, top and bottom heating (with or without fan) and active turbo; Turbo active baking system that allows uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity; A door with a soft closing mechanism and three-layer tempered glass; Removable inner glass layer for easy cleaning; Smart digital control panel with push buttons and rotary switches; automatic shutdown timer of up to 9 hours; A peripheral ventilation system to protect the kitchen cabinets; interior lighting; High-quality enamel coating that is easy to clean.

BO-AGG3F(BK) (6773).name: Built-in black digital oven with thermometer
BO-AGG3F(BK) (6773).description: A digitally built oven with 9 cooking and baking programs including active turbo, grill, and defrosting. The oven is equipped with an internal thermometer (Meat Probe) for accurate temperature measurement inside the food. Digital control panel with touch buttons and a large LED display. Digital timer for future switching off and on. A door with 3 layers of glass for maximum thermal insulation and keeping the door cold. Baking chamber with high-quality enamel coating for easy cleaning. Peripheral ventilation system to protect the kitchen cabinets.

65M90M1 (6695).name: A retro-style cream mechanical built oven
65M90M1 (6695).description: 9 varied cooking and baking programs (including defrosting, double power grill, double grill and fan, top and bottom heating with or without fan, and active turbo); Turbo-active baking system that allows uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity for optimal baking; the peripheral ventilation system that maintains the temperature of the adjacent kitchen cabinets; A smart mechanical control panel in a rustic retro design; Luxurious cream finish from the Retro Collection series.

LUX-QLED75.name: 75' QLED screen
LUX-QLED75.description: Operating system: smart WebOS with access to leading applications (such as Netflix, YouTube and more); QLED technology to improve brightness and color depth; HDR support for high contrast and a realistic viewing experience; Connectivity: built-in Bluetooth to connect headphones and wireless speakers, Wi-Fi to connect to the network; Screen mirroring: Miracast for streaming content from your smartphone or computer; Voice search and smart remote support.

CRD40FHD.name: 40' screen

It includes a built-in digital tuner (DVB-T2/C) for receiving Idan Plus channels without the need for an external converter. The screen is equipped with a 3D+3D image processor to improve image quality and is suitable for use as a home TV or as a display screen for businesses.

65DME30004BK (6781).name: Black mechanical built oven
65DME30004BK (6781).description: 8 varied cooking and baking programs. Passive turbo system for uniform heat distribution. Baking chamber with high-quality enamel coating for easy cleaning. A mechanical control panel that includes push-in switches (Pop-up). A door with two layers of tempered glass for thermal insulation and safety. Built-in internal lighting. Additional accessories: two baking pans (one deep and one flat) and one grid.

24DMS4G113 (6726).name: Combined gas oven 60 cm stainless steel
24DMS4G113 (6726).description: 8 customized cooking and baking programs, including a turbo-active baking system that allows uniform heat distribution throughout the oven cavity. Additional features: upper glass cover to protect the cooking surface, lower storage drawer for kitchen utensils, adjustable legs for maximum stability, and strong internal lighting in the baking chamber. Quality stainless steel finish.

WS-651NQ.name: 65' QLED screen

L65MA-SME.name: 65' QLED screen
L65MA-SME.description: QLED screen that displays over a billion colors (1.07 billion) with wide color coverage DCI-P3 94%. Bezel-less Premium Metal design for a modern look. A cinematic sound experience with support for Dolby Audio, DTS-X and DTS Virtual:X. The Google TV system that allows access to thousands of apps through the Google Play Store (Netflix, YouTube, Prime Video are pre-installed). Voice control using the built-in Google Assistant. A 360° Bluetooth remote that allows control from any angle and voice search. Built-in screen mirroring via Chromecast and Miracast. Built-in digital receiver for Idan Plus broadcasts (DVB-T2/C/S2). A smart home interface (Smart Home Control Hub) for controlling supported IoT products.

H65S80EUX.name: 65' QLED screen (Newfan)
H65S80EUX.description: Smart TV with a Google TV interface that allows access to thousands of apps such as Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and Prime Video | QLED technology that offers over a billion color shades and high image accuracy Support for advanced HDR formats: Dolby Vision, HDR10 and HLG MEMC mechanism for motion smoothing that prevents blurring in fast scenes and sports broadcasts Advanced gaming features including VRR (Variable Refresh Rate) and ALLM (Automatic Low Latency Mode) for a smooth gaming experience | Built-in Chromecast for screen mirroring from your mobile phone or tablet Voice control using Google Assistant directly from the remote or the screen (Far Field Voice Control). Bezel-less design for a modern look and maximum display Dolby Atmos technology for a cinematic surround sound experience

KDG40XR683ANT (700140).name: 40' screen
KDG40XR683ANT (700140).description: A smart Google TV operating system that allows access to the Google Play app store. Built-in apps: Netflix, YouTube, Disney Plus, Prime Video. HDR10 support for wide dynamic range and improved color depth. Remote control that includes voice control (Google Assistant). Built-in digital tuner for receiving Idan Plus broadcasts. Screen mirroring support (Chromecast built-in). Frameless design for a modern look. Built-in media player for displaying photos, music and video through the USB connection.

WF13314GBC.name: Blackened stainless steel 13 kg washing machine

L43MA-AFME.name: screen 43'

UDG50QR680ANT (700051).name: 50' screen
UDG50QR680ANT (700051).description: Support for HDR10 and HLG technology to improve dynamic range and contrast; Frameless design for a luxurious look and a clean screen; Google Assistant is built-in to perform actions and voice search using the remote; Built-in Chromecast for mirroring content from your smartphone or tablet; Full access to the Google Play app store including Netflix, YouTube, Disney Plus and Prime Video; Motion Blur Compensation technology to reduce blur in fast movement; Built-in digital tuner (DVB-T/T2) for receiving Idan Plus broadcasts.

KDG43XR683ANT.name: screen 43'
KDG43XR683ANT.description: A smart TV with a 'Frameless' design that gives a clean and modern look; HDR10 support for improved contrast and color depth; Google TV interface that includes an app store with built-in support for Netflix, YouTube, Disney Plus and Prime Video; smart remote control with voice control; Built-in Dolby Digital and DTS decoder for improved audio quality; Dynamic noise reduction and color enhancement technology; option for a shutdown and activation timer; support for various video and music formats via the USB; Energy saving mode and automatic shutdown in the absence of a signal; Zero X radiation protection to protect the environment.

75GP095 (6752).name: Gas stove 75 cm black glass with grid

Safety sensors (Safety Valves) for automatic and immediate disconnection of the gas supply in case of extinguishing the flame to prevent leaks. Complete cast iron pot mounts that ensure uniform heat distribution and maintaining the stability of the dishes during cooking. Modern design with a black glass finish that is easy to clean.

WAN24009II.name: Washing machine 9 kg white (Clinton)

WW11BB9445GB.name: Washing machine 11 kg bespoke black
WW11BB9445GB.description: AI Ecobubble™ technology for powerful cleaning in cold water and preserving the fabric fibers. AI Wash that uses 4 sensors to weigh and optimize water and detergents. Super Speed ​​program for complete washing in only 39 minutes. The Hygiene Steam program for steam disinfection that neutralizes 99.9% of bacteria and allergens. SpaceMax™ technology that allows a large drum volume in a standard case. Wi-Fi connectivity for remote control and monitoring using the SmartThings app. Drum Clean+ program for cleaning and disinfecting the drum and gasket. Built-in protection against voltage surges and lightning.

WW90DG6U95LX.name: 9 kg washing machine I-DOS blackened stainless steel
WW90DG6U95LX.description: AI EcoBubble™ that produces soap bubbles for deep penetration into the skin even in cold water; Auto Dispense (I-DOS) - automatic dosing system for detergent and softener; AI Wash - smart sensors that adjust the amount of water and time according to weight and level of dirt; Super Speed ​​- fast washing program in 39 minutes; Hygiene Steam - steam program for disinfecting and removing bacteria; SmartThings - remote control and management via Wi-Fi; Drum Clean+ - program for cleaning and disinfecting the drum and seals; Bubble Soak - removing stubborn stains using bubble soaking; Less Microfiber technology to reduce the emission of synthetic fibers.

HW100-14979S8.name: Blackened stainless steel 10 kg washing machine

CM9120BI.name: Washing machine 9 kg

Advanced technologies: ProSmart Inverter motor (carbon-free) for quiet and economical operation, Bluetooth connectivity to the HomeWhiz app for remote control and downloading additional programs, SteamCure technology for softening hard dirt, the AddXtra function for adding items after starting work, and the AntiCrease mechanism to prevent wrinkles.

WW11BB5044AW.name: Washing machine 11 kg bespoke white
WW11BB5044AW.description: AI EcoBubble technology that turns soap into bubbles for deep cleaning even in cold water; SpaceMax technology that allows a large capacity in standard dimensions; Hygiene Steam program for steam disinfection that neutralizes 99.9% of bacteria and allergens; Full control through the SmartThings app (Wi-Fi); Drum Clean+ program for self-cleaning of the drum and rubber; 15 minute quick program; AI technology that learns user habits; Continuous automatic weighing mechanism; Child lock (Child Lock).

WW90CGC045AE.name: Washing machine 9 kg
WW90CGC045AE.description: AI Eco Bubble technology: turning soap into bubbles for deep cleaning even in cold water and protecting the fabric; Hygiene Steam: steam program to disinfect and neutralize 99.9% of bacteria and allergens; Smart connectivity: built-in WiFi and support for the SmartThings application for managing energy consumption (AI Energy Mode), downloading programs and remote control; SpaceMax: greater capacity in standard external dimensions; Drum Clean: a program for cleaning and disinfecting the drum without chemicals; Quick program 15 minutes; StayClean drawer: automatic washing for soap residues; Protection: built-in surge protector and lightning; Automatic weighing (Fuzzy Logic) to adjust water and electricity consumption.

PVWM7KQ7.name: Washing machine 7 kg

AI-80-P123111EA05e.name: Washing machine 8 kg

AI-100-125T5DB02e.name: Washing machine 10 kg
