PVWM6KQ7.name: Washing machine 6 kg
PVWM6KQ7.description: washing machine with a front opening; automatic balancing system; anti-foam control; electronic control control; flood control; temperature selection option (cold, 20, 40, 60, 95 degrees); Possibility of changing the squeezing speed; wide opening door; 3 soap compartments (for detergents); a pump that includes a filter; ecosystem; Door lock type: PTC.

DV80CGC030AE.name: Dryer 8 kg heat pump
DV80CGC030AE.description: Remote control: support for SmartThings app and Wi-Fi connection; AI Energy Mode: monitoring and saving electricity consumption; OptimalDry: intelligent sensor system (humidity, temperature and heat exchanger cleaning) for precise drying; Hygiene Care: disinfection program to remove bacteria and allergens; Wrinkle Prevent: preventing wrinkles by turning the drum at the end of the operation; Quick program: drying in 35 minutes (for an amount of up to 1 kg); Air Wash: refreshing clothes with hot/cold air; Reversible door: possibility to change the door's opening direction depending on the location; special programs: wool, outerwear, delicates.

B3T41011DW.name: Washer dryer 10 kg condenser
B3T41011DW.description: The product includes 15 different drying programs: cotton, eco cotton, synthetic, mixed, towels, gentle care (GentleCare), sports, refresh, time-based programs, jeans, outerwear, everyday, shirts in 30 minutes, express super short (14 minutes), and hygiene+. OptiSense technology with moisture sensors that stop the operation when the laundry is dry; AquaWave drum with wave motion to protect clothes; Internal drum lighting (DC LED); Reversible transparent door; automatic anti-crease function activated at the end of the cycle; End action buzzer; child lock; Indications for a full water tank, filter cleaning and condenser cleaning.

PVDR8K-COGR.name: Washer dryer 8 kg condenser
PVDR8K-COGR.description: 15 different drying programs to suit various types of fabrics; Anti-crease function to prevent wrinkles at the end of the operation; Delay Timer: the possibility of a delayed activation of up to 24 hours; Internal LED lighting inside the drum; Safety locking mechanism for children; adjustable legs for stability; Program time at full load: about 145 minutes; Rotations per minute: 51±3 to prevent wrinkles and uniform drying.

DV90T5241AT.name: Dryer 9 kg heat pump
DV90T5241AT.description: AI Control technology that studies the user's habits and recommends programs. Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity with the SmartThings app for remote management. Auto Cycle Link feature for automatic synchronization between the washing machine and the dryer. Diamond Drum (Diamond Drum) to maintain the fabric fibers. OptimalDry smart sensor system for detecting humidity and temperature and optimal drying. A quick drying program (Quick Dry 35) of 35 minutes for one kilogram. Internal LED lighting inside the drum. Reversible Door. Wrinkle Prevent mechanism to prevent wrinkles at the end of the operation. 4 layer filter for easy and efficient cleaning.

GT485.name: Washer dryer 8 kg condenser
GT485.description: drying using sensors that stop the operation automatically upon reaching the selected degree of drying; HygieneRefresh program to destroy bacteria and hygienic refreshment; SupremeRefresh program for refreshing with steam and removing odors and wrinkles; Automatic anti-crease function for up to two hours after the end of the program; Two-way drum movement (criss-cross) to prevent clothes from tangling; Express Dry program for quick and economical drying; A fully Hebrew operating panel that includes a digital display and touch buttons; Internal LED lighting inside the drum; Safety locking mechanism for children; Alerts about a full water tank and a clogged filter.

LCT70GWSB.name: Gas stove 70 cm white glass
LCT70GWSB.description: The LCT70GWSB model offers a combination of power and safety: the turbo flame is located on the right side and enables quick cooking in a wok or in huge pots. The stove is equipped with safety sensors (FFD) on all burners, which automatically stop the flow of gas in the event of the flame going out. The white glass surface gives a modern and luxurious look to the kitchen while keeping the surface easy to clean. The gas heads and grids are designed for high durability over time and simple maintenance.

RELAX INVERTER 340.name: 2.5 hp air conditioner
RELAX INVERTER 340.description: Advanced inverter technology for saving electricity consumption and maintaining a stable temperature; Built-in Wi-Fi that allows remote control through an app; Built-in Shabbat mode approved for use on Shabbat; 4D air distribution that ensures uniform air flow throughout the room (up-down and right-left); self-cleaning of the battery to prevent the accumulation of mold and bad smells; Extremely short evaporator that allows for flexible installation; 8 different blower speeds; Gold hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and extend the life of the air conditioner; possibility of bilateral drainage; Optional: preparation for dry touch and connection of Curie control.

MD100A70/W (6428).name: 7 kg tumble dryer with hose
MD100A70/W (6428).description: 15 drying programs to choose from, suitable for all types of fabrics; A unique hygienic drying program for very delicate washing; 3 degrees of drying to choose from; Anti-wrinkle function to prevent wrinkles; Option to delay activation up to 24 hours; locking mechanism for child safety; wide door opening angle; High-quality front filter that is easy to clean; Humidity sensors (in some models in the series) and control panel in Hebrew.

GHS604AG2EI.name: Gas stove 60 cm stainless steel
GHS604AG2EI.description: The stove includes a powerful turbo wok burner (3.4kW) designed for quick cooking and sautéing. The device is equipped with an electronic ignition system that allows convenient one-handed ignition through the control buttons. In terms of safety, there are sensors that detect a sudden shutdown of the flame and prevent gas leakage into the kitchen space. The brushed stainless steel surface and the disintegrating gas heads allow for easy maintenance and cleaning of grease and food residues. The stove is suitable for standard installation in marble (cut-out) with a width of 60 cm.

LCV70GW.name: Gas stove 70 cm white glass
LCV70GW.description: A 70 cm wide gas stove that provides five cooking centers for versatile and convenient use. A particularly powerful turbo wok flame located in the center and designed for quick frying and cooking at high temperatures. The device is equipped with an automatic ignition system that allows convenient one-handed operation. From a safety point of view, the stove includes thermal sensors that cut off the gas supply immediately if the fire goes out. The tempered glass surface in combination with the cast iron grids provide stability Maximum for heavy pots and simple and efficient cleaning.

PFC75B.name: Gas stove 75 cm black glass
PFC75B.description: 75 cm wide gas stove (marketing size) with 5 cooking centers that allow maximum flexibility; powerful turbo burner for fast cooking and wok tossing; durable and easy-to-clean crystal glass surface; luxurious Italian design from the Crystal series; precise temperature control using high-quality faucets; adaptation to standard marble cutting dimensions (56x49 cm).

GIEI838980INH.name: 80 cm 3-phase induction stove
GIEI838980INH.description: FullFlexi technology that allows the use of the entire stove area for dishes of different sizes and shapes; Built-in WiFi connectivity for remote control and monitoring through the HomeWhiz app; Booster function (turbo) for extremely fast boiling; LED Direct Access control panel with touch sensors for each area separately; automatic pot detection; Digital timer with automatic shutdown for each location; 3 automatic cooking programs (keeping warm, melting, frying); Support for HobToHood technology to synchronize with a compatible hood; Safety mechanisms that include a child lock, protection against overheating, protection from overflowing liquids and residual heat indication for each area.

IT843SYB.name: 80 cm 3-phase induction stove
IT843SYB.description: BridgeZone: option to combine two adjacent cooking zones into one large surface for pots and wide grills; PowerBoost: fast heating function to speed up the cooking process; StayWarm: keeping food warm at a constant temperature of 70°C; SoftMelt: gentle melting at a temperature of 42°C (ideal for chocolate or butter); AutoDetect: automatic detection of the location of the pot on the surface; SimplicityControl: smart and intuitive touch control; Digital timer up to 99 minutes with automatic shutdown and voice alert; ChildLock: safety lock against children; Residual heat indicator (H) for each cooking zone.

PCH6A5B90Y.name: Gas stove 60 cm stainless steel casting grid
PCH6A5B90Y.description: The Bosch 6 series stoves include the revolutionary FlameSelect technology that allows precise and measured control of the flame in 9 different intensity levels. The device is equipped with a particularly powerful wok burner (3.5 kW) suitable for quick cooking and sautéing. The grids of the pots are made of cast iron which guarantees maximum stability for the cookware and durability over time. The command buttons are ergonomic 'sword' buttons for maximum ease of operation.

IT640BSC.name: 60 cm 3-phase induction stove
IT640BSC.description: Touch Control smart operating system (touch sensors); PowerBoost function to accelerate the heating speed in all cooking zones; built-in timer for automatic shutdown (up to 99 minutes); residual heat indicator for safety (Residual Heat Indicator); Child lock mechanism (ChildLock) to prevent unwanted activation; automatic detection of pots and pans; Slim and modern design from the Essential Line series.

EIV634.name: 60 cm 3-phase induction stove
EIV634.description: Bridge function: allows two separate heating zones to be combined into one extra large cooking zone. Touch & Slider control: intuitive touch and slide sensors for precise power control. PowerBoost (turbo) function: fast and particularly powerful heating for fast boiling. EcoTimer: A timer that turns off the cooking zone before the end of the set time to utilize the remaining heat and save electricity. CleverHeat: Heat indicator stays smart in 3 stages for maximum safety. Automatic pot identification system. Stop & Go function (activation/pause): allows a temporary pause in cooking and returning to the same settings. Child lock and button lock to prevent accidental settings change. Automatic disconnection mechanism for safety. Easy installation with the Click-Fit method.

EIV84550.name: Cooker 80 cm 3-phase induction MULTIZONE
EIV84550.description: DoubleBridge technology that allows the connection of two different cooking areas to create one large work surface; MultiZone function that gives flexibility in the placement of pots and pans; Hob2Hood system for automatic and wireless synchronization with a compatible hood; PowerBoost function for extremely fast heating (boil water in less than 90 seconds); Heat Memory technology that preserves the cooking settings for 120 seconds in the case of lifting the vessel or gliding; A separate timer for each of the five cooking zones; EcoTimer for utilizing residual heat to save energy; Stop & Go function to delay cooking; Child lock mechanism, automatic shutdown and residual heat indication in 3 stages.

LIV64440CB.name: Cooker 60 cm induction 3-phase MULTIZONE
LIV64440CB.description: A flexible MultiZone surface that allows pots and pans of different sizes and shapes to be placed anywhere on the marked surface; Bridge function to combine two heating zones into one extra large zone; Slider Touch sensors for quick and accurate control of heat intensity; PowerBoost function (turbo) for extremely fast heating; automatic pot identification system; Pause function (activation/pause) for temporarily stopping the cooking and returning to the original settings; timer for each cooking zone up to 99 minutes; EcoTimer for saving energy that uses residual heat towards the end of cooking; CleverHeat indicators that show the level of remaining heat in 3 stages; Safety mechanisms that include child lock and automatic disconnection; An easy-to-clean surface that does not heat up around the tool.

MC-IF3554BJ1A (67001).name: Stove 60 cm induction 4 cooking centers 1-phase with cable
MC-IF3554BJ1A (67001).description: 9 levels of intensity to choose from for each focus; BOOST function to speed up cooking (up to 5 minutes); Smart touch control panel (Full Touch Control); automatic shutdown timer up to 99 minutes; pan detection sensor (Pan Sensor); residual heat indication for maximum safety; Overheating protection mechanism; child safety lock; Option to activate 4 cooking centers at the same time (up to power 7 maximum); Continuous and stable heating technology even at low intensities.

MC-IF3518G4S (6558).name: Stove 60 cm induction 4 cooking centers 1-phase with cable
MC-IF3518G4S (6558).description: 9 degrees of heat to choose from for each focal point; BOOST function to increase the power; Smart control panel with FULL TOUCH CONTROL technology; LED digital display; automatic shutdown timer up to 99 minutes; child safety lock; safety mechanism for automatic shutdown; Option to activate 4 cooking centers at the same time (up to power 7 maximum); Automatic pot detection.

PVHC4F-BK.name: 60 cm 1-phase ceramic stove with cable
PVHC4F-BK.description: Control using a touch control panel (Touch Control), digital timer, child safety lock mechanism, automatic shut-off mechanism for increased safety, residual heat indicator (H) that warns of a hot surface after use, high-quality and easy-to-clean ceramic glass surface.

F6GGW-859.name: Gas stove 60 cm gray glass
F6GGW-859.description: SABAF burner system for optimal performance. Powerful turbo burner designed for fast cooking and continuous use. Safety sensors (thermocouple sensors) in each burner to prevent gas leakage in case the flame goes out. Durable and easy-to-use operating buttons that allow maximum precision in regulating the flame intensity. Modern design with a luxurious and easy-to-clean gray glass finish.

K6510IL.name: 60 cm gas stove, black glass, side buttons
K6510IL.description: Electronic ignition is built into the gas buttons that allows one-handed ignition. A safety sensor system (Flame Failure Device) for each individual burner, which automatically cuts off the gas flow in the event of a sudden flame shutdown. An Italian SABAF wok burner that provides high heat intensity for quick cooking and sautéing. A modern and luxurious design that fits in a uniform line with the work surface and is easy to clean.

F6GWWT-446.name: Gas stove 60 cm white glass
F6GWWT-446.description: Electronic ignition is built into the start buttons for one-handed use. Safety sensors (thermocouple) for each individual burner, which cut off the gas flow automatically in the event of the flame being extinguished to prevent leaks. A particularly powerful turbo burner for quick cooking and sautéing. Durable operating buttons that allow maximum accuracy in flame intensity. A smooth glass surface without a frame that allows easy and quick cleaning.

FQ6VT-1063-3F.name: 60 cm 3-phase ceramic stove
FQ6VT-1063-3F.description: Front operation using a touch panel (Touch); digital display; digital timer for programming cooking time up to 99 minutes; child safety lock function; Residual Heat Indicator that warns when the surface is still hot to the touch; Full thermal insulation between the heating zones and the rest of the stove surface; Luxurious frameless design (Flush mount capability depends on installation).

F7GBCT-674.name: Stove 75 cm black glass
F7GBCT-674.description: Built-in electronic ignition for each individual burner. Safety sensors (thermocouple) for all burners that stop the flow of gas in the event of the flame going out. Central turbo burner with a triple ring for fast and powerful heating. Heat resistant power buttons. Separate pot grids for each flame for maximum stability and easy cleaning.

75GP503-W (6753).name: Gas stove 75 cm white glass
75GP503-W (6753).description: A 75 cm wide gas stove that offers a wide cooking surface with 5 flames of different sizes to suit all types of pots. Includes a powerful double turbo flame for extremely fast cooking (wok). Maximum safety using safety sensors (Thermocouple) to automatically cut off the gas flow if the flame goes out. Precise control of the flame intensity using sensitive burner taps. High durability thanks to the use of Italian Defendi burners and iron mounts Heavy cast.

HILW75222SW.name: Gas stove 75 cm white glass
HILW75222SW.description: 5 gas burners with SABAF technology that include: a powerful central wok burner (5 kW), a rear-left fast burner (2.9 kW), two standard burners (1.75 kW each) and an auxiliary burner (1 kW); High Efficiency Burner technology for fast cooking and gas savings; Gas Safety system - safety sensors that cut off the gas supply automatically in the event of the flame being extinguished; Electronic ignition built into the operating buttons (one-handed ignition); Modern design with a front control panel that allows maximum utilization of the cooking space.

60GL403-W (6742).name: 60 cm gas stove, white glass, side buttons
60GL403-W (6742).description: quality Italian burners made by SABAF; safety sensors for automatic disconnection of the gas supply in the event of the flame being extinguished; Built-in electronic ignition system with buttons; Faucet for each burner for precise control of flame intensity; control buttons located on the side of the surface; Individual pot mounts (cast iron or enamel depending on the local importer's version); The glass surface is smooth and easy to clean.

MG60GH096KT6B-IR (6755).name: Gas stove 60 cm black glass Vulcano
MG60GH096KT6B-IR (6755).description: Turbo Vulcano 2.0 professional copper burner designed for frying and cooking at very high power (5KW); FFD safety system for automatic disconnection of the gas supply in case of extinguishing the flame; Electronic ignition built into the gas buttons; A unique pot grid that includes a smart ring in the small burner, which enables stable cooking even in extremely small pots; durable and smooth glass surface that allows easy and quick cleaning; Burner structure resistant to intensive use.

60GL403 (6743).name: 60 cm gas stove, black glass, side buttons
60GL403 (6743).description: Gas cooking on 4 flames of different intensities suitable for fast frying (turbo flame), normal cooking and slow cooking. Maximum safety thanks to safety sensors (Flame Failure Device) for automatic disconnection of the gas supply in case the flame goes out. Precise control of the flame intensity using high-quality gas faucets. Easy cleaning thanks to a smooth glass surface and detachable parts. Convenient ignition with one hand via the control buttons.

75GP503-B (6738).name: Gas stove 75 cm black glass
75GP503-B (6738).description: A wide gas stove that allows cooking 5 pots at the same time; A particularly powerful turbo flame designed for wok-tossing and quick frying; A burner tap for each flame that allows precise and gentle control over the intensity of the heat; high durability over time thanks to the use of Italian burners and a tempered glass surface; Easy and quick cleaning of the work surface; Maximum stability for all types of pots thanks to massive cast iron tripods; Full adaptation to a standard niche of 60 cm despite an external width of 75 cm.

60SJ401 (6740).name: Gas stove 60 cm stainless steel
60SJ401 (6740).description: brushed stainless steel surface resistant to fingerprints and dirt; Safety sensors (thermocouple) to cut off the gas flow automatically when turning off the flame to prevent leaks; Front gas regulators for precise control of flame intensity; 4 cooking zones of different sizes to accommodate a variety of pots and pans; One-hand ignition via the control buttons.

60GH503-W (6754).name: Gas stove 60 cm white glass
60GH503-W (6754).description: A designed gas stove that includes a powerful turbo burner for fast cooking at high temperatures. The system is equipped with Italian burners from SABAF for reliability and high performance. The cast iron mounts guarantee stability to the pots and uniform heat distribution. The stove includes precise control taps for each flame and an easy-to-clean glass surface that gives the kitchen a modern look.

30SB005 (6734).name: Domino stainless steel gas stove
30SB005 (6734).description: The product offers efficient and space-saving cooking thanks to a narrow 'domino' design, suitable for small kitchens or as an addition to existing cooking surfaces. It includes a powerful burner for frying and quick boiling alongside a small burner for slow cooking. The stove is equipped with advanced safety mechanisms that prevent gas leakage, convenient ignition with one hand through the buttons, and stable mounts that allow working with heavy pots. The stainless steel surface is durable and easy to clean.

QE65S90D-OLED.name: 65' OLED screen (Sameline)
QE65S90D-OLED.description: OLED technology with absolute black and colors certified by Pantone; 4K AI Upscaling mechanism to improve the image using 20 neural networks of artificial intelligence; Tizen Smart TV operating system that includes Gaming Hub and access to streaming apps; Support for Dolby Atmos and Bone Tracking Sound (OTS Lite) for a surround sound experience; Real Depth Enhancer to add depth and 3D feeling; Advanced gaming features including VRR, ALLM and FreeSync Premium; EyeComfort mode for adjusting brightness and colors to prevent eye fatigue; Ultra-thin LaserSlim design for a luxurious look.

QE55QN85D-NEOQLED.name: 55' QLED screen (Samline)
QE55QN85D-NEOQLED.description: Contrast and image accuracy are particularly high thanks to Mini LED technology; image upgrade to 4K quality using artificial intelligence (4K AI Upscaling); Advanced gaming experience with support for FreeSync Premium Pro, VRR and ALLM; Smart TV Tizen operating system with access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, etc.); Smart home support through SmartThings; built-in speakers with object tracking sound that produce a surround sound experience; EyeComfort mode for adjusting the brightness of the screen to the environment; The SolarCell remote control is charged using light.

UE32T5300AD.name: Screen 32' (Samline)
UE32T5300AD.description: Smart TV based on the Tizen operating system with access to popular apps (YouTube, Netflix and more). AirPlay 2 support for streaming content from Apple devices. Screen mirroring (Mirroring) from the mobile to the TV. Built-in web browser. Support for the SmartThings application to manage the smart home. Basic gaming mode (Game Mode). Ultra Clean View mechanism to reduce image noise. IPv6 and EPG support.

75UT80006.name: 75' screen
75UT80006.description: webOS 24 operating system with the Re:New program that guarantees version updates for 5 years. Support for HDR10 Pro and HLG formats to improve contrast and color. AI Sound Pro technology for optimal sound adaptation to the content. FILMMAKER MODE to watch movies exactly as the director intended. Gaming capabilities: ALLM mode for low latency, HGiG for HDR games and Game Optimizer interface. Intelligent control using ThinQ AI and a Magic Remote that includes voice search in Hebrew. Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support. Option to share a view from room to room (reception). A full web browser and app store that includes Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and Israeli apps.

UE65DU8000U.name: Screen 65 (Samline)
UE65DU8000U.description: Dynamic Crystal Color technology for realistic and rich colors. Ultra-thin AirSlim design for a luxurious look. Tizen Smart TV operating system that includes support for streaming apps, a web browser and a built-in SmartThings hub. OTS Lite technology for object tracking sound (Object Tracking Sound). Support for HDR10+ and HLG formats. Automatic Game Mode (ALLM) and Motion Xcelerator technology for smooth movement. Environmentally friendly SolarCell remote that charges using sunlight or indoor lighting. Possibility of mirroring the screen from the mobile (Mirroring) and split view (Multi View).

86UT800063410.name: '86 screen
86UT800063410.description: For more details on the '86 screen and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

50UA80006.name: 50' screen
50UA80006.description: Smart image upgrade (4K AI Super Upscaling) to improve content quality; virtual surround sound with AI Sound Pro technology (9.1.2 channels); webOS 25 operating system with access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Prime Video); Magic Remote smart remote with voice control (AI Voice ID); FILMMAKER MODE mode for watching movies in original quality; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support; Game Optimizer (Game Optimizer) with automatic low latency mode (ALLM); WOW Orchestra interface for audio synchronization with LG sound projectors.

50UA73006.name: 50' screen
50UA73006.description: For more details on the 50' screen and the availability of the product, you can contact Hadad Yuval Electric Ltd. on WhatsApp or by phone.

43UA73006.name: screen 43'
43UA73006.description: webOS 25 smart operating system with the Re:New program that guarantees updates for 5 years; Upgrading content to 4K quality using artificial intelligence (AI Upscaling); Filmmaker Mode to preserve the creator's original intention; Advanced gaming features: ALLM (Auto Low Latency Mode), HGiG, and game optimization bar (Game Optimizer); ThinQ AI support for smart home management; Apple AirPlay 2 and Apple Home compatibility; A full web browser and a wide app store (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and more); Support for Dynamic Tone Mapping to improve contrast in real time.

55UA73006.name: screen 55'
55UA73006.description: Smart webOS 25 operating system with access to leading streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, Prime Video and more). Artificial intelligence (AI) image processing that optimizes image and sound in real time. Gaming features including Game Optimizer, Game Dashboard and Automatic Low Latency Equalization Mode (ALLM). Apple AirPlay 2 and Apple Home support. Screen sharing and smartphone mirroring (ThinQ App). A full built-in web browser. Magic Remote compatible remote control (required separately in some packages) for voice control and pointing.

65UA73006.name: screen 65'
65UA73006.description: webOS 24 smart operating system with a personal user interface and access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+, and more); Support for ThinQ AI technology for smart home management; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support; Advanced gaming mode including Game Optimizer, ALLM and HGiG; Built-in full web browser; Sharing mobile content (Mirroring); LG Re:New program that supports operating system updates for 5 years; Smart remote control supports voice commands.

75UA85006.name: 75' screen
75UA85006.description: Advanced AI processor to improve image and sound quality in real time; Upgrading content (4K Upscaling) using artificial intelligence; Smart Magic Remote with voice recognition and AI Voice ID; Support for Apple AirPlay 2, Apple Home and the Matter standard for smart home management; FILMMAKER Mode for authentic movie viewing; Advanced gaming features: VRR (Variable Refresh Rate), ALLM (Automatic Low Latency Mode), HGiG and dedicated gaming toolbar; Personal user interface with subject tabs (sports, gaming, home office); AI Chatbot support for assistance and settings.

65UA85006.name: screen 65'
65UA85006.description: Smart OS: webOS 25 with access to leading streaming apps; HDR technology: support for HDR10 Pro and HLG; Image enhancement: 4K Super Upscaling powered by artificial intelligence, AI Picture Wizard to customize the image; Audio capabilities: AI Sound Pro (virtual sound in 9.1.2 channels), support for Clear Voice Pro; Viewing mode: FILMMAKER MODE to preserve the director's original intention; Gaming: Game Optimizer, ALLM mode (Auto Low Latency Mode) and VRR up to 60Hz; Control: Magic Remote with pointing (Air Mouse) and voice control (LG ThinQ AI, Alexa); Additional features: mobile content sharing (AirPlay 2, Screen Share), full web browser.

75UR91006.name: 75' screen
75UR91006.description: Operating system: webOS 23 with a smart interface and access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+); HDR10 Pro and HLG support for a rich viewing experience; Upgrading content to 4K using artificial intelligence (4K Upscaling); Sound: 20W 2.0 channel speaker system with AI Sound Pro technology (virtual mix for 5.1.2 channels); Connectivity: 3 HDMI inputs (including HDMI 2 eARC support), 2 USB 2.0 inputs, built-in Wi-Fi 5, Bluetooth 5.0, optical audio output, and network (LAN) input; Gaming features: ALLM mode (Auto Low Latency Mode), HGiG, and Game Optimizer; Voice control using ThinQ AI and Magic Remote; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support.

55NANO80A6A.name: 55' NANO screen
55NANO80A6A.description: webOS 25 smart operating system that includes support for the webOS Re:New Program (updates for 5 years); Magic Remote with motion control, scroll wheel and voice search; ThinQ AI for smart home management; Apple AirPlay 2 and Apple Home support; Upgrading content to 4K quality using artificial intelligence (4K Super Upscaling); Filmmaker Mode for faithful viewing of the original; Gaming capabilities: Game Optimizer, HGiG, ALLM, VRR (up to 60Hz); full web browser; LG app store that includes leading streaming services (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and more).

86NANO81T6A.name: 86' NANO screen
86NANO81T6A.description: NanoCell technology for pure and accurate colors; webOS 24 operating system with five-year Re:New upgrades program; Apple AirPlay 2 and Matter support; An advanced gaming experience that includes support for AMD FreeSync, HGIG mode and Game Optimizer; An artificial intelligence processor that performs upscaling for low-resolution content; FILMMAKER MODE to watch movies exactly as the director intended; Sound tuning based on artificial intelligence (AI Acoustic Tuning) that adjusts the sound to the acoustics of the room; Magic Remote with voice search and support for ThinQ AI.

50NANO81T6A.name: 50' NANO screen
50NANO81T6A.description: NanoCell technology that uses nanoparticles to filter impure colors and obtain a sharp and realistic image; Upgrading content to 4K quality using artificial intelligence (AI Upscaling); support for HDR10 and HLG formats with dynamic tone mapping; AI Sound Pro sound system that simulates a 9.1.2 channel audio experience; webOS Re:New program that guarantees operating system updates for 4 years; Support for ThinQ AI which includes search and voice control in Hebrew; Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support for sharing content from Apple devices; Filmmaker Mode for watching movies as the director intended; Gaming capabilities including ALLM mode to prevent lag, Game Optimizer interface, HGiG support and access to cloud services such as NVIDIA GeForce Now; Magic Remote smart remote with pointing capability (air mouse); Sharing content from room to room (Room-to-Room Share).

65QNED86A6A.name: Screen 65' QNED
65QNED86A6A.description: Dynamic QNED Color technology for 100% color volume. Picture and sound improvement based on artificial intelligence (AI Picture Pro, AI Super Upscaling). Advanced gaming experience with FreeSync Premium, VRR and Game Optimizer. Smart webOS operating system with access to streaming apps (Netflix, YouTube, Disney+ and more). Voice control using the Magic Remote. Apple AirPlay 2 and HomeKit support.

65OLEDB56.name: 65' OLED screen
65OLEDB56.description: presenting absolute black and infinite contrast thanks to the OLED technology; AI Picture Pro and AI Sound Pro technology for automatic improvement of the image and sound based on artificial intelligence; Advanced gaming experience with 0.1ms response time and support for NVIDIA G-Sync and AMD FreeSync Premium; FILMMAKER Mode for authentic movie viewing; intuitive webOS interface that includes access to leading streaming apps (Netflix, Disney+, YouTube) and ThinQ AI support for smart home control; Magic Remote with support for voice commands in Hebrew; webOS Re:New program that guarantees operating system updates for 5 years.

65QNED70A6A.name: Screen 65' QNED
65QNED70A6A.description: Dynamic QNED Color technology for accurate and rich color reproduction in 100% volume; Alpha 7 generation 8 artificial intelligence processor that performs image upgrading (AI Super Upscaling) and adjusts the brightness to the environmental conditions; AI Sound Pro system that simulates 9.1.2 channel surround sound; Advanced gaming features including Game Optimizer, Game Dashboard, ALLM mode and HGiG; Smart home support through Apple HomeKit, Apple AirPlay 2 and Google Cast; Magic Remote smart remote with voice search (including Hebrew) and hand movement control; webOS Re:New program that guarantees operating system updates for 5 years; FILMMAKER Mode for watching movies exactly as the director intended.

77OLEDB56LA.name: 77' OLED screen
77OLEDB56LA.description: Infinite contrast and absolute black color; AI Picture Pro technology to improve image quality in real time; AI Sound Pro simulates sound in 9.1.2 virtual channels; Advanced gaming package including VRR, G-Sync, FreeSync and ALLM; webOS interface Re:New Program that guarantees system updates for 5 years; FILMMAKER Mode™ to watch movies exactly as the director intended; Intelligent voice control using the Magic Remote

CLASSIC INVERTER 390.name: Air conditioner 3.2 hp
CLASSIC INVERTER 390.description: Full Inverter technology for saving up to 50% in electricity consumption; Remote control using the Electra Smart app (built-in Wi-Fi); Shabbat mode is built in with the approval of the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute; 4D air distribution (up-down and right-left) for uniform air flow; Gold hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and extend the life of the air conditioner; Self-cleaning system to prevent mold and bad smells; 8 speeds for the blower of the indoor unit for silent operation; Possibility of double-sided drainage for ease of installation; Curie control support and dry touch (optional).

MAX INVERTER 390.name: Air conditioner 3.2 hp
MAX INVERTER 390.description: Full inverter technology to save up to 50% in electricity consumption, maintaining a stable temperature without cold/heat waves, extremely quiet operation (Quiet Mode), active carbon filter to filter odors and bacteria, hydrophilic coating on the indoor and outdoor unit to prevent corrosion, I Feel mode to adjust the temperature to the location of the remote, the possibility of connecting to a Wi-Fi network for remote control (using the Electra Smart app), a built-in timer and sleep mode to save at night.

RELAX INVERTER 240.name: Air conditioner 2 hp
RELAX INVERTER 240.description: Inverter technology for saving electricity; Smart Home - remote control using an app (built-in Wi-Fi); Shabbat mode is built in with the approval of the Shabbat shifts; 4D air distribution (intelligent movement in 4 directions); self-cleaning of the battery to prevent mold and odors; 8 speeds for the evaporator blower; Hydrophilic coating to preserve the battery for a long time; possibility of bilateral drainage; Extra short evaporator for flexible installation; Suitable for rooms with a size of about 26-30 square meters.

A INVERTER 240.name: Air conditioner 2 hp
A INVERTER 240.description: Inverter technology for saving up to 50% in electricity consumption; Remote control using the Electra Smart app (built-in Wi-Fi); Shabbat mode is structured with the approval of the Scientific and Technological Institute for Halacha and Rabbi Rubin; 4D air distribution (up-down, right-left); golden hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and maintain the longevity of the product; 8 blower speeds for extremely quiet operation; Self Cleaning function to self-clean the battery and prevent mold; Hidden digital display.

RELAX INVERTER 170.name: Air conditioner 1.3 hp
RELAX INVERTER 170.description: Inverter technology for saving energy and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in Wi-Fi for remote control via the Smart Home app. A structured Shabbat situation approved by the halachic institutes. Air distribution in 4 directions (4D Airflow). 8 different blower speeds to customize. Battery self-cleaning function to prevent mold and bad odors. A particularly short and compact evaporator that allows installation in narrow places. Hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and maintain the durability of the air conditioner over time. Two-sided drainage option for flexibility in installation.

RELAX INVERTER 140.name: Air conditioner 1 hp
RELAX INVERTER 140.description: Inverter technology for saving electricity and maintaining a stable temperature; Built-in Wi-Fi (Smart Home) for remote control via an app; Built-in Shabbat mode with the approval of the 'Shabbat shifts'; 4D air distribution (in all directions) for maximum comfort; Self-cleaning system of the battery to prevent the accumulation of mold and odors; 8 working speeds for the blower of the indoor unit; An extremely short evaporator that allows installation in places with limited space; Hydrophilic coating to prevent corrosion and maintain the longevity of the air conditioner; Possibility of double-sided drainage for ease of installation; Hidden digital display.

HARMONY INV WF -11.name: Air conditioner 1 hp
HARMONY INV WF -11.description: Inverter technology for significant electricity savings and quiet and reliable operation; Built-in WiFi connectivity for remote control via an app; The Shabbat mechanism is built in with the approval of the Shabbat Shifts; Super Quiet mode for extremely quiet operation; Sleep function for pleasant and economical sleep; Auto mode for automatic switching between cooling and heating depending on the room temperature; Powerful air dispersion over a long distance; 5 ventilation intensities to choose from; Hydrophilic coating in units to prevent corrosion; My Temp function for precise adjustment of the temperature in the user's environment; Auto Restart for automatic return to work after a power outage; Possibility of dry contact (Dry Contact) for control using a room card

A INVERTER 450T.name: Air conditioner 3.6 hp
A INVERTER 450T.description: Inverter technology for saving up to 50% in electricity consumption and maintaining a stable temperature; SMART - full remote control through an app and built-in Wi-Fi; The state of Shabbat is structured with the approval of the halachic institutes; 4D air distribution (right-left and up-down) for uniform air conditioning in the room space; I FEEL - a sensor in the remote that adjusts the temperature to the user's environment; Self Cleaning - a system for self-cleaning the battery to prevent the accumulation of mold and bad smells; Super Quiet - extremely quiet operation; Gold hydrophilic coating on the inner and outer unit to protect against corrosion; Two-sided drainage option for ease of installation; Hidden digital display.

SOLO INV 140NG.name: Air conditioner 1 hp
SOLO INV 140NG.description: Remote control via built-in WiFi; 7 fan speeds (7 Fan Speeds) for extremely quiet operation; I Feel function for adjusting the temperature to the location of the remote control; Self-cleaning and self-drying to prevent mold and odors; 4D air distribution for uniformity in the room; Shabbat function and kosher standard with the approval of the Shabbat shift and the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute; Cold Plasma technology for air purification; PM2.5 filter to achieve optimal purification; Sleep mode for a pleasant sleep; automatic change from cooling to heating (Auto); Memory for last action (Auto Restart); Hydrophilic coating to maintain the air conditioner for a long time.

SOLO INV 180NG.name: Air conditioner 1.3 hp
SOLO INV 180NG.description: Inverter technology for saving energy and maintaining a stable temperature. Built-in WIFI for remote control from your smartphone. 7 blower speeds for extremely quiet operation. 4D air distribution (up-down and right-left) for uniform air conditioning in the space. I Feel function for adjusting the temperature according to the location of the remote control. Self Dry function for cleaning and drying the battery to prevent mold and odors. Sleep mode for automatic temperature change during the night. Timer X3 that allows programming up to 3 time periods in 24 hours. Includes a Shabbat function and a kosher standard approved by the Shabbat shift and the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Hydrophilic coating to protect the battery from corrosion. Auto Restart for automatic return to operation after a power outage. Possibility to connect a motion detector and a smart home component (optional).

SUPREME 21.name: Air conditioner 2 HP ON/OFF
SUPREME 21.description: AIR CARE UVC technology is combined with a PM2.5 filter for optimal and bacterial air purification. 7 fan speeds for extremely silent operation. Built-in WIFI for remote control via smartphone. I FEEL function for adjusting the temperature near the remote control. 4D air distribution (up-down and right-left). Sleep mode for a pleasant sleep and saving electricity. Self-cleaning function to prevent mold and odors. Shabbat status with the approval of the Shabbat shift and the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute. Golden hydrophilic coating to maintain the air conditioner for a long time. Built-in dry contact (BMS). Volume detector (optional).

Amcor 100NG.name: Air conditioner 1 HP ON/OFF
Amcor 100NG.description: Overhead air conditioner with ON/OFF technology from the 2023-2024 series. Includes built-in WIFI for remote control via an app. I Feel function for adjusting the temperature around the remote control. Auto Restart for automatic return to the last operating mode after a power failure. Sleep function for automatic temperature change at night for a comfortable sleep and saving electricity. Timer X4 for pre-programming on and off up to four times in 24 hours. Self Dry - Continue the operation of the blower after switching off to prevent mold and fungi. Hydrophilic coating to maintain the air conditioner for a long time. Automatic air distribution (Swing) up-down. Including Shabbat status with the approval of the Shabbat shift and the Halacha Scientific and Technological Institute.
